name: Team DNC
subject: Is there anything we can say?
body:
---
Derek, Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to donate to the DNC today? What if we told you that gerrymandering Texas was only the beginning, and that Trump and his allies are already looking at redrawing maps in states like Indiana, Missouri, and Florida to give themselves more congressional seats? What if we told you that unless Democrats fight back, we could have _another_ two years of Trump with no guardrails from Congress? And what if we told you that Republicans are counting on all of us becoming overwhelmed by all the news and just giving up entirely? And what if we told you that Republicans are counting on all of us becoming overwhelmed by all the news and just giving up entirely? **We can't do that, Derek — not with so much on the line.** With your donation, we can send a powerful message to Trump and his allies that Democrats are here to defend our democracy and we’re fighting fire with fire. [**Will you rush a $3 contribution to help support the DNC’s efforts to continue pushing back against the GOP’s gerrymandering efforts? With $3, we can continue investing in every single Democratic state party and helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year, next year, and beyond:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250903_4494_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4494_22930333_WiFAnY&akid=4494%2E22930333%2EWiFAnY) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250903_4494_fr&refcode2=4494_22930333_WiFAnY&akid=4494%2E22930333%2EWiFAnY)**

name: Eliza Walton
subject: How did you survive the heat wave, Peter?
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=DqfsXEUdj5MQ5Tloqbt0CmRc2hBUziNv892jNv3ZYec1aPPNDpU3MfMdxEPxg09f13q+W579LXulHEaTfwSowPdkdgOsr1I+s/RovUqtxF5PONRb1a+QJPvqA0TzVHa6 [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=DqfsXEUdj5MQ5Tloqbt0CmRc2hBUziNv892jNv3ZYec1aPPNDpU3MfMdxEPxg09f13q+W579LXulHEaTfwSowPdkdgOsr1I+s/RovUqtxF5PONRb1a+QJPvqA0TzVHa6]
Hi Peter,
Hot enough for you? For most of us Oregonians, several days in a row near or over 100° are unusual and maybe unbearable. If you're one of the fortunate people with cooling at home or work, extreme heat may be an inconvenience for now. Too many folks in Oregon still don’t have cooling at home. Outdoor workers need to cool down at night and often can’t afford to miss a day. That’s dangerous for health and safety.
Do the recent heat waves have you thinking of replacing your old A/C or installing cooling for the first time? To lower utility bills, cut pollution, and increase health and safety, we need to get more homes and buildings using energy efficient heat pumps, which work as A/C in the summer and a heater in the winter!
It’s never a bad time to get a heat pump, but it’s no small undertaking. Major shifts are coming for incentives, which help lower the cost to buy and install heat pumps and other energy saving measures.
Here’s what you need to know:
* Pres. Trump and a Republican-led Congress are raising the cost to you or your landlord to pay to upgrade your home for safety and resilience, by taking away tax breaks and other incentives. While Oregonians will still have programs to help pay for projects in years to come, the federal tax breaks for heat pumps will go away by December 31, 2025. Here’s an easy to understand guide on what’s changing, from Rewiring America [https://homes.rewiringamerica.org/electric-tax-credits] .
* Oregon lawmakers failed to reinvest in two state programs that would help people pay for a heat pump this year. We’ll continue to demand they step up as the feds fail us.
* After the federal tax breaks are taken away from us this year, there will be help to pay for your project in 2026 and beyond! Many electric utilities, the Energy Trust of Oregon, and local programs like the Portland Clean Energy Fund will continue to offer rebates, incentives, and other ways to discount a new heat pump.
* Oregon Dept. of Energy (ODOE) will have limited incentive programs next year [https://www.oregon.gov/energy/Incentives/Pages/home-energy-rebates.aspx] for energy efficiency and heat pump projects. And the Heat Pump Purchase Program [https://www.oregon.gov/energy/Incentives/Pages/HP3.aspx] is still available for landlords and new construction. Another round of incentives for homeowners will be available in 2027.
Two important points about all this:
1. If you’ve been thinking about a heat pump or your air conditioning or furnace is on its last legs, then it might be time to act before the tax credits are stripped away. Consumer experts say no one should rush to start a heat pump project at home, if they’re not ready. Putting too much pressure on yourself is not a good way to decide on a major investment.
2. We’ll continue to fight alongside you to convince people in power to make it easier to afford and install heat pumps, increase resilience, and lower energy bills in our homes and buildings.
No matter when you make the decision on upgrades to be cleaner, energy efficient and healthier, make sure to check out the Energy Hub for Incentive Programs + Projects in Oregon (HIPPO) [https://incentives.oregon.gov/] . It will help you find all the incentives available to you for all kinds of clean energy and climate resilience projects.
If you’ve undergone your own home energy efficiency or clean energy upgrades, will you take a moment to tell us your story here? [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2] Your story is important to those looking to make these changes!
Share your story [https://secure.everyaction.com/1FILJlRX4E2gU59Vpw7S0A2?contactdata=DqfsXEUdj5MQ5Tloqbt0CmRc2hBUziNv892jNv3ZYec1aPPNDpU3MfMdxEPxg09f13q+W579LXulHEaTfwSowPdkdgOsr1I+s/RovUqtxF5PONRb1a+QJPvqA0TzVHa6]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Hot enough for you? For most of us Oregonians, several days in a row near or over 100° are unusual and maybe unbearable. If you're one of the fortunate people with cooling at home or work, extreme heat may be an inconvenience for now. Too many folks in Oregon still don’t have cooling at home. Outdoor workers need to cool down at night and often can’t afford to miss a day. That’s dangerous for health and safety. Do the recent heat waves have you thinking of replacing your old A/C or installing cooling for the first time? To lower utility bills, cut pollution, and increase health and safety, we need to get more homes and buildings using energy efficient heat pumps, which work as A/C in the summer and a heater in the winter! It’s never a bad time to get a heat pump, but it’s no small undertaking. Major shifts are coming for incentives, which help lower the cost to buy and install heat pumps and other energy saving measures. Here’s what you need to know: Pres. Trump and a Republican-led Congress are raising the cost to you or your landlord to pay to upgrade your home for safety and resilience, by taking away tax breaks and other incentives. While Oregonians will still have programs to help pay for projects in years to come, the federal tax breaks for heat pumps will go away by December 31, 2025. Here’s an easy to understand guide on what’s changing, from Rewiring America [] . Oregon lawmakers failed to reinvest in two state programs that would help people pay for a heat pump this year. We’ll continue to demand they step up as the feds fail us. After the federal tax breaks are taken away from us this year, there will be help to pay for your project in 2026 and beyond! Many electric utilities, the Energy Trust of Oregon, and local programs like the Portland Clean Energy Fund will continue to offer rebates, incentives, and other ways to discount a new heat pump. Oregon Dept. of Energy (ODOE) will have limited incentive programs next year [] for energy efficiency and heat pump projects. And the Heat Pump Purchase Program [] is still available for landlords and new construction. Another round of incentives for homeowners will be available in 2027. Two important points about all this: 1. If you’ve been thinking about a heat pump or your air conditioning or furnace is on its last legs, then it might be time to act before the tax credits are stripped away. Consumer experts say no one should rush to start a heat pump project at home, if they’re not ready. Putting too much pressure on yourself is not a good way to decide on a major investment. 2. We’ll continue to fight alongside you to convince people in power to make it easier to afford and install heat pumps, increase resilience, and lower energy bills in our homes and buildings. No matter when you make the decision on upgrades to be cleaner, energy efficient and healthier, make sure to check out the Energy Hub for Incentive Programs + Projects in Oregon (HIPPO) [] . It will help you find all the incentives available to you for all kinds of clean energy and climate resilience projects. If you’ve undergone your own home energy efficiency or clean energy upgrades, will you take a moment to tell us your story here? [] Your story is important to those looking to make these changes! Share your story [] Sincerely, [] Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

As Beto continues traveling across Texas and the country, meeting voters face-to-face and hearing directly from them, we want to make sure your voice is part of the conversation too.
No matter where you live or what your background is, your perspective matters—and we’re listening.
**[Will you take a minute to share which issues matter most to you?](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/2025-survey/?source=em20250903&t=2&akid=240341%2E444211%2EDlmQSo)**

This moment demands more than outrage. It calls for a clear vision to rebuild a system that has left too many behind. That vision starts with you—your values, your concerns, your ideas, your hopes for what comes next.
If you’re fed up with the way things are going, regardless of your political beliefs or party, we want to hear from you. Your input will help shape how we take on Trump’s authoritarianism—and how we fight to win in 2026 and beyond.

subject: JESUS IS KING.

body:
Why are Christians so afraid? | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=0536abf104e146c6b63115cf4c106444&_e=dYcoet_oFjNQqGPfGT4GMlKVSKySErW2bbfDKP3KZQhSvUV21lyyArX5GnrAwnHQv7eEdvSLYdfp0gJ3CJfr9tTW_ZYvwKz-0jzsbKXRR2DMRwqsRDrc4J0Jov6BVeOnJKWi6VGevlT24EPWp-7rXxSeefyEZdKyfWZdX5majyolk9wfsrq213zFhE1LsDSUoPhbeoZJVqu3ysPi1xd1FXCQNxObunm_TXVIKQoAdD7BJliufPBy3CqVhUwYLKc4ZB6RddjZxToT7ztYXwqxMuIkC7bXnkyn7oDirv_HGMJ2XbH3DzIdCePqpA-kbkSSwAj8fdotetLS_3j1dirc59r3FQuAyP4lKASkk7OxwNNXcnoVIOacFrMz6ug56brWtG9w786ddFTV-gWG5RyudP0u0EI_Tl3RwEdxRSJPBCvwf4cQoVD-QQ8MSyJCfTw33404YuX-OLrQD1_nAa7ci4N8nJ7PEWDBzDFaI9iFZgfXSsstvb3SQnA7fmgAfFbA071eKOUWOJeVRX8fx1aHdIT1jqOj99AMhAS1utBjIMQ3EFcdtxA8Wp77EeVoAtBK)
---

Peter,

Last week at the Minnesota State Fair, our campaign was the only one to acknowledge Jesus Christ—**the only one boldly.**

After the tragedy in Minneapolis, people searched. And they came—for the “Jesus Is King” shirts. **For the message, for the truth.**

Kids pointed. Teens asked questions. Grown men and women cried. Not because we were selling shirts... but **because we stood unafraid in a world that wants to silence God.**

Why are Christians so afraid?

Why have politicians—even Republicans—shied away from God?

Not me. I lean in when I’m expected to fold. I’m not pushing Jesus on anyone... but I will never be ashamed of Him. Ever.

| [ **STAND WITH A GOD-FEARING MAN** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=0536abf104e146c6b63115cf4c106444&_e=dYcoet_oFjNQqGPfGT4GMlKVSKySErW2bbfDKP3KZQhSvUV21lyyArX5GnrAwnHQv7eEdvSLYdfp0gJ3CJfr9tTW_ZYvwKz-0jzsbKXRR2DMRwqsRDrc4J0Jov6BVeOnJKWi6VGevlT24EPWp-7rX-yHBaNZq3HNUmM1LyPAgsmvlN3XskMV9onBBBSus1PBMo4TvZh1BBgrySH8QarigWA99FPmRSN0p2Bi7_bIvbZ81znQ67YDneDqfTSdChuxE_GlX37nHgzG3iuFnHQMrJE_p2xDS1l-gaUBnLnsIMAXo4jt6mhsTAt5OEk0yRSfSxwam_S-osOXB7jd0KI04MGdW4l0_0cNA3SlnGM3n9iKx3B_D1l5uGc5Vfviwjv50YKARBYAB8J_oEQrJrDDLXOaZ6AQ8x2TN8J2X8joI0djlfuY1b6o7WguuH2TLx0QU1Tv9Zl3eOu600zhm_yL2SlDWlU0B4vMqtXKabPX1vjSKsonoTe-9m7TH8N5_RVUvYP0MRYCwqbZxginnJSIYGzt-oNndHmH6DZTczh2v3ilfte4RTx8g3qfT_Xs9-99)
---

****We will glorify His Name in the public square, in Washington, D.C., and everywhere this fight takes us.****

This campaign isn’t just about politics. It’s about principle. **If you believe that, stand with me today.**

**[DONATE NOW](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=0536abf104e146c6b63115cf4c106444&_e=dYcoet_oFjNQqGPfGT4GMlKVSKySErW2bbfDKP3KZQhSvUV21lyyArX5GnrAwnHQv7eEdvSLYdfp0gJ3CJfr9tTW_ZYvwKz-0jzsbKXRR2DMRwqsRDrc4J0Jov6BVeOnN8TiNjld9SDmSKwyIUWqr59ZCPNPVMv2T4vjwqecZQKoi-H4zT991QdTCEzbrTRE91JAlF18cmW15VOOv1mNmY0UlXzcra_ju2pcc7jYUYF02Ua0qK7W8tQkGYR_OmV_iX-JMxEwK_iRXeG4ggAb2Oe8k_NBSMyJ40J0DQcJ5sJwFgm-VA2w58UKrpgJBi_V7tc0exweCCZ-7_oAXjhgdBgf7nK86q3zAH61QtHFw3anfefd7d46rxGcpklQiyNBZgs2z5cBBEGoTGZ0qbME8VFzYeyVpHGa2QN9HMz8Rpl6HTk7Cp64DWxNyrpgOIbmQmwyVe4NN1Qo5SUEETRccn6K4ZY8tdF0GuMr5h8AQeiQ3CVwZtNlnNYasMxsQVzc6WCQ9S-7vQSDmxAAen9rfrlLhFI4giMk3ckoBzf7toc%3D)** **– Let’s show them we’re not backing down!**

JESUS IS KING,
Royce White

P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Delia Ramirez is showing what courage looks like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

At a time when too many leaders stay silent, Justice Democrat Delia
Ramirez is speaking truth and showing what real courage looks like by
calling for justice and human rights when it matters most.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250903?refcode=em20250903-36984&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36984_1203867_F_N6vo&akid=36984%2E1203867%2EF_N6vo ]A post on X from Congresswoman Delia C. Ramirez (@repdeliaramirez)
features a quote tweet of a Washington Post article. Her tweet reads:
'There is no 'voluntary' relocation when you've been bombed, starved,
terrorized, and detained. It's all coercion. It's forced relocation.
Whether it's the 'voluntary' self-deportation of our neighbors or the
'voluntary' displacement of Palestinians, their lies disguise terrible
abuses of power. We must stand opposed.' The reposted article from The

I'm just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay--not a D.C. insider with a team of lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial. In 2021, my life was flipped upside down. I was thrown into a Biden Regime Gulag for almost 100 days. Why? Because I peacefully protested on January 6th - standing up for President Trump and the 74 million Americans who voted for him. Biden sent a FBI SWAT TEAM to bust down my front door. My wife and kids were terrified. Prison was going to be my home now. I wore my cross necklace every day in Biden's Gulag. It reminded me that I can't give up on life, give up on my family, or give up on my country. ____________________________________ President Trump OFFICIALLY PARDONED ME on January 20th, 2025. It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back. ____________________________________ I will never take my freedom for granted again. That 's why I'm running for U.S. Congress - something I NEVER imagined doing. Where I'm from in West Virginia, we don't trust politicians. And for good reason. The D.C. elites have sold us out --shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren't the only ones feeling this. Hard-working families are getting CRUSHED in all 50 states. I'm fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life -- and it won't be easy. I'm not backed by billionaires or political "experts". My campaign is 100% powered by patriots like you. If you're tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington --I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way? Let 's take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump. THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Peter ,
Donald Trump tried to use a law from 1798 (the disgraceful Alien Enemies Act) to justify the mass deportations of immigrants without due process. He claimed they were part of an “invasion.”
But a federal appeals court just said NO, ruling that Trump failed to prove his case and blocked him from abusing this wartime law.
Time and again, the courts have been the only thing standing between Trump and his most dangerous schemes. From mass firings of essential workers to mass deportations, Trump pushes until the courts tell him to stop.
That’s why judicial elections are so critical and why we cannot afford to lose Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court this year. With three seats up for grabs, the outcome will determine whether Trump’s allies get the power to greenlight voter suppression, gerrymanders, and attacks on immigrants – or whether the courts remain a check on his abuse of power.
Grassroots donations fuel this fight and GOTV PAC is investing in Pennsylvania to turn out voters and keep the courts independent. Can you make a donation today to help us protect Pennsylvania’s courts and ensure they remain a check on Trump? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09032025&amount=25]

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Tell your governor: Protect vote by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump wants to disenfranchise seniors, people with disabilities, overseas military personnel, and working people. | |
---
Peter, **What’s the best way to attack a democracy? By attacking the right to vote.** That’s exactly what Trump is gearing up to do next. He recently declared he was prepared to “lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS.”1 Trump claims vote by mail is a scam, and accused Democrats of promoting vote by mail to rig the 2020 election against him. But according to multiple studies, vote by mail doesn’t advantage one party over another—it just expands voting access.2 Trump knows he can start taking illegal action and watch it go all the way to the Supreme Court, where his MAGA justices will give him a pass.**That’s why it’s up to each and every state governor to defend vote by mail now, before it’s too late.** [**Send a letter to your state governor now. Demand they protect vote by mail!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGrmA-wM0I7Ib1kNjMwlKLOf6c0G61HmqgyB-u2r3kQof9R_Liyx-G3HYdJH03gJ3o5MMmhUiywiUXDWQhUliTwaL6E4Gjc4CJNaBBpyLSMOdDgM2zKfRonIhPzDSMYCHdAMMbDo7igXMc4N8zYkWuNJMUD8xuQgeSUpyuO67zdrdX79Ce4Z3jWMlBSmur7IU5ztRtcGr6CA47L8hyfkvyl5Vmb8_r5mQu79qQ154MDIKk1yPKuytcJIbC7s6t9RC25UiOg6XnLB52lhf-dafZOmY8fe_DYV7RjoTFsaPgzbegihXxpY65apHlgFeCPnzWSVIzT7P4QBXwkCy56xF4S8MnY1H0wOSgI4PFNmKT2bnDnOCScLQ1P_GfD-ntG781JAYocRx14dQLHnlcFJmqDO03a3bTeBN8ncWZCUi9Hv_n3EF-lp3v0CVwSgdPZsLXsEQ0AWgNUfPIvdVZVTpvog/4jm/862w-2uaQpyExBY2fIDQoA/h0/h001.DSrttgv4txvIUg_EB9mWDhHyJM8kaIX_YhCLUrm7GWA) [SIGN & SEND ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGrmA-wM0I7Ib1kNjMwlKLOf6c0G61HmqgyB-u2r3kQof9R_Liyx-G3HYdJH03gJ3o5MMmhUiywiUXDWQhUliTwaL6E4Gjc4CJNaBBpyLSMOdDgM2zKfRonIhPzDSMYCHdAMMbDo7igXMc4N8zYkWuNJMUD8xuQgeSUpyuO67zdrdX79Ce4Z3jWMlBSmur7IU5ztRtcGr6CA47L8hyfkvyl5Vmb8_r5mQu79qQ154MDII5ARx_2a6IbytOYzXjOtY5LCRIEQBhGuyLEsLTEyfCXYqq33a1GgQrIePbWrgTiHSKNrC80uSqJq9GjOljq22uPpqV8iyAVHScgqNeJl5pDRIv9RyMofNlGB4YZOgKQAp2p8LQ2Ag6WlUC5aedfJcBEbZkpoXnYd28v4TurR4DQiw-DsftUbeVmCjcNG4kgZEM3s0eWjf7nuCX4E5czObSe_WztZKZRx3Yg5jfeJoO5A/4jm/862w-2uaQpyExBY2fIDQoA/h1/h001.no5kgBM2ilXol9OzhRQqUHp4ScmwYoOtWm0d-rdqrYE) **Vote by mail is extremely popular.** Why? It allows people to vote who can’t take time off work to go to the polls. It gives seniors and people with disabilities the option to mail their ballot, instead of arranging to do so in person. It ensures military personnel serving overseas can cast their ballots. **It also reduces voter suppression tactics like intimidation at polling places and allows voters to do their research at home as they vote.** Those are exactly the type of democratic actions Trump wants to put an end to. **If we want a strong democracy, we need strong voting rights.** [**Tell your governor to step up and protect vote by mail against attacks by the Trump administration right now. There is too much at stake to allow Trump to rip the vote away from millions.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_5hbu1DV_K1a9EsXVVRCLGrmA-wM0I7Ib1kNjMwlKLOf6c0G61HmqgyB-u2r3kQof9R_Liyx-G3HYdJH03gJ3o5MMmhUiywiUXDWQhUliTwaL6E4Gjc4CJNaBBpyLSMOdDgM2zKfRonIhPzDSMYCHdAMMbDo7igXMc4N8zYkWuNJMUD8xuQgeSUpyuO67zdrdX79Ce4Z3jWMlBSmur7IU5ztRtcGr6CA47L8hyfkvyl5Vmb8_r5mQu79qQ154MDIIiG1lQbMp4kXV7Nic10-buN2dN84MihPdPr7pK4y9sT-sp-XSp67iYkhAparPkJKRhZFU0zrO0hKcbg-nTYjiEcr-Nb84LytNdUWJ2tAe-DlPzUBkfLxPubWoZClgmfeAq-Scburi6WNdoKg2FE5VwfPJdFsYLdZ0BiRe6LG36uGmg4PB96uZhZ8uYUMmp3llP5K0_YLyPjPGf1BAv0IfNfoGcEVQWbz3_CTjZ5lM5ng/4jm/862w-2uaQpyExBY2fIDQoA/h2/h001.wSeB3BvegwrZ5UM5w3hacl-zzAAk_CL2ruAL4vf5bL0) Thank you for defending the right to vote, Morgan Stahr

By attacking the right to vote. That’s exactly what Trump is gearing up to do next. He recently declared he was prepared to “lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS.”1 Trump claims vote by mail is a scam, and accused Democrats of promoting vote by mail to rig the 2020 election against him. But according to multiple studies, vote by mail doesn’t advantage one party over another—it just expands voting access.2 Trump knows he can start taking illegal action and watch it go all the way to the Supreme Court, where his MAGA justices will give him a pass.That’s why it’s up to each and every state governor to defend vote by mail now, before it’s too late. Vote by mail is extremely popular. Why? It allows people to vote who can’t take time off work to go to the polls. It gives seniors and people with disabilities the option to mail their ballot, instead of arranging to do so in person. It ensures military personnel serving overseas can cast their ballots. It also reduces voter suppression tactics like intimidation at polling places and allows voters to do their research at home as they vote. Those are exactly the type of democratic actions Trump wants to put an end to. If we want a strong democracy, we need strong voting rights. Thank you for defending the right to vote, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy 1 Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from United for Democracy, please .

Trump's mysterious disappearance from public raises new questions
about Joe Biden's advanced age
### Trump's Health Crisis--and the Media's Collapse
Cliff Schecter opened today's livestream with a blunt truth: Donald Trump is clearly quite sick, yet the corporate media is sicker. [For a week, Trump vanished from cameras](https://substack.com/redirect/692f0f3b-753a-4bc5-8dca-bad436465ded?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--this man who treats microphones and cameras like The Lolita Express, suddenly refused to be seen.
Why? Because his body is failing (joining his mind on the other end of the seesaw), and the press refuses to cover it.
[We've had the evidence for years](https://substack.com/redirect/c57f5e81-b5d6-4578-b047-cb6e6381fff0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Back in 2017, Dr. Sanjay Gupta of CNN read Trump's own charts and concluded he had heart disease. His calcium score was 133--**well above** the danger zone.
Gupta warned that without drastic lifestyle changes Trump faced a "moderate risk of a heart attack in three to five years." That was seven years ago. Since then?
Hamberders, sleepless rage-tweeting, [and as Cliff said in his previous piece](https://substack.com/redirect/692f0f3b-753a-4bc5-8dca-bad436465ded?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), roughly the exercise regimen of a sloth trapped underneath a grand piano.
So when Trump finally reemerged this week--rigid, hiding his hands and feet behind a lectern, eyes glazed--we were well beyond speculation. [The purple blotches married to his hands, the swelling cankles, the vacant stare](https://substack.com/redirect/c57f5e81-b5d6-4578-b047-cb6e6381fff0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): they scream cardiovascular decline.
And yet, the _New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and _CNN_ ignore it, while they spent months turning Biden's debate performance into something akin to Roy Batty's (Rutger Hauer) extended death soliloquy at the end of Blade Runner.
They just couldn't _ever_ stop talking about it.
The hypocrisy is breathtaking, even for them. And with what Trump's currently doing to this country--from appointments you couldn't make at a Circle K, such as [Tulsi Gabbard](https://substack.com/redirect/d610deff-7731-4c17-9c4f-743bef9039f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Stephen Miller](https://substack.com/redirect/fa2333ee-967b-4204-9283-092f178b5b32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Pam Bondi](https://substack.com/redirect/ecc80fbe-00e2-46c9-aa98-b88a051eadc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and it starts feeling a lot like treason.
David Schuster joined Cliff to drive the point home: when narcissists face mortality, their disorder worsens. [Especially the authoritarianism](https://substack.com/redirect/c4959873-829e-4fce-9705-7ce3d0e64450?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Trump is now a textbook case--more erratic, more unhinged, more dangerous.
The world sees it. Our adversaries see it. But not our monopoly media?
They normalize it, too timid to call a liar...a liar, too obsessed with "both sides" to confront reality, too corporate owned to want to risk that sweet-sweet deregulation.

## Taylor Lorenz Needs A Refresher Course in the Whole Reporting Thing
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2dbb699b-ee54-4f60-858d-bafbf8e82009?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Taylor Lorenz could learn from Jim Acosta, who left CNN to stay faithful to reporting truth_
* * *
And while Cliff and David tore into this dereliction of duty, Kristofer Goldsmith joined the Cliff's Edge live stream to expose yet another media failure. Taylor Lorenz's _Wired Magazine_ hit piece, smearing [progressive influencers](https://substack.com/redirect/53965294-8b36-4d5f-a002-8fd909908905?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Instead of going after billionaires funding disinformation to the tune of, well, billions...Lorenz recycled right-wing talking points to attack those on the left of the spectrum spending a pittance of that to support grassroots media fighting fascism.
And she got basic facts wrong, such as making up that there was some requirement not to say mean things about Democratic leadership or support independent Democratic voices to get the grant. Nope.
Speaking of mean things, she even took her horse and pony show of "look at me, look at me!" onto the Rumble show of an infamously dishonest propagandist who magically agrees with [the Kremlin](https://substack.com/redirect/480ab99d-ac2a-4e33-9b7d-444ac77429e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on everything, Glenn Greenwald!
The same Greenwald who put Lorenz's life in danger by so grossly attacking her on Twitter by sending his army of Walking Dead dead-enders shuffling after her.
Well played, Taylor!
PS: This is not journalism--it's sabotage. And self-sabotage, because if you think the next time The Right piles on you, Taylor, any of us are risking anything to come to _your_ defense...good luck.
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bp0jaCvEloN01fS90zBBv5uRtuU6pdBf8fUohvejL9M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172686423)
### Live Stream Take Aways
The bottom line from this show?
Trump is weak, Trump is sick, and Trump is lying about it all. Meanwhile, the media is complicit, careerist, cruel and corrupt, and you should cancel your subscription to the _NY Times_ or _WaPo_ to [subscribe to Blue Amp right now](https://substack.com/redirect/cd147994-0c30-4fe3-80cb-bb12c8025601?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where you'll get truth.
The corporate media has, for a full decade of Trump, let him get away with being some combination of Bernie Madoff, Richard Nixon, Harvey Weinstein, and Vidkun Quisling. They cover Hillary's emails or Biden's age and/or son like these are world-ending events
Meanwhile we have a Trump family so corrupt they have a multi-billion dollar crypto scam out in the open.
So incompetent [they out undercover CIA ](https://substack.com/redirect/d610deff-7731-4c17-9c4f-743bef9039f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) officers. So petty [they undermine basic functions of government](https://substack.com/redirect/85d00530-0e50-41f3-bf5e-e8f6ea99bd4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So cruel they've made a sport out of [ripping children from the arms of their parents](https://substack.com/redirect/fa2333ee-967b-4204-9283-092f178b5b32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to deport them.
Kristi Noem even wanted to turn it into a reality show.
So unless independent voices fill the void, Americans will keep being fed bread and circuses while democracy burns. That's why Blue Amp exists.
That's why we started the Soundcheck Fund to support independent media/creators, and [hope you'll get a discounted paid subscription to support this mission](https://substack.com/redirect/cd147994-0c30-4fe3-80cb-bb12c8025601?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
That's why [we shout from the rooftops the truths they try to bury](https://substack.com/redirect/84c4d5d5-23ef-4795-8f6f-2c63d0a282d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Because if corporate media won't do its job, we sure as f*k will.
We don't intend to let our kids--or yours--grow up in Kim-Jong-Un America.

* **TOP NEWS**

**" 1 dead after Amtrak train, vehicle collide near Round Rock," **Austin American-Statesman's **Alex Driggars** \-- "One person is dead after a passenger train collided with a vehicle Wednesday morning near Round Rock.

At about 10 a.m., an Amtrak train slammed into a Toyota 4Runner that was either stopped on the tracks or trying to cross them, according to Texas Department of Public Safety spokesman **Billy Ray**. The driver of the SUV died in the crash, which the Williamson County Sheriff's Office said the occurred near the intersection of U.S. Highway 79 and County Road 110.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/80c07b1e-803f-4c9a-82f8-4345846c9dc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
An Amtrak police officer works at the scene of a fatal train crash in Hutto, Wednesday, Sept. 3, 2025. The Williamson County Sheriff's Office said an Amtrak train slammed into a vehicle about 10 a.m. at the intersection of U.S. Highway 79 and County Road 110.

Details about what led to the collision were not immediately clear. Ray said the railroad crossing where the crash occurred is not protected and leads to private property.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/80c07b1e-803f-4c9a-82f8-4345846c9dc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The train, which comprised two engines and six passenger cars, was carrying 71 passengers and crew members from San Antonio to Chicago, Amtrak spokesman **Marc Magliari** said. There were no immediate reports of injuries to those aboard the train.

The investigation into the crash was ongoing late Wednesday, Ray said. Traffic was not impacted, according to the sheriff's office.

Wednesday's crash is at least the second fatal collision in as many years involving an Amtrak train in Williamson County. In May 2024, a 76-year old woman died after a train traveling along the same route collided with her SUV at McNeil Road and Interstate 35 in Round Rock, [the American-Statesman reported](https://substack.com/redirect/6cafeb60-408d-4502-83f4-c1067adabd73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the time." * **TOP NEWS**

**“1 dead after Amtrak train, vehicle collide near Round Rock,”** Austin American-Statesman's **Alex Driggars** \-- "One person is dead after a passenger train collided with a vehicle Wednesday morning near Round Rock.

At about 10 a.m., an Amtrak train slammed into a Toyota 4Runner that was either stopped on the tracks or trying to cross them, according to Texas Department of Public Safety spokesman **Billy Ray**. The driver of the SUV died in the crash, which the Williamson County Sheriff's Office said the occurred near the intersection of U.S. Highway 79 and County Road 110.

The train, which comprised two engines and six passenger cars, was carrying 71 passengers and crew members from San Antonio to Chicago, Amtrak spokesman **Marc Magliari** said. There were no immediate reports of injuries to those aboard the train.

The investigation into the crash was ongoing late Wednesday, Ray said. Traffic was not impacted, according to the sheriff's office.

Wednesday's crash is at least the second fatal collision in as many years involving an Amtrak train in Williamson County. At about 10 a.m., an Amtrak train slammed into a Toyota 4Runner that was either stopped on the tracks or trying to cross them, according to Texas Department of Public Safety spokesman Billy Ray. The driver of the SUV died in the crash, which the Williamson County Sheriff's Office said the occurred near the intersection of U.S. Highway 79 and County Road 110. » An Amtrak police officer works at the scene of a fatal train crash in Hutto, Wednesday, Sept. 3, 2025. The Williamson County Sheriff's Office said an Amtrak train slammed into a vehicle about 10 a.m. at the intersection of U.S. Highway 79 and County Road 110. Details about what led to the collision were not immediately clear. Ray said the railroad crossing where the crash occurred is not protected and leads to private property. » The train, which comprised two engines and six passenger cars, was carrying 71 passengers and crew members from San Antonio to Chicago, Amtrak spokesman Marc Magliari said. There were no immediate reports of injuries to those aboard the train. The investigation into the crash was ongoing late Wednesday, Ray said. Traffic was not impacted, according to the sheriff's office. Wednesday's crash is at least the second fatal collision in as many years involving an Amtrak train in Williamson County. In May 2024, a 76-year old woman died after a train traveling along the same route collided with her SUV at McNeil Road and Interstate 35 in Round Rock, at the time." # COMMUNITY ICE CREAM SOCIAL
# Hello friends,
Are you looking to meet other people engaged in fighting for a better Indiana, and helping elect qualified leaders that will strengthen our community? If so, join me for an **ice cream social at Shin Dig, on Wednesday, 9/10 from 5 to 7 pm.** We'll have ice cream, music, good company and an opportunity to make change in our community. [RSVP here](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=27a046b9c1&e=d9ebccf591).

House Republican Leader Christine Drazan sat behind a pile nearly two feet tall – over 4,300 letters from Oregonians SCREAMING “NO” to Tina Kotek’s transportation tax scam. That’s 94% opposition. NINETY-FOUR. Oregonians told her: DON’T DO IT. But Kotek? She didn’t care. She ignored YOU, ignored Oregon families, and RAMMED her scam through the Oregon House anyway. This is just one example of why Tina is known as one of the WORST governors in America. She doesn’t listen. She doesn’t lead. She just forces her radical, disastrous agenda on us again and again. body:
31 women, with massive targets on their backs

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfagr904hrm92fei1p0hodlui657qnalhpu43268_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o31cph2bs)
---
| | Friend, _**31**_ Republican women currently serve in the House of Representatives. That’s _**31 Republicans**_**,** with targets on their backs, nearly _triple_ the size of their male counterparts. Why? [_**_Because Republican women are everything that the left pretends doesn’t exist._**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ebi18nnccdvn3m19422kr7p7tpm4cjb6u2er20_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o31cph2bs) Republican women have made it clear – you don’t have to be a “nasty woman” to be seen, be heard, and make it in America. _You can value faith. _ _You can value your family. _ _You can value your femininity. _ _You can appreciate the God-given differences between men and women._ _You can be educated, strong, and smart. _ [_**_And you can still show up to the Capitol every day for work and get good work done for the American People._**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjjmlqkl56oijulkmq6i7b5d4bv9n55ms0rbhd18_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o31cph2bs) No shock value, no lewd and crude shock tactics – just good work. But we’ve known this for a while now – the left has nothing to stand on. _So they attack everything Republicans are built on. _ [_**_And the Republican women currently serving this nation in Congress are their easiest targets._**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za2lbtn03bc7qg4fhmcj1l2a7446kk5jk4vpa5t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o31cph2bs) So if you’re willing and able – a contribution of just $31 could do a lot to protect each and every seat these remarkable women hold. _Because not only are the attacks against them biased, unfair, and totally ridiculous._
---

We know that******American issues are women’s issues** —and we’re taking that message straight to Washington. While the Democrats try to erase our values, we’re rising up louder and stronger than ever before.

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: Families in every corner of America are counting on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ashley Hinson Victory Committee
body:
I’m running for Senate because DC could use more Pro-Trump, Conservative Moms.

Friend, I'll get straight to the point:
I'm a pro-Trump, conservative minivan-driving mom from the Midwest running for Senate in the biggest race in the entire country. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2sunl9fs0rdrtbjmam1kvivra4knhkt3a19nl68_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o36c5h2bs)I was born and raised in Iowa. Now, I'm raising my two boys in the state that has given me so much. I got into this fight for them, for their future.
A few years ago, their school tried to allow kids to secretly change their gender identity at school WITHOUT telling the parents. This is one of the moments that changed me and fueled my fight against the radical Left and their woke agenda.
We fought back against this nonsense, and we won. But the fight isn't over.
In Congress, I'm fighting alongside President Trump to restore common sense and deliver real results for families.
* We've cut taxes.
* We've delivered relief for small businesses and family farms.
* We've put an end to waste, fraud, and abuse from federal spending.
* We've closed the Southern Border, we're sending criminal aliens back to where they came from, and we're making it crystal clear that nothing is more important than keeping Americans safe.

That's why I'm running for Senate to stand with President Trump and get the job done.

Democrats want to elect a Senator who will blindly obey their far-Left agenda, even if it means harming our kids.

This isn't going to happen under my watch. I apologize for being so blunt, but if we can't get the resources to fight back against the Democrats, we will start out at a serious disadvantage.

Democrats are bankrolling a blue wave to crush conservatives like me across the map. They want to destroy President Trump's Senate Majority to stonewall his agenda. The ONLY way to fight back is to ensure we have the resources to win this seat.

**[Chip in to elect a no-nonsense conservative Mom to stand with President Trump against the radical left.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvomr475q25qfset8303alm5soru760rcagnau58_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o36c5h2bs)** [KEEP A CONSERVATIVE MOM IN THE FIGHT
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zntp3rittn8p7babciqir86k0g8l8m5rokdpiu30_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o36c5h2bs)[RUSH AID TO ASHLEY HINSON
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsvbfvi0ohiu63j4km11b84p1e20k53beeot7cbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o36c5h2bs)[HELP REACH ASHLEY'S CRITICAL GOAL
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ikmn40c2hsgt3babe3hkm7djugkqltgmf6bulo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o36c5h2bs)I hope I can count on your support today--this is more than just defending another Republican Senate Seat--our conservative values are on the chopping block if we don't start preparing for the Democrats' onslaught of lies.
Talk soon,
-Ashley Hinson [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8k99jc0rhhirv0v8kfhmcj6v2js0rkf9id62b50_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0o36c5h2bs)

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuhvdh4umu2holgtjhtcodunmsfe33oceiprd1vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is virtually tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z66b4b9snav0b4klpg63dbraf9ddtb6bar75hemg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. __[_**I 'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaqnb5kq1tr22a2an4h3oogafe2ujkfcth1itgbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!")

---
If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, _**[_**please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb8re20cphehbfolgdvgh3bsn0ggflaa5ptc2540_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:")**_

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious

| |
---
| | | | | | | My back is against the wall, Friend.

The Left has too much influence, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now, their sights are set on me:
---
| | **[**Jeffries super PAC looks deep into GOP territory for 2026 map**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfa5tojcci2d2dpaa45b0fa37offsh5pab5jkp1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs)**
---
_[_Axios_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvnp7fc7r3f1eed2uabr5vjifqjapiilc7lfavco_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs)_
---
| | If I don't catch up, I'll be handing the keys to the radical Left and surrendering our Republican majority to the same forces hell-bent on destroying our country.
---
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's first Secretary of the Interior and was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**

**I 'm also desperately trying to hold on to the most critical seat in Congress. **
---
And if Schumer and Jeffries can take me down, then I can guarantee you no other Republican will stand a chance.
a new paragraph block.
---
**In 2022 and 2024, I led the team of Navy SEALs that held onto the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I 'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington, D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. **
---
So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[I _f you chip in just $5 right now_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlkmql7hqlde6fpu7a41ha53rd4i7rnic0onaki0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs)** __, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Left 's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z48d9g23g93j6onsc5mp76h8ma4bsis02qvtei40_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs)
---
You have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2f2i62f9lugfh8j9enhelr70p5gsglileg31v6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjge0p74c3h2bs)

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs4vesh4rq924bs9q932krse3pqninjg6tncs6so_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zevq00l56vb9jm3pen1p23c87d5qugu44mt6rfl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkanb4n57c6viouaof429ta7ttmeup6c078lkv1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd9kodhv4iogqcb4i91ceo4tiaqfe0bnmq2l1ld8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvk1b4d0jjai3cj62qe1sae5avhdao8041c5jrdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9viagbhbka0v29qmp4uqcnb5hjbulojf8ec5ic8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn5574ilcje3ag2t27gv58tniri4d0il0svvp5go_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ho5r914geu40kbt3qtjho0l8ems9jl7cmn0318_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zurcvvv95r522hn639i543up80jrarht9d7eph1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2b3ph0mksvvugu73s2u6jk6iqutqplrts1h0a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8k75cekasdpciqlok031tdf26glgobk7gdsfh7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsro2v78kdo3ptlbhp867t0jq26hs63ksp4t3q2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2rnttolrl5ovlg1q1p233ap1cjgvnfvrjvgdqi8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cjgecor4cth2bs)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---

clean_body: It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Finally breaking through the noise
body:
And ending the Democrats’ monopoly on media in MA...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAXzcWglciTv7kaXtog0InXnlKSL6YVkEYhNVAd0nzvqqLpQsKx6rqJx6J3vr8aQrOvTV92sFmjTU434OtTASxQZcVzqgwFTzv7EY1Ay_HMA1YlCF49tDTfiSAlfBRhKiHf4bXZKfEa1AnLDC5suGw==&c=j79m3HVpI6j86sh3B7M_2EEIXaMWh5-ojU0OebYaUqB_9rOSwG2Zcw==&ch=uDm1RZzy-jUUxKyhP3Mtpw7rI1SlI4-Z5J7eRoPjKzZIAkF-WQIbqQ==)
---
| Dear Peter,
For too long, Democrats have had a monopoly on the media in Massachusetts.
They push their narrative unchallenged, while Republican voices are often buried or downright ignored.
That ends now.
Over the past few months, the MassGOP has been building a media machine to take our message straight to the voters: 🎙️ [Podcasts and interviews](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAXzcWglciTv7kaXtog0InXnlKSL6YVkEYhNVAd0nzvqqLpQsKx6rgMRbCvZmk44cVH65KwITon4p5CK2cjSil3v1PzVr-FMTGCQIoG75F3XSItL46wXDcGXlPJt-R_CpRR_l1G8F4TMC0rvV-oEkVC9-Lx4Vhbqdyv9Fo_TxL9m2YN-sEbGO5uM_NHJHoq21bASVjtmPuXuzqsrjLtIj_AeLwEAMk5QDKskyXPY-M0=&c=j79m3HVpI6j86sh3B7M_2EEIXaMWh5-ojU0OebYaUqB_9rOSwG2Zcw==&ch=uDm1RZzy-jUUxKyhP3Mtpw7rI1SlI4-Z5J7eRoPjKzZIAkF-WQIbqQ==) to connect directly with people in every corner of the Commonwealth. 📲 [Video storytelling](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAXzcWglciTv7kaXtog0InXnlKSL6YVkEYhNVAd0nzvqqLpQsKx6rgMRbCvZmk44nXaBWmEp_CZFlaT6ReJwvqkWAcx3mTDXlK_PrE3aL5NLuXgf6yqG5w0oYru3xFXMxEVE4Konk5tCn3ixKpEybvY-0djemkF4bi78kOoewzxDfm761GHEKqUDLdkkDNglF8pzS5axU18=&c=j79m3HVpI6j86sh3B7M_2EEIXaMWh5-ojU0OebYaUqB_9rOSwG2Zcw==&ch=uDm1RZzy-jUUxKyhP3Mtpw7rI1SlI4-Z5J7eRoPjKzZIAkF-WQIbqQ==) reaching tens of thousands of voters every week. 📰 [Rapid-response messaging](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAXzcWglciTv7kaXtog0InXnlKSL6YVkEYhNVAd0nzvqqLpQsKx6rgMRbCvZmk44lXKvqVH9mVSRFbPaTCXp9iP5Q7MgoWhDWvpse_mFFQ65EyFZXNys7G_UsPQLgO4c19atK0nhfXwf4G5fj36IFQ==&c=j79m3HVpI6j86sh3B7M_2EEIXaMWh5-ojU0OebYaUqB_9rOSwG2Zcw==&ch=uDm1RZzy-jUUxKyhP3Mtpw7rI1SlI4-Z5J7eRoPjKzZIAkF-WQIbqQ==) that highlights Republican leaders and exposes Democrat failures.

Every dollar you contribute to the MassGOP helps us produce the videos, ads, and digital content we need to break through the noise and show voters there's an alternative to one-party rule.

body:
Get the full recap: school board showdowns, powerful testimonies, and bold stands for truth across America.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX0rrw4vdVHlW4DCsMd5GPmWpW197v5Z5C2t3_N6D7jXC3hKBlW69sMD-6lZ3kvVTycYW2b8XbdW1C2XSP4RjcrSW4-R__T9fjdNkW4Db-5987DDBtW5M56PB6mjj9qW2tN1DC2--ltbW8LlflZ7XcxwvW2RK9WB7Y7ZxlW7V77C85TrnhmW5r6mNd3cLJZgW5nN9wr1lLKV9N8S4fYm9r5TrVyTHKB48YVCvW5FGw5n49FHJfMbNPs86nSYXW3wFfg28H5dW7W9gWGNZ8KsN9bW6WKXVg6qT8Q6W9f2qlW4Dq_z4MYXVrSkb3NHf8P0nMC04)
---
Dear Peter, This summer marked an inspiring chapter for the TPUSA Faith team. God opened doors for us to share His truth and encouragement across the nation, and we’re excited to share some highlights with you. We traveled to Dallas, TX for the _Young Women’s Leadership Summit_ , Tampa, FL for the _Student Action Summit_ , Phoenix, AZ for two _Freedom Night in America_ events, and finally to Los Angeles, CA for our long-anticipated _Faith Forward Pastor’s Summit_. At each stop, we had the privilege of praying with attendees, encouraging pastors and ministry leaders, and sharing the hope of the Gospel in fresh and bold ways.
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX0rrw4vdVHlW4DCsMd5GPmWpW197v5Z5C2t3_N6D7jYP3m2nnW8wLKSR6lZ3p2W3svKmk3QM1pbN1w39yJDdRk1W2tM7mq93__BPVXxFRc4kpzJdN1j708Ll27D7W6rWjZ-3PVZY-W5Cww9l8JYrtRW8pKH5v5ppQZ8W40rQ4G3tqfKXW1DBKY91xHj4QW5yPPYj1q6rzGW7jRnFt8CBgwjW6lqMCh3X3LZTW6Gb64W856ZmhW4QYlhF77FxlQW1dJ5LY2F_nKNW7_JnC67GYdJhN5sBGf2DNlYWW7qW_cK89Bw7mW95fpQl2yGRVbW7pwfM_7gXgDrDfgWlL319FW53z91b65WkzSW8NNTSN7_s58-W5LrVY-93m6hBW635FTR85fdTnN2CwnJLD1pF0V-hZWz61ZY3yf6sZ60C04)
---
## At the _Faith Forward Pastor’s Summit_ , we featured a strong line up of speakers from around the world. Pastors Andrew and Noleen Sedra flew in from Australia to share powerful sermons. Canada’s content creator David Isaac joined a panel to share his experiences. We also had an incredible lineup, including _LiveAction’s_ Lila Rose, Pastor Jack Hibbs, and Pastor Greg Laurie. Pastor John Amanchukwu even took a break from visiting school boards to be with us!
---
He’s Back at It: Pastor John Takes On America's Wokest School Boards
---
This summer, Pastor John Amanchukwu confronted woke school boards in Florida, Illinois, and Arizona, exposing explicit content in their public school libraries.
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX0rrw4vdVHlW4DCsMd5GPmWpW197v5Z5C2t3_N6D7jYv2_3C8W7Y8-PT6lZ3nNVVldcP47phV_W2CXpg-5vm6mBW8j05h85h2bpnW6KPVlz89R3FVW8QZY9_3-NKDsW5jS9N66qMLB8W8RBwzV5_FLHyW4vBp_857CDktN2F8xxQGM0NRW71b5Wy7PWwzQW8mVlty42yYVbW8DbgxT6m3LSwW5NrL_g2wY-LCW6SfxYJ4pxqfrVZ6fpS8S6NfGN4jVm6Yl0TGdW78rz7y5ZHDtXW7djVQ67MrCqFN7TbXh7hFFgxW4kjYVK5lmy8LW40jnlY8hr9clW3TmdN83H0Tf2W43l3zv2WLp3fW83pHYk3Gl31nW7dMpHr1_LtMGVtCskv1glBbxf280yLY04)
---
In Florida, board members tried to silence him as he read excerpts aloud, but he stood his ground! His powerful presence reminds communities that no child should be mentally violated. Silence isn’t an option when it comes to safeguarding the next generation! If you or someone you know are in a district who needs help, email us at [faith@tpusa.com](mailto:faith@tpusa.com). Help us understand what’s happening in your district by taking our brief [school board poll](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX0rrw4vdVHlW4DCsMd5GPmWpW197v5Z5C2t3_N6D7jYb3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3nwW1YnTmP7mZg70W8d3NHp1g_twFW1D5DqC135MyYW82Wq2H971d-lW5Ys6bN7-R0XsW8ZSL465q86HkW66Vwbj57d1L9W9dt0qr1fWnVWVRrslW7yxwgFW5MX_183cSpszW4V4zJd5chz-0W2V1WKx6kkZpPW4gjhSZ46WkQxW4pMR4j3WGH47V976b61j-gHWW4f-XQ_3w32M7W1WGHC-5DdVFYN6zqKXDXmXKyW6lk2SF6wGrZvN8DG2qkG-FYFW3T7BRT3QP47nW3mlXRx2kvrd1N5kG-HDb-frQW5Dydg93cBBNKd8DNG204).

Learn the Core Truths Every Christian Must Know TPUSA Faith has released _First Truths_ , a six-part course hosted by Pastor Lucas Miles and Dr. Jeff Myers. Designed to unify the American Church, this series focuses on the non-negotiable doctrines that define authentic Christianity.

[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX0rrw4vdVHlW4DCsMd5GPmWpW197v5Z5C2t3_N6D7jYb3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3pwW4PBqjq8JtGclW3CBsQ35KKn4VW6ypNHW4R22nZW6_dDCC1wczYmW8Cb8Wj5tMwfKW47zRcM3Cq_2HW2k4wsd5bmdZKW2Stw6s8qrlp8W8HCd0W1l2xL9W3Lfwj_1gTlCCW93QS_T65yNQwW3bYrPk6yg7v6W4m4N212-BQdfW9c2nvH3ZcGGWW5PbfXw5dtB85W5mDmNT4jzpd5W1xx3C08P9H9XW37xCgj5vnTG3W19rySV7_RTYpW4MD7jr8DZ9d9W7C7RJZ5DqCNCW38x8Qr49sZnsW6M7hGN96M20BN4J3tWP3mzh8f15t2Qz04)

clean_body: Get the full recap: school board showdowns, powerful testimonies, and bold stands for truth across America. | Dear Peter, This summer marked an inspiring chapter for the TPUSA Faith team. God opened doors for us to share His truth and encouragement across the nation, and we’re excited to share some highlights with you. We traveled to Dallas, TX for the Young Women’s Leadership Summit , Tampa, FL for the Student Action Summit , Phoenix, AZ for two Freedom Night in America events, and finally to Los Angeles, CA for our long-anticipated Faith Forward Pastor’s Summit. At each stop, we had the privilege of praying with attendees, encouraging pastors and ministry leaders, and sharing the hope of the Gospel in fresh and bold ways. At the Faith Forward Pastor’s Summit , we featured a strong line up of speakers from around the world. Pastors Andrew and Noleen Sedra flew in from Australia to share powerful sermons. Canada’s content creator David Isaac joined a panel to share his experiences. We also had an incredible lineup, including LiveAction’s Lila Rose, Pastor Jack Hibbs, and Pastor Greg Laurie. Pastor John Amanchukwu even took a break from visiting school boards to be with us! He’s Back at It: Pastor John Takes On America's Wokest School Boards This summer, Pastor John Amanchukwu confronted woke school boards in Florida, Illinois, and Arizona, exposing explicit content in their public school libraries. In Florida, board members tried to silence him as he read excerpts aloud, but he stood his ground! His powerful presence reminds communities that no child should be mentally violated. Silence isn’t an option when it comes to safeguarding the next generation! If you or someone you know are in a district who needs help, email us at mailto:faith@tpusa.com. Help us understand what’s happening in your district by taking our brief . Strong Church Podcast Recap In a special two-part series, Pastor Lucas Miles sat down with Nathan Finochio to unpack one of the Church’s biggest blind spots: theological illiteracy. Learn the Core Truths Every Christian Must Know TPUSA Faith has released First Truths , a six-part course hosted by Pastor Lucas Miles and Dr. Jeff Myers. Designed to unify the American Church, this series focuses on the non-negotiable doctrines that define authentic Christianity. While the American culture is confused and compromising, First Truths calls believers back to the foundational truths that anchor our faith. on your own, or email mailto:faith@tpusa.com to host a group and receive free resources from your local TPUSA Faith Regional Manager. Nathan Finochio Joins Freedom Night In America If you enjoyed our recent , don’t miss him LIVE next Wednesday, September 3rd at Freedom Night in America with TPUSA founder Charlie Kirk! He’s known for exposing false ideas, explaining Scripture with clarity, and speaking directly to the issues shaping our world. Founder of TheosU and pastor, Nathan tells the truth about the culture and is here to help you think sharper in a world living upside down. to join us in person, or on Rumble. Patriotism Rises In Phoenix This December Mark your calendars for December 18–21 in Phoenix, AZ, as we gather for the nation’s largest celebration of freedom and faith! Last year’s AmericaFest featured a powerful Faith segment with worship, teaching, and encouragement to boldly live out the Gospel in today’s culture. This year we’re taking it to the next level! Early bird tickets are now available. Don’t wait to secure your spot! Monthly Inspiration Download the graphics below, set the verse of the month as your wallpaper, and take a few minutes each day to reflect on the devotional. As you meditate on this verse, focus on memorizing it and letting its truth transform your life. Support TPUSA Faith Today! Are you ready to take on this challenge? Let's grow together! Stand with us in prayer and consider in your area! By gathering with others to pray for our nation, we can create a powerful community of believers united in seeking God’s guidance and strength. If you feel led, we ask you to consider financially supporting our mission so we can continue to spread God’s Word! | | | | | | | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

# Thursday, September 4, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1951, President Harry S. Truman delivered a speech in San Francisco that was broadcast nationwide, marking the [first coast-to-coast television program](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OnjAQBPCnMZ2RMT7-FC7S0F3alGix18fmMzayNyDePvqivMG185NGo_n1uX4CRUpfP-FAyyGvCe8akRnLeoFzlPCA5IGxphBf5F45hFUr_SHVLJVZPVB8VtN4GxA19g3abvwY5knpyTS7db2Hacaghm4C46ZxQwgbojNjb2YDDdl3m5qV6ZQypm9nxA46NMNkRuxRC6PQE-fS_s6UeMcQn3xhaV0-mmh35rOK_ofQi9DLfd_tTpVzed4u9MI7VenhkZTkfxF6qXgyHhsWaYRezoKVPCaWXP4ckOQBL6wyUKnvCFJ1OTElTAxRMka8qFJOcisZvIPKTbH-vClGqsMojPo6gOK_hfytWy-r_wYAAP__CmCRTw). Yesterday, we asked about your dolphin encounters, and the stories poured in. One reader recalled kayaking in a shallow Texas bay when a dolphin glided under their boat—then gave three powerful tail slaps that left them soaked and smiling. Thanks for responding, we enjoy hearing from you! Today's sponsor is [Frontieras,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO2zAQQE8jdTb4EyUWLAIs3G3alMSYHNqT5UcgaS_29oGcIBfYdt7DzOD9enfvQInK7SdktCNWV_CzJxwDm3uC91QwQwkwsJeYPsh_1BidYGI5MXNiygWg9OXUHGxEFChntHxdtNmY2NR8t1eNQeLG4rJ6WDcvrmxZwESttcHrlc9kj23MMMUZU0qeDSIHjkpvakWJYlIMA43azr8rlXHHmL7qE9vZ1zwnex9j75P8MYnLJC5UntjHObZaBmGDflgHkpfHyK7XR_M4yTfMQGkS-hhmDPTIk3zbgcJphzYKtn6n_R_3kHegW3kZ_yHf2Eku0v3N8Cg0wMmFK86MNELOzYb9k1KirtdJsdtx8PXy-FbnpxV_AgAA__8vxpIh) a company positioned for a trillion-dollar future, with a new investment opportunity now open to _The Flyover_ readers following its successful Texas pilot and upcoming commercial project in West Virginia.

## Florida to End Vaccine Mandates
Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo announced Wednesday that the state will begin [dismantling all vaccine mandates](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDnO2zAUhE8jdRK4aWHBIo06p00p0OSj-WIuBvUgwbcPlCv83QADzOD7_jz2h8WE5fXbZjAU6l7gOhIQQdtP6xwWyLZ4S3CUkN7o3jWEXTAxDUwPTO3eYvruqvcmAAiQPRi-TLNemVhVHw1_LuAWoWB1sDg1TT7IWUv3lNpP8wQ9mnuNaaY4Y0rJUQNwy0HNq1pAgugUA49U2_i3YqEIIX3rCW10NffJRKLP0clfndg6sV3XNX5trPVuO7HdOJ3YbCN0Ce4YUm3o7eDhYxtlKDREsInikOuJ5TVA8QOfhear5HKMlFPfjP9cmBIe89Ip9soW0_97-pGz04h_AQAA__85PoDe), including those required for schoolchildren. Standing alongside Gov. Ron DeSantis, Ladapo called such mandates “wrong” and said families, not the government, should decide what vaccines to take.

Currently, Florida requires several immunizations for preschool entry, including polio, hepatitis B, and DTaP for diphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis The state has not banned vaccines but aims to shift toward voluntary guidance, encouraging parents to [make informed, personal choices](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8GuqAQDIQixTV0c-2VyEMc8E1IRklu0Lz9idXuvsB2tj7L-v_vz225IXsO2288yBQXl0Bn9lQKpeWF68qBDgwWC-Xg_IPXR3RuUVL1Qk5CwmKR_XuB2hpHpKirybRjP0xaKg31biZ3B5h61K1rQWtaRwfjOOEwuLsl1DWb65ucJLRSAnTNRNRiSzBoGKkjVYEkyyWm5m_kUHZy_h1flJo1HrU3eynPXHW_KjVXaj7Pswn39Wpx8UrNO6Ev-_cgLlSp2fmY2KLI_9JGMYiNAiX0IuM7i1ywkDjZe0GeDw7X-qlDfPkQaQ2olNZdXydjn9c552GsQG4Hsv_IV34k9WXU_wAAAP__jTGORA). Other states are making moves as well. California, Oregon, and Washington say they were forming the West Coast Health Alliance to [issue their own vaccine guidelines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEO2yAURb8Gb1jwILE9MHTxlq4drRf8iF-CIQIUN39fpekfdD-6uuf8uiwX5Mjp9hN3ci3kJdFRI7VGZXmh95xox7Rio5pCfLB_5BAWUHCSapLKLityfC-2W10gAjIdOT2cztOoYLTd5rTyQcMVrL8SrqMeR7IWRrMOajBmgI7dZ01NymqlrDX9RKRRkz2PdiBDIKyilVsu_T1zahuF-M4vKr3Pexfd1tqzCvNDwCxgPo6jP7BunG4tJ_qNO6cvKmB-5sj-LWDeCGPbPBYSMJth0kYrAXPkKxWMsraPr_xSEmNkTJ6qLOEh70X-61IFzF1x6_PgGLmeB2HVbUeOf4-1_6r5cvAnAAD__1jeif0), citing distrust in the CDC.
## Bill Targets Stock Trades in Congress
