clean_body: Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo announced Wednesday that the state will begin , including those required for schoolchildren. | | | | | | Thursday, September 4, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1951, President Harry S. Truman delivered a speech in San Francisco that was broadcast nationwide, marking the . Yesterday, we asked about your dolphin encounters, and the stories poured in. One reader recalled kayaking in a shallow Texas bay when a dolphin glided under their boat—then gave three powerful tail slaps that left them soaked and smiling. Thanks for responding, we enjoy hearing from you! Today's sponsor is a company positioned for a trillion-dollar future, with a new investment opportunity now open to The Flyover readers following its successful Texas pilot and upcoming commercial project in West Virginia. | Florida to End Vaccine Mandates Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo announced Wednesday that the state will begin , including those required for schoolchildren. Standing alongside Gov. Ron DeSantis, Ladapo called such mandates “wrong” and said families, not the government, should decide what vaccines to take. Currently, Florida requires several immunizations for preschool entry, including polio, hepatitis B, and DTaP for diphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis The state has not banned vaccines but aims to shift toward voluntary guidance, encouraging parents to . Other states are making moves as well. California, Oregon, and Washington say they were forming the West Coast Health Alliance to , citing distrust in the CDC. Bill Targets Stock Trades in Congress A bipartisan group in the House rolled out a new bill Wednesday and their families from trading stocks. The Restore Trust in Congress Act comes after years of public outcry over potential conflicts of interest and would impose steep fines for violations. With support from , lawmakers say they'll push for a floor vote this month--one member said, " If you want to day trade, leave Congress," with another adding, " Congress is not a casino." China Showcases Full Military Array China showcased its for the first time during a major military parade in Beijing on Wednesday, marking the 80th anniversary of Japan’s WWII defeat. President Xi Jinping was joined by Russian President Vladimir Putin and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in a rare public show of alignment. New weapons included upgraded intercontinental missiles, submarine drones, and four-legged “robot wolves” designed for reconnaissance and combat support. From Washington, President Trump accused the three leaders of “” in a post on social media, while the Kremlin dismissed the claim as unfounded. Presidents Putin and Xi were at a military parade discussing biotechnology and the possibility of humans living to 150—or even achieving immortality. That means we need to reach more independent voters right away. [Will you split $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action now to help our voter outreach efforts and help us pull ahead in the polls?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7494687f-954b-4e10-8d68-5d168752e7c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Here are two big takeaways from this new poll: First, independent voters are an absolutely critical group in this battleground race. Second, we can win. When Michiganders know who I am and why I’m fighting for them, they’re much more likely to support me – The Hill even recently quoted GOP operatives saying I’m the “toughest general election opponent.” But none of that matters if we don’t reach Michigan voters – and I’m counting on YOU to help me do just that. **[Peter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c46e9ae-43c7-4f1d-a983-501eb43d05dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[**, will you rush $10 – split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – to support our urgent voter outreach efforts? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e8e76eb-c3ac-4f4c-8727-0fa534f46f62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Dallas Jail Full, Cowboys vs. Eagles, and a Marsupial Escape
body:
Dallas County Jail hit [100% capacity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb_G7t4IMGAoXKRxt2lTWs_w2CHCY8u8HdZ_Hzn5hJRXVzq65_76WD4wl_z6_IkbTfyd9uVFrRZipnOJWArW35hL-iol7G3dr_quhIsSyoDwIPQSMZdr0X2cVhG97GmSo7HeDdaJ_jmhTMY6b1eLUplVJKuN8comjYM1zvZ5umHCCy2lkHJ44KqlEAEHrXV0ynZaUMy8nw9-EtM31lSu_U3nI-xbX6Yn81G74Uen5k7NrbVHS4h32akZT86hUKfm26tTczjzdsd_bhD2rxdfcDvCM3MFKQQcdAZ6MQQ8MGS-IOWzMnDeCLjtEClgpJum3AhBW2uUU5DIa9AxGfB6QPCIY7CjGL1z_TnFo-VScrVjp8Xnhrn83c__9_p7Un8CAAD__xJ0lA4) for the first time in nearly 20 years, with the latest count of 7,124 inmates—20 more than the Lew Sterrett Justice Center, the system’s main facility, is authorized to hold.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwjAUxfGnsbdE9o1j4sEDquoJSlWqfkzRTXwDbg1BsQvk7SukDuzdf-cM__d1u8YQw3H3hAey-TqM7ZEuKVLONLUeY8T0hSEOPzH246Ub53ROhC0IqAthCqFajyHOreLedsIbycnKRa1NU-lG8L0lQAKBYFSzIJCoGvD1YABIdmhMx4O9nQkjlJRCyqrETkkheqyUUr4BzZQgH_I4lXlPma6YhjiPZ5rKfjzwaPc5nxKrlgwcA5cn7L_LPKEPx10Op3RTDNx2vVytHpbP28KtPjdvjy8F1Ayc1pqB86dLiDEkvWBQK7E7YIh_O6krBu71w20YOD7ZO3oHef5fvLOF3wAAAP__w2d_2Q) | |
# Thursday, September 4, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1942, the [hospital at Fort Sam Houston](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuSqzAQheHViAyq9QCkQMFNyHzTCakGtY2m2siFNJbZ_ZS9hYn-6HzB-brMF4wc99t_vJMvr2uad6qZqRQ65oDMmL8x8vWHeU11SWd-ZsJZgepbcC2YOWDkczZN8AsEJxvycuwHZ_Vgodn8umqlAMGtth-dltai1T0Nxo7G9aNron9j4MBICVLqDhcjAVbUxphg1SAMUIglHV3ZqNAL85XP9KSjW9O9Yb-V8shC_xNqEmqqtXYlb5h2jjt16bgJNX1WbcCzXc53hJpoL8e7Eobm8OFRI3PMwygM3O4Y-YOXv13y9Oo3AAD__5s3dHA) in San Antonio was renamed in honor of Gen. Roger Brooke, a specialist in infectious diseases and the hospital’s commanding officer from 1928 to 1933. There was some unexpected Texas sightseeing on Tuesday as [several kangaroos escaped](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ8GOtD4BwOFi9vQ5bZbogEPwbtDjLATh7dfkVfY7khHOp_O93Ubb-jZP-7_cSOb3ksYH5QjU0p0jA6ZMX6j5-XJPIc8hTO-IuEoQTYV9BXo0aHnc9SlsxO4XpRkRduYvlOmg3K1SmnnkBqxuNYIwKlve-was-jFUItQenuNQQ9aCBBC1ThpATCj0lq7TppCAzmfwlGnlRK9MS58hhcd9Ry2ku2a0h4L9a-QQyGHnHN94hrC1RZyuO4UcsAj-ZnpihnTvFbbk5PfmaoffNzxCCFWFGfcqfogKtE0IJXUbb2mjcvDuj17Zh9NW2i4b-j5w09_s_ay8jcAAP__yuqCRg) from the Waco Wildlife Rescue. One was seen hopping through city streets before police and staff wrangled the marsupials back to safety. What’s the strangest animal you’ve seen on the loose? Hit reply and let us know! Today's sponsor is [Trading Tips](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwjAUxfGnsbdE9o1j4sEDquoJSlWqfkzRTXwDbg1BsQvk7SukDuzdf-cM__d1u8YQw3H3hAey-TqM7ZEuKVLONLUeY8T0hSEOPzH246Ub53ROhC0IqAthCqFajyHOreLedsIbycnKRa1NU-lG8L0lQAKBYFSzIJCoGvD1YABIdmhMx4O9nQkjlJRCyqrETkkheqyUUr4BzZQgH_I4lXlPma6YhjiPZ5rKfjzwaPc5nxKrlgwcA5cn7L_LPKEPx10Op3RTDNx2vVytHpbP28KtPjdvjy8F1Ayc1pqB86dLiDEkvWBQK7E7YIh_O6krBu71w20YOD7ZO3oHef5fvLOF3wAAAP__w2d_2Q), offering unconventional insights and advisory services to help regular people become smarter traders.

**The Final Push to 1,000+**

Ten days ago, we set out on a mission to reach 1,000 investors. Without you, we could not make it. But here’s the deal: we only have one day left. If you’ve been watching from the sidelines, now is the moment to step in and be one of the final investors who help us cross this milestone. Together, we can finish strong. [Invest in _The Flyover_ today](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAMQL9G3hLIkuxYg4YCqbf0lgPaTWAsOuFBlgKLti9_X7hNge63vkc-EPx58RegSOn2AyZ0_Dlmn3ArEZlx9gFihPIBFMclxiFv1_wsa0HwSqrmIO1BGh-A4tObKrirDLau0NWnprWdbjtZ3d21gc7YYQx2VKqFoQkjoBnlKUhrusZU5PaYtNLUtaxrfYSrqaUcQBtjQqdaYSQG4jwf-Y6Mn1DG-MwrzschT1V0d-ZHEfqbUL1QPaUVCx8_MiW-43-Tu9b9wpMveZkHFPr8PRBTTkK1O54w0DIJfX7bEobDBQPBSw0wPYBuSehz_7f4T-TEmHhfeu9fjHHeK--_-jdvpVFNNbvw2ChGKu1JGHmbgOKf4_lrL1-d-h0AAP__psSXgQ) **You Have Questions. We Have Answers!** One of the **top questions** we get is: How do I get a return on my investment? We believe in transparency. Like all investments, this carries risk—but here’s why _The Flyover_ is different: we’re already profitable after just two years,**with 80% gross margins and 24% net income**. This puts _The Flyover_ in the top 1% of media start-ups. The three most common ways investors can realize returns are:
1. **A Sale:** A larger media company or strategic partner could acquire _The Flyover_. If that day comes, we’d only partner with those who uphold our high standards. CNN or NPR need not apply.
2. **Public Listing:** While we’re private today, the future could include listing on a stock exchange, giving owners and investors freedom to buy and sell their shares.
3. **Profit Distributions (Dividends):** Because we’re profitable now, unlike most startups, dividends are a real possibility in the future.

**To recap: 1. Sale. 2. Listing. 3. Distributions.** [Your Last Chance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAMQL9G3hLIkuxYg4YCqbf0lgPaTWAsOuFBlgKLti9_X7hNge63vkc-EPx58RegSOn2AyZ0_Dlmn3ArEZlx9gFihPIBFMclxiFv1_wsa0HwSqrmIO1BGh-A4tObKrirDLau0NWnprWdbjtZ3d21gc7YYQx2VKqFoQkjoBnlKUhrusZU5PaYtNLUtaxrfYSrqaUcQBtjQqdaYSQG4jwf-Y6Mn1DG-MwrzschT1V0d-ZHEfqbUL1QPaUVCx8_MiW-43-Tu9b9wpMveZkHFPr8PRBTTkK1O54w0DIJfX7bEobDBQPBSw0wPYBuSehz_7f4T-TEmHhfeu9fjHHeK--_-jdvpVFNNbvw2ChGKu1JGHmbgOKf4_lrL1-d-h0AAP__psSXgQ) This is your opportunity to be part of something truly unique. ## Dallas County Jail Reaches Capacity
Dallas County Jail hit [100% capacity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb_G7t4IMGAoXKRxt2lTWs_w2CHCY8u8HdZ_Hzn5hJRXVzq65_76WD4wl_z6_IkbTfyd9uVFrRZipnOJWArW35hL-iol7G3dr_quhIsSyoDwIPQSMZdr0X2cVhG97GmSo7HeDdaJ_jmhTMY6b1eLUplVJKuN8comjYM1zvZ5umHCCy2lkHJ44KqlEAEHrXV0ynZaUMy8nw9-EtM31lSu_U3nI-xbX6Yn81G74Uen5k7NrbVHS4h32akZT86hUKfm26tTczjzdsd_bhD2rxdfcDvCM3MFKQQcdAZ6MQQ8MGS-IOWzMnDeCLjtEClgpJum3AhBW2uUU5DIa9AxGfB6QPCIY7CjGL1z_TnFo-VScrVjp8Xnhrn83c__9_p7Un8CAAD__xJ0lA4) for the first time in nearly 20 years, with the latest count of 7,124 inmates—20 more than the Lew Sterrett Justice Center, the system’s main facility, is authorized to hold. Officials cite outdated software, slow state prison transfers, and a new law that further delays release times. With no space left, county leaders are [weighing costly options](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOnDAQgOGnMd0gY7wsFC7S0F3alGiwh8V3sxjZznr99hGJlBe4bqSRRv83vz6WD_Tsj8dPfJLJ7y0sB5XElDPFxSEzpk_0vP1mtqGsoaZXIlyUVDeQE0i9OPRcF904s0o3dQ2Z7n4bprEfRtnsZrrbgfpRK0l3e21u1I94UxJps6PUjTfXMTlJ3XWy6_oWV91JabHXWrtRDUJLcj6H2OadMr0xbVzDi2Jrw7Nhs-d8JtH_EGoWai6ltF8U8WK0IT6Emq9RqPl_sxJq_keDywbIkdBVOAgjV8AMFxcsnmh9rrDSFiIB4xoiOKxQiL7ocHBGOjFi9uFI8Bn2A4pnqnBGb6mJxp3FM_s03IWWjyd6_pucv_fol1F_AgAA__-c55SZ), including paying other jails—possibly in other states—to take the overflow. Dallas County officials are considering a [property tax increase](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAQhp8GOqPx2EAoXFxDl2uvRGMzJD45GNlOCG-_YrNvsPWMPn3f_-86XckHv97-0oNNeS9xWnnPgUvhNM0UAuX_5MPyDMHF3cYjvzLThICtgEGAnmby4Zh0PRsL8yBrNrJvu-GiugvUdzMgDxqtHdoWmPq-l1Y5KfXSK9dZVLU3JwwG0FKClKohqyWAI6W1ni_YVRp49iWmpty58JvyEo744tS4-KiDuZey5Ur9qXCscNz3vfl4R5s5_bxVOJ5dFY6fm3DxuZZDnG3CZ3HihKONnC-H2GLO3oZD-NUlpuzXm9hS3DiVQxR6C1QICKjrZOZt9yH43PWVhtuDfPjWKr8b82XwKwAA__8XUItX) of $0.222188 per $100 of property value to cover the tens of millions of dollars in added expenses.
## Texas Leads U.S. in Uninsured Residents
Texas leads the nation in [uninsured residents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMlDbePgJHGxCNptuiBq7GbxqbITNMNz-ibnCC0sqfar6_j3HJ3r24fUXVzL5M8cx0JmYcqZ9dMiM6T96ng9mG88pXumdCEcF6lFCX4IeHXq-Rl04M4HrZUFGto-m7-qmg2IxbYuTleiaB9a97mw3UzNNFu7YAUDhzQ2DHrSUIGVd4aQlgMVaa-061QgN5HyOe5UXyvTBNPMV37RXNq4FmyXnLYn6j1CDUMN5ntV6JQwYcgw-3iWhhvuVUEOKR17KL0SoAffsLZNQw2qRmUK5Ut5jeQQf0rGTK5UE1eheVduyFbtx2-mZfWpaoeG1oufvhvw7c2-jfgIAAP__BgCD7w), with 17.4% of the state lacking health coverage, more than double the national rate of 8.6%. The crisis is most pronounced in South Texas, where 29.7% of McAllen metro residents are uninsured, followed by Laredo at 28.4% and Brownsville at 26.7%. According to [a recent study](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ywyAQQOHTSJ00C0J_BUUad06bUrMSi01mDR4Bwrp9xr5C-jdf8X6uyxUdO3_7xgfp9LJh8VQiU0q0LwaZMf6iY5uZt1DWcMYjEi4SZN_A3IBaDDo-F1UbvYKZRU1ajP0wT90wQX3XhJtC6odBjLPZNmvtKvpRyb6XUyetrZ1-YzCDEgKE6FpclQDYsFNKmUkOlQIyLoW9TXdK9MJo-QwH7e0WHjXre0rPWHVflbxU8lJKaQ_kTE_yt-z8O6rkJXvnY97JNB-hiSmbs961eRbH7OIwVgpuD3T8UdP_Xhxa_gUAAP__fPl1Qw), key factors include Texas’ lack of Medicaid expansion, higher-than-average insurance costs, and immigration-related eligibility limits. Texas’s estimated [2.1 million illegal immigrants](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd1iAsdcUFNu4SPRSRUo66665rIkwrMz18pyvj_x-Id1IIx3NnF8f8weEGNLzB2xo6dPnOWEtEYlwnx3ECOUPhOiPGJdcH_ks74IwK6F6LgwXenYQ4jnrxtmHcEY2aOWtH8zYDaNoVmtGLY337mZM54QXgzEKut6PvUaj9NIEe8GEEVpKIWXXwkNLIRbotNZuVAPTAl2gvLe0IuEnFB_P_Ma9XfLWRLsSvQrr7kxNTE211nYr6eqYmjDxozA1XaeYmr7ywAsBYeERwfGj8Bpo5VsuxI8EB615D3_R8bBt4blDosITVv7Cygsd7uQ-JHeBYOf3u_z---c3anbrXjXEGMpwY1o8Nwjxax_9n9W3Vf8CAAD__w3JjXM) further contribute to the uninsured rate, as they are ineligible for ACA benefits.
## Cowboys Open Season Against Eagles
The Dallas Cowboys open the NFL season tonight with a primetime game against the defending Super Bowl champion Philadelphia Eagles. Dallas enters the game as an [8.5-point underdog](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGzmzAQhH8NdOc5hMwzhYo07l7alMxJOtmKD8RwCjz_-wxv8g_SbLWzu9_--pw-KUteHj9pZle_UpkWPlS4Vt6mSCKkvylL-iMSyuHLW3dlmgyaK-AIaKdIWd6TbaPzGMeuZdd9XIfx1g83bJ_OD6a3A1KPbMcUuEccTfLJM7K1167N7gzDEW3XYdf1F_K2QwzUW2vjzQyNRY65lu1Sn1z5izTJu-y8XUKZW3HPWldt-h-NuTfmfhzHJXjVtWxVT0dj7kuSU_nQxtz_YcCuwPQQVlg3jjnUXBYoMSroujFFqHlm-AZdksArh1dJCR40M6w5vBQ8awXPVcG_geJOS-AIc4l81rWbi-uRRbIOH43Fx0xZvifX_zt6d-ZvAAAA___InpUp). It’s a new era in many ways for the Cowboys. New additions—like veteran defensive tackle Kenny Clark and wide receiver George Pickens—join a team still reeling from a [messy breakup](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu2yAYBeCnwRsWYEzMwNCFLV07Wr_NT0yLwQIax29fJb1vcOcjHZ3v_LrPdwgxpMdP2NG0l89zwrNGbA3L7CBGqL8hRP83xjWfS77qsyLMgomRMk2ZnB2EeM2yc2ZhTvMODb-NSk-Dmli3GblIplEtt8HrdRgYKj6iVm4ZvWeSqy6YdxnTTHLOOB96WCRnbIVBSukmoYhk6ELLpW8bNnxB9fHKTyz9mvcumq21o5LhBxGWCHueZ4_1SO-QCJt8JMLWlstFhJ2JsMERYaXiYtJKEGH3sMJGDyg1p0pbAYf0P5x-iemjICa6wEUPWP9gqfTjTz7SilBz6opxxxliDFXdiGSPHUL8zGvfO_VpxL8AAAD__2iPizw) with edge rusher Micah Parsons, who was traded to the Green Bay Packers a week ago. First-year Cowboys head coach Brian Schottenheimer is trying to keep perspective for his team: _“Every game we play is just another championship opportunity,”_ [he said of the matchup.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV4C7W5SMmFBTRe0qXtFOiawMxo5sQGWzi3Y8yW5j2HOlX_L-u7oqJ0vN-w0ew9R2ze4ZWKNQaFueRCMs3Joor0ZTbmPeylYBOgDgewBxAOY-Jdqc6b0fwhnfBcn0czEkOJ-hme1SAEKUGIfSopmi8jHoAPxptpI_QJfvBwIDiHDiXPY6KA0wolVL-JAamIPhU89LXOdTwxhJpz1tY-ik_OrJzra_C5JmJCxOX1lq_57WuY_j8nwXrNDN52Zj8j-78b6XU9K11i_WvlohSGTRTcH9gol-y_i3EZsVPAAAA___SWHHY) _“You don’t get extra credit for beating the Eagles in Philly.”_ The game kicks off at 7:20 p.m. on NBC and Peacock. With no space left, county leaders are , including paying other jails—possibly in other states—to take the overflow. Texas Leads U.S. in Uninsured Residents Texas leads the nation in , with 17.4% of the state lacking health coverage, more than double the national rate of 8.6%. The crisis is most pronounced in South Texas, where 29.7% of McAllen metro residents are uninsured, followed by Laredo at 28.4% and Brownsville at 26.7%. According to , key factors include Texas’ lack of Medicaid expansion, higher-than-average insurance costs, and immigration-related eligibility limits. Texas’s estimated further contribute to the uninsured rate, as they are ineligible for ACA benefits. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Lewiston Shooting Survivors Sue U.S. Government as Mainers Prepare to Vote on Red-Flag Laws in Ballot Question
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Lewiston Shooting Survivors Sue U.S. Government as Mainers Prepare to Vote on Red-Flag Laws in Ballot Question (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=e7dc45f32c&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on Sep 03, 2025 06:52 pm
A group of 100 surviving victims of the October 2023 Lewiston mass shooting and families of the deceased filed suit against the federal government on Wednesday, accusing it of negligence for failing to address the danger posed by the shooter, Army Reserve Sergeant Robert Card. The lawsuit comes as Mainers prepare to vote on a [...]

Voters in Portland will be asked this November if they would like to see the city’s minimum wage increase to $19 an hour over the course of the next three years. name: Hans van Mol
subject: This is what losing looks like — before it happens
body:
They’re coming for our courts. If they take them now, your future’s next.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EP1WnUVmWxrbnw0LL3fhtpdDUOUwu3N52f6CsIKu9J7E1TwncAz7kRjmNORHaxWGPK3CeqN8amw9OYmGjomBWuAU0H0QmRWfJQ0dJKAGpobViiOtz92zl3DpyPBvwfU-bvKQcxXSw3HmpPksStG05qvEsNNTexQuYEABhtwf3piPUsl_zP4ocJGGDb8MCZ3FUSNhZLP1Annn8owDJ-UgAvV7WIZY1cwa&c=ZTxvm2al3GVf6rLTSgJWJU-nDDMQWp1sVu2R2L5a1XXNk-3FO2tMjA==&ch=Ls6N3UYVxD6fX-a4dyV9dERBVptNyfcKpeQtbvPsxdFsrtoHV8sYJg==)
---
| Peter,
Most people think of 2025 as the calm before the storm, an off year. A year for us to reorganize, take a breather, and prepare for the upcoming midterms. I am writing to warn you that we do not have this luxury.
In 2025, Pennsylvania has its Supreme Court Retention election. While this may sound boring and procedural it is anything but--MAGA is working night and day to knock off the Democratic justices on the court and ensure that PA never votes blue again.
It is terrifying to me that I barely hear anyone outside of PA talking about this race. Already I see MAGA activating influencers like Scott Pressler, a young MAGA "organizer" and influencer from Pennsylvania, who is hard at work organizing for the Supreme Court fight:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EP1WnUVmWxrbnw0LL3fhtpdDUOUwu3N52f6CsIKu9J7E1TwncAz7kRjmNORHaxWGPK3CeqN8amw9OYmGjomBWuAU0H0QmRWfJQ0dJKAGpobViiOtz92zl3DpyPBvwfU-bvKQcxXSw3HmpPksStG05qvEsNNTexQuYEABhtwf3piPUsl_zP4ocJGGDb8MCZ3FUSNhZLP1Annn8owDJ-UgAj-uYcz5U95Y&c=ZTxvm2al3GVf6rLTSgJWJU-nDDMQWp1sVu2R2L5a1XXNk-3FO2tMjA==&ch=Ls6N3UYVxD6fX-a4dyV9dERBVptNyfcKpeQtbvPsxdFsrtoHV8sYJg==)
---
The right is rallying for this fight whilst Democrats are nowhere to be found.
---
Losing here means an extreme abortion ban for PA, our Democratic congressional districts will be erased, and MAGA will be guaranteed Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes.
As the President of the Pennsylvania Young Democrats, my organizers are on the front lines of this fight. Being caught flat-footed here keeps me up at night and this is what we are on track for unless we make a critical course correction.
We have exactly 61 days until November 4th 2025 to mount our comeback.
[That's why my friends at Defend our Courts, the organization at the forefront of the PA Supreme Court election fight, told me to reach out and humbly ask for support. Can you split a much-needed donation between PA Young Dems and Defend our Courts to ensure that we have the resources we will need to salvage this beyond critical court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EP1WnUVmWxrbnw0LL3fhtpdDUOUwu3N52f6CsIKu9J7E1TwncAz7kRjmNORHaxWGPK3CeqN8amw9OYmGjomBWuAU0H0QmRWfJQ0dJKAGpobViiOtz92zl3DpyPBvwfU-bvKQcxXSw3HmpPksStG05qvEsNNTexQuYEABhtwf3piPUsl_zP4ocJGGDb8MCZ3FUSNhZLP1Annn8owDJ-UgAimtbPbg2qlg&c=ZTxvm2al3GVf6rLTSgJWJU-nDDMQWp1sVu2R2L5a1XXNk-3FO2tMjA==&ch=Ls6N3UYVxD6fX-a4dyV9dERBVptNyfcKpeQtbvPsxdFsrtoHV8sYJg==)
---

| Common Sense Over Nonsense

| Team,
Please remind friends early voting begins in just 15 days. FYI all House Democrats in Washington D.C. voted against the Working Family Tax Cut Act. This bill codifies 28 Trump Executive Orders, prevented the largest tax increase on the middle class in history, supports safe cities, and adds jet fuel to our economy.
My fellow Republicans and I stand for God, Family, the Constitution, Freedom, a good business environment, and common sense. Democrat policies championed by Spanberger are nonsense, such as boys in girls bathrooms, boys in girls sports, gender surgery on minors, open borders, releasing dangerous criminals on to our streets, and defunding the police are obviously not Christian and obviously not moral. We are not supposed to accept evil as good. Why do democrats continue to support criminals over law abiding citizens? Please ask friends to vote Republican.
We've been working hard to inform as many people as possible about all Republican candidates. All three statewide offices and all 100 House of Delegates seats are on the ballot this November. We have been knocking doors, writing checks, putting up signs, and [waving good morning](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00110EbTBzwIRbrsZNREbXbeuJtbgvEmGF7-k8beh22fSFx-6fFBaTJrKDdSH58p8pV-Tzv04yxJxs7VIN8lK8DH2C1Jj3SBpykXx0lfnd5TZ0DjrCd0wfy3inKKYROpOYZ8SXtWhy_FuS0sDfZHLnitE2d5ATYs2XIOlt3wveBQGJ200TeLMHv9hHQacUEmbWu&c=eLixD30EKOPG82MuOY_PklNkT_h_1mPMMnT9qRhbteB8VjDbMRiDVA==&ch=n_z6q3Z-kucc3fnG3tzv5m2ROPlz8wZzeyrUAfo0APYvOVsUBiQp4Q==) all over the 5th congressional district.
I recommend you vote early on September 19th so then you can focus your time on helping us get your family, friends, and others to vote. Winsome Sears and the rest of the Republican ticket are right on the issues, but it won't matter unless we can turnout the vote.
Here are some photos from around the district and some of what we have been up to:

We are not supposed to accept evil as good. Why do democrats continue to support criminals over law abiding citizens? Please ask friends to vote Republican. name: Johnny =?UTF-8?B?4oCcSm9leeKAnQ==?= Jones
subject: This is never an easy conversation
body:
First responders go by a lot of names... But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2fteuuv9u2vd5qg0jbtijl24aln9k635ev9vacg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj3l096fstjusibmghvpmb1l1rgg4ft4jf0f6ijg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)

Friend,

First responders go by a lot of names...

... firefighter.
... paramedic.
... police officer.
... disaster response technician.
... border patrol agent.

**But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.**

First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It’s what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway.

However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left.

It’s time to restore trust and honor to our first responders.

That’s why I wrote my latest book, _Behind the Badge_ , dedicated to telling their story.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb2h9us0ckop820pl1qga38fu0ei72f1uh3iau4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)
I am also teaming up with **the Kash Foundation** to support our first responders and veterans.

While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists.

[I believe in the mission of the Kash Foundation, and I am helping them raise money to support our veterans and first responders by raising $20,000 before the end of the month.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmoobkjuet8t8gk8dam9oncc26l9kio2pcfpdstg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zllug9d3unbu2qtesqf4inhm94r0c5uvp482gf9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)
I know these men and women. I grew up with them, and I served with them. I know the trauma they endure and the victories that they get to save lives every day.

**And it’s a shame the little thanks first responders get sometimes.**

The one thing they all have in common is that each one of them felt compelled to help their fellow citizens, regardless of the risk.

Too often, government officials are setting up our first responders to fail and being used as political punching bags for the Radical Left.

It’s time for you and me to protect them.

The Kash Foundation has been able to:
* Provide financial support and care for families of those who fall in the line of duty. They help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.
* Provide scholarships to the children of those who gave everything. They provide scholarships that help those kids, so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.
* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, they help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

**Let’s let our first responders know that we have their backs!**

[Please show first responders that they have your support by donating any amount you can spare today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgq6i607g1ap85fij0p603urmi16fn773iadcbio_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)
[DONATE $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvepkd02c3m1a3jh097dedf9n387li9gpibq0s48_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)

[DONATE $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjh34al11008vhlfa6ntqc8rm0rfavue2unacuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)

[DONATE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcnrbb72109d217o6ekpe466ubtsqlb59ccjqmp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)

[DONATE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfik3p6qnulsqpu976v768sm7sdgu75qmed7na2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)

[DONATE $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6auervrugmd3qrk97g6k4vnktcd7g9bsril2358_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl6f82k52eugvrqnr7gu08fthpj13liuj18k4a6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztdnn1vllbjosf92qrl8dpma4ah3j7qqnb6a3s1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6cob4c3h2bs)
You and I owe everything to our first responders. It’s time to make sure we have their backs, because they will always be there when we need them.

God Bless America,

Johnny “Joey” Jones

subject: Tax Sales Prove We Don’t Really Own Our Homes
body:
Property taxes are government rent with a nice label. You can spend your life paying off a mortgage, maintain your place, raise your family there--and still lose it if you can't keep up with the annual bill.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.3AhZ3mj3DpyoZDbK0z3gvEhYGFQhsNELM5GU9zzLzoA?) for more

[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9wL3RheC1zYWxlcy1wcm92ZS13ZS1kb250LXJlYWxseS1vd24_.LkA_1gRqWBsbgpQ46xKNf3-mUJhK-Pcqrto7Q6oa2r4?)

_from the desk of_**Dana Criswell**
* * *
* * *
# [Tax Sales Prove We Don't Really Own Our Homes](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=172248955&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyMjQ4OTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5ODk3NzMsImV4cCI6MTc1OTU4MTc3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MKmoUGSIuSX74v2rb8NTl10FttDAahq8YI1jCK3iG9g)
| | [Dana Criswell](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---
| Sep 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=172248955&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyMjQ4OTU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Njk4OTc3MywiZXhwIjoxNzU5NTgxNzczLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTUyNjc4MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.S6zcM3Extm1PAghOu8_WINpDFinrIhk-lI0ZmZqbKYk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=172248955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyMjQ4OTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5ODk3NzMsImV4cCI6MTc1OTU4MTc3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MKmoUGSIuSX74v2rb8NTl10FttDAahq8YI1jCK3iG9g&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=172248955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyMjQ4OTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5ODk3NzMsImV4cCI6MTc1OTU4MTc3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MKmoUGSIuSX74v2rb8NTl10FttDAahq8YI1jCK3iG9g)
---
| | [](https://substack..4czGfhk_jfPhyBsCWDxtPWIPuzbZeDIHPaQTd-vv_ps?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/danacriswell/p/tax-sales-prove-we-dont-really-own?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4143267-d0a2-4ab0-98c6-aeb85f72f508?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###
Property taxes are government rent with a nice label. You can spend your life paying off a mortgage, maintain your place, raise your family there--and still lose it if you can't keep up with the annual bill. That isn't ownership. It's a perpetual lease from the state, and the yearly tax sale is the proof.
Every year, counties auction off liens on properties with unpaid taxes. The county gets its money now; the bidder gets a certificate and interest; the owner gets a clock that starts ticking. If the owner pays everything plus penalties and interest, they keep the home. If not, the government ultimately hands a deed to someone else. That's not a community taking care of its own--that's a system designed to remind you who's really in charge.
I've participated in these auctions. I've purchased--more accurately, paid the delinquent taxes on--three properties. All three owners redeemed, and I received my investment plus interest. On paper, that's the system "working." But what did it require? Neighbors paying a premium just to keep what was already theirs. Families scrambling to meet a deadline because the county needed cash. That isn't stewardship; it's coercion dressed up as process.
Property taxes are destructive because they separate ownership from security. You never reach the finish line. Seniors on fixed incomes don't "age out" of the tax man. Young families don't get breathing room while trying to build a future. And the government's appetite grows because it can. Assessments rise, millage creeps, and your "equity" becomes collateral for somebody else's budget.
Supporters say property taxes fund "essential services." I support roads, deputies, and schools. But the way we fund them matters. If the only way government can provide services is by putting a lien on your home and threatening an auction if you fall behind, then the model is broken. In a free society, your home should be your castle--not the county's piggy bank.
There's a better path. Phase out property taxes and replace them with transparent, voter-approved consumption-based revenue. Put real caps on local spending growth. Require every significant increase to go to the ballot--no more backdoor hikes through reassessments and jargon. End the annual auction ritual. If government must collect, do it without hanging a sale notice over a family's front door.
Some will say this is unrealistic. What's unrealistic is pretending people truly "own" their homes while a tax bill can take it away. What's unrealistic is calling it "local control" when a household's fate depends on an interest rate and a deadline. We can fund what's necessary without threatening the most important piece of wealth most families will ever own.
If you're tired of living under a permanent rent to government, make some noise. Tell your supervisors you won't accept millage increases. Tell your legislators to prioritize eliminating property taxes and replacing them with a fairer, more honest system. Real ownership means you're secure in your home--without the county holding the keys.
* * *
### Want more?
Here is a breakdown of the details on how Mississippi counties run one big sale each year to collect delinquent property taxes.
### The basics (for owners and bidders)
1. **When the sale happens**
By statute, counties hold the annual land tax sale on the **last Monday in August** (some may optionally do an additional sale the first Monday in April). Many counties now run it online. [Justia](https://substack.com/redirect/c3e48f22-d898-4344-8206-bf3b23106586?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Example county notice: DeSoto County explicitly sets its tax sale for the last Monday in August and uses online bidding. [desotocountyms.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/3a3d00b7-3223-44c3-ac44-726b7c0ad0d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2. **What 's being sold**
The winning bidder pays the past-due taxes, fees and costs. In return they get a **tax lien** (a certificate interest) and the right to a deed later if the owner doesn't redeem in time. The lien bears statutory interest, and it can be enforced; the deed comes only if the owner doesn't redeem. [Justia](https://substack.com/redirect/67c7828b-8e1f-4046-a512-b2fa04bba337?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
3. **Required public notice before the sale**
The tax collector must **advertise the list of properties** to be sold for **two weeks** in a qualifying newspaper (or as otherwise allowed) before the sale. [Justia](https://substack.com/redirect/042d993a-0581-4286-a88b-1ef63a0dc49e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
4. **How bidding works (important for investors)**
Mississippi uses a **premium-bid** auction: bidders bid **up from** the face amount (taxes + fees). Only the **face amount** earns the statutory return; any **overbid/premium does not earn interest and is not reimbursed** if the owner redeems--so overbidding can lose you money. [govease.helpscoutdocs.com](https://substack.com/redirect/4681f011-4c2b-47cc-b4da-6d05bfebb29a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [Alcorn County -](https://substack.com/redirect/2d490b02-b614-496f-b2c0-e7df6ac67f72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
5. **Owner 's right to redeem (the "cool-down" period)**
The owner (or an interested party) can **redeem within two years** from the sale by paying the chancery clerk:
• all taxes sold, **plus 5% statutory damages** ,
• **1.5% interest per month** on the taxes and costs (fractional months count), and
• any additional costs accrued.
This is **" regardless of the amount of the purchaser's bid,"** i.e., premiums don't factor into what the owner must repay. [Justia](https://substack.com/redirect/61e701f7-5976-4873-a429-d0c201878103?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Counties commonly explain it this way, too (two years; 1.5%/month). [co.jackson.ms.us](https://substack.com/redirect/10744072-027c-4116-8cbe-c7cb7539d229?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
6. **Current and oldest taxes**
To redeem, the owner generally must clear **oldest delinquencies first** , and current-year taxes that accrued since the sale must also be paid on the portion being redeemed. [co.jackson.ms.us](https://substack.com/redirect/10744072-027c-4116-8cbe-c7cb7539d229?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [Delta State University](https://substack.com/redirect/aaaaf3f5-5b47-4a9f-8406-db538028b5ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
7. **Mandatory "maturing" notices before the deadline**
Between **180 and 60 days** before the 2-year period ends, the **chancery clerk must send statutory notices** to the record owner (and lienholders) per Chapter 43. Mistakes here can void a sale, which is why clerks are meticulous. [Justia](https://substack.com/redirect/1e021920-89c4-405f-b10c-62e7ff110821?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
8. **If the owner does not redeem**
After the two years run, the purchaser may **demand a tax deed** from the chancery clerk. Many buyers then pursue a quiet-title action to insure/market the property, but the deed itself is issued by statute. [Justia](https://substack.com/redirect/e7619926-5a5a-46b1-905d-ccc0d31c2b0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
9. **If nobody bids at the sale**
The parcel is "**struck off to the State**." If it still isn't redeemed, it matures into **tax-forfeited lands** managed and resold by the Mississippi Secretary of State. [Justia](https://substack.com/redirect/c3e48f22-d898-4344-8206-bf3b23106586?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [Mississippi Secretary of State](https://substack.com/redirect/63b938e9-d56d-4acf-8260-b56e00699ca1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: Property taxes are government rent with a nice label. You can spend your life paying off a mortgage, maintain your place, raise your family there--and still lose it if you can't keep up with the annual bill. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Sep 4 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Property taxes are government rent with a nice label. You can spend your life paying off a mortgage, maintain your place, raise your family there--and still lose it if you can't keep up with the annual bill. That isn't ownership. It's a perpetual lease from the state, and the yearly tax sale is the proof. Every year, counties auction off liens on properties with unpaid taxes. The county gets its money now; the bidder gets a certificate and interest; the owner gets a clock that starts ticking. If the owner pays everything plus penalties and interest, they keep the home. If not, the government ultimately hands a deed to someone else. That's not a community taking care of its own--that's a system designed to remind you who's really in charge. I've participated in these auctions. I've purchased--more accurately, paid the delinquent taxes on--three properties. All three owners redeemed, and I received my investment plus interest. On paper, that's the system "working." But what did it require? Neighbors paying a premium just to keep what was already theirs. Families scrambling to meet a deadline because the county needed cash. That isn't stewardship; it's coercion dressed up as process. Property taxes are destructive because they separate ownership from security. You never reach the finish line. Seniors on fixed incomes don't "age out" of the tax man. Young families don't get breathing room while trying to build a future. And the government's appetite grows because it can. Assessments rise, millage creeps, and your "equity" becomes collateral for somebody else's budget. Supporters say property taxes fund "essential services." I support roads, deputies, and schools. But the way we fund them matters. If the only way government can provide services is by putting a lien on your home and threatening an auction if you fall behind, then the model is broken. In a free society, your home should be your castle--not the county's piggy bank. There's a better path. Phase out property taxes and replace them with transparent, voter-approved consumption-based revenue. Put real caps on local spending growth. Require every significant increase to go to the ballot--no more backdoor hikes through reassessments and jargon. End the annual auction ritual. If government must collect, do it without hanging a sale notice over a family's front door. Some will say this is unrealistic. What's unrealistic is pretending people truly "own" their homes while a tax bill can take it away. What's unrealistic is calling it "local control" when a household's fate depends on an interest rate and a deadline. We can fund what's necessary without threatening the most important piece of wealth most families will ever own. If you're tired of living under a permanent rent to government, make some noise. Tell your supervisors you won't accept millage increases. Tell your legislators to prioritize eliminating property taxes and replacing them with a fairer, more honest system. Real ownership means you're secure in your home--without the county holding the keys. Want more? Here is a breakdown of the details on how Mississippi counties run one big sale each year to collect delinquent property taxes. The basics (for owners and bidders) 1. When the sale happens By statute, counties hold the annual land tax sale on the last Monday in August (some may optionally do an additional sale the first Monday in April). Many counties now run it online. Example county notice: DeSoto County explicitly sets its tax sale for the last Monday in August and uses online bidding. 2. What 's being sold The winning bidder pays the past-due taxes, fees and costs. In return they get a tax lien (a certificate interest) and the right to a deed later if the owner doesn't redeem in time. The lien bears statutory interest, and it can be enforced; the deed comes only if the owner doesn't redeem. 3. Required public notice before the sale The tax collector must advertise the list of properties to be sold for two weeks in a qualifying newspaper (or as otherwise allowed) before the sale. 4. How bidding works (important for investors) Mississippi uses a premium-bid auction: bidders bid up from the face amount (taxes + fees). Only the face amount earns the statutory return; any overbid/premium does not earn interest and is not reimbursed if the owner redeems--so overbidding can lose you money. 5. Owner 's right to redeem (the "cool-down" period) The owner (or an interested party) can redeem within two years from the sale by paying the chancery clerk: • all taxes sold, plus 5% statutory damages , • 1.5% interest per month on the taxes and costs (fractional months count), and • any additional costs accrued. This is " regardless of the amount of the purchaser's bid," i.e., premiums don't factor into what the owner must repay. Counties commonly explain it this way, too (two years; 1.5%/month). 6. Current and oldest taxes To redeem, the owner generally must clear oldest delinquencies first , and current-year taxes that accrued since the sale must also be paid on the portion being redeemed. 7. Mandatory "maturing" notices before the deadline Between 180 and 60 days before the 2-year period ends, the chancery clerk must send statutory notices to the record owner (and lienholders) per Chapter 43. Mistakes here can void a sale, which is why clerks are meticulous. 8. If the owner does not redeem After the two years run, the purchaser may demand a tax deed from the chancery clerk. Many buyers then pursue a quiet-title action to insure/market the property, but the deed itself is issued by statute. 9. If nobody bids at the sale The parcel is "struck off to the State." If it still isn't redeemed, it matures into tax-forfeited lands managed and resold by the Mississippi Secretary of State. Democrats are fighting back. They're calling on CA lawmakers to redraw the state's congressional map to fight against the GOP’s gerrymandering scheme. The GOP knows that their agenda is deeply unpopular, that’s why they're trying to rig the maps because they know we have what it takes to defeat them. name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Minnesota could flip red
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlljedel6ujbb9m7r3urms6jdvbkurp6s9f6pav8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpi5so9rl9cvobthhq469ku8umpl5p80v82dmolo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs1dom1l1jb989mdubusivrpbq055sl83q8khclg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlhu6omrpf7rsl9ih4u8lhnhrdj1egqjfnqsj3i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)_**

---
[DONATE $25](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlhr0qbnhqvdma4h45t43uqob346qj2qdbcubh88_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
[DONATE $50](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhgkjkselde567r8l4tq7q8nd52o1s84c1oqh550_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
[DONATE $100](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc57frjafrnoerrt12e1ebvicpvdjd6lq27trhj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4dl09kkg6b7j48fi485nd7vru4a8ks9idbumcu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9g75angdlsr9rlnr7707us496ds198vo76m9o48_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5n2b9u6mmisv45ip8cqiveobvgot1fg1jsdd6mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaoeu9mr0rso57q74ov5mtkmgac6ssornqaaj4jg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4k9917jk0o7m3gdc66pfb36ofgq07s1fcei1qn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
_[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6ppnjgotev5jtjcallvl4962sndfvfaii0riljo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g6aoj2c1h2bs)_
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

clean_body: Here’s how we make it happen | | | | | | Friend, I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda. | | Walz’s record is a warning for America: higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies. If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states. I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it. From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. I’m ready to take it on. This race isn’t just about Minnesota. It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state. But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now. If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget. | | Thank you for standing with me in this fight. Sincerely, Kendall Qualls Candidate for Governor of Minnesota | | | My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school. I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit. Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation. We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities. That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. With gratitude,Kendall Qualls | | | | | The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts. When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go. Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together. | | | | Prepared and paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082 | | **The appearance of Kendall Qualls in military uniform does not imply or constitute endorsement by the U.S. Army or U.S. Department of Defense. subject: Robocall wars
body:
We all agree on this

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9qZWZmamFja3Nvbm5jLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.66_93ZR3HJ9uUNm-XIYjsIqWt0Q_Pzo-_dWFIq_6FqU?) for more

# [Robocall wars](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=172694560&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNjk0NTYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5OTM2NDgsImV4cCI6MTc1OTU4NTY0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jpMJkNXc476VIkDSlS4gnaOKwD-KaE-dx-usaDvgsDA)
### We all agree on this
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Sep 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=172694560&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNjk0NTYwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Njk5MzY0OCwiZXhwIjoxNzU5NTg1NjQ4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.shSFob_ZXs4Kg-rkm0u0sWA4rjRs2fAWqCCkfQ4wD8U&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=172694560&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNjk0NTYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5OTM2NDgsImV4cCI6MTc1OTU4NTY0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jpMJkNXc476VIkDSlS4gnaOKwD-KaE-dx-usaDvgsDA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=172694560&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNjk0NTYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5OTM2NDgsImV4cCI6MTc1OTU4NTY0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jpMJkNXc476VIkDSlS4gnaOKwD-KaE-dx-usaDvgsDA)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamVmZmphY2tzb25uYy9wL3JvYm9jYWxsLXdhcnM_.28xdAtoLisI2pSsf7VpykCBeTnnd8LVGALBxdBwox0I?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/robocall-wars?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Lots to tell you. All good stuff.
Let's start here:
* * *
### **Robocall crackdown**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8983c32b-2109-447a-8c1c-741ade21fa1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When I became AG, I told my team we were going to get more aggressive on robocalls.
Why?
_Because you told me to._
Everybody hates these things, and we're getting more than ever. NC is a top five state for robocalls. We get about 200 million a month. It's absurd.
So we've broadened our target list. We'll still go after the folks making the robocalls, but now we've added the telecom companies that are _patching them through_.
Here's why:
The average call to you passes through about six telecom companies - the last one being the one that sends you a bill each month. Each company in this chain has a legal obligation to help block illegal robocalls.
But some of them look the other way to make a few extra bucks.
So we just sent formal notice to 37 of those middleman companies. They've got three weeks to clean up their act.
Here's the **[video](https://substack.com/redirect/fe995691-6042-408e-b152-c479dcee4b4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** I posted calling them out by name:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/06b3885b-ed7c-40d4-a4a8-95c990313a9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
They say that we've never been more politically divided than we are today, but when it comes to robocalls, we all pretty much agree: the fewer, the better.
More from that battlefront soon.
### _**New York Times**_**profile**
Two months ago, _The_ _New York Times_ sent a reporter and photographer to spend the day with me. They sat in on meetings, traveled with me around town, and did a long interview in my office.
Honestly, it was less awkward than I expected. You'd be amazed how quickly you forget there's a reporter in the room - which is exactly what they're hoping for. The only reminder came from the photographer, as he jostled around and snapped a thousand photos.
Now the article's out, and here's a **[gift link](https://substack.com/redirect/efed9190-8819-469f-a083-56cc3d2830f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to it:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/36d6ad9a-9fc3-4940-973d-5f6599f3bfbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: Cornell Watson for _The New York Times_
The piece turned out well because our team at NCDOJ is so strong. I'm proud to be part of it, but I'm not most of it. We've just got some great people working here, and I'm grateful for them.
### **And ... he hit the shot**
For some of you, I'm burying the lede.
In the last email, I left you with a brutal cliffhanger. Presented with a photo of me uneasily about to shoot a basketball, I asked you to place your bets (by way of contribution to our Lighthouse Fund) about whether I nailed it... or whether I air-balled.
Well, here's the proof:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/827007c0-1949-4824-8fce-1819c6e85cca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In case your computer doesn't like GIFs, it shows me making the shot. Believe me, I was as surprised as anyone.
For the record, roughly 88% of you guessed correctly.
And for the 12% who thought I missed it, hey, I get it. A sensible bet.
If you missed your chance to bet but can still make a small contribution, that's very kind. You can do that **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/2cf93b85-62b9-4d26-9beb-191268bcc9c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (ActBlue) or **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ef918e-1221-4728-af35-63c306ff2de7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (non-ActBlue).
Best,
Jeff

_Some may see that as a challenge, but I see an incredible opportunity._ As the Democratic nominee in Virginia, the only state where we can flip a governorship this year, I won't settle for a modest victory. I want to win big, and I want to set an example for Democrats in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
But my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has lined up far-right groups to foot the bill for attack ads across our Commonwealth.
So, I need your help to respond: _Will you help us keep our own ads on the air?_

And he says he got the idea straight from Vladimir Putin, who told him that: _**“your election was rigged because you have mail-in voting.”**_ It’s as outrageous as it is dangerous. Trump is already rewriting election rules, intimidating officials, and pardoning those who tried to overturn the 2020 election. And unlike last time, the safeguards that stopped him at the federal level – career civil servants, the Justice Department – are gone. Make no mistake: the fight for democracy will come down to the Secretaries of State, along with state and local leaders, who run our elections and certify every vote. And like 2020, it will come down to what happens in the courtroom, too. **That’s why we created the DASS Legal Fund – to give Democratic Secretaries of State and their teams the resources they need to defend voters, fight back against bogus GOP lawsuits, and protect every ballot.** [**But we can’t do it without you. name: ICYMI News
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson Dueling Populisms
body:
Populism is a word often used to describe emerging political trends around the world.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8gqhsblm19irvlvllbpuobf1kkim9tvi9ds065g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g61o70cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,Populism is a word often used to describe emerging political trends around the world. But populism isn't just a modern phenomenon -- it goes back centuries.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znjb4up8fb3et9s1hvk008g7jijenbhktlbvsbe8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g61o70cjh2bs)
---
| | Traditionally described as a battle between Left and Right, political differences are actually far more complex. What we are witnessing today are two distinct populist movements challenging party establishments across the West. Remarkably, these tensions can be traced all the way back to Roman times.

This is why I'm reaching out to you today. I want to offer you a free copy of one of our most insightful eBooks: **Dueling Populisms** by Victor Davis Hanson. Hanson, a Hoover Senior Fellow and acclaimed historian, provides a unique perspective that I believe you'll find incredibly valuable.

In **Dueling Populisms** you'll discover:
* What to expect from a political landscape dominated by movements that oppose both the establishment and each other.
* The striking similarities between ancient populist movements and today's progressive and conservative populisms.
* Insights into what the future holds for America as we navigate these revived ancient tensions in our modern culture.

This eBook is especially relevant as we face increasing political polarization and try to anticipate and understand election outcomes. By understanding the historical context of these populist movements, you'll gain a clearer view of our current environment and the potential paths forward. Hanson's expertise will help you see beyond the surface of today's political debates and grasp the deeper currents at play.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to deepen your understanding of today's political dynamics. Get your free copy of **Dueling Populisms** using this secure link: [Get Your Free eBook](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ec1mt2per2j4mnt33vh85iopkghekge2girpi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g61o70cjh2bs)

I hope that it helps equip you to understand and participate in the civic discourse in the coming months.
Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Chairman Tim Scott
subject: A personal invitation from me for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I can only hold your spot until midnight tonight.

I'm not going to waste your time, Friend.

I'm assembling an elite group of Patriots, poised to defend our Senate Majority, and I want YOU to be a leading force in this mission.

name: American Action News
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson Dueling Populisms
body:
Populism is a word often used to describe emerging political trends around the world.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9tlt6ku6idhcuvg7si8f2okf9uajjvm0ffm8adg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g69pr4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,Populism is a word often used to describe emerging political trends around the world. But populism isn't just a modern phenomenon -- it goes back centuries.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdbpqcec23stl0rpr9so290hvh1hicut9qa3k5uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g69pr4clh2bs)
---
| | Traditionally described as a battle between Left and Right, political differences are actually far more complex. What we are witnessing today are two distinct populist movements challenging party establishments across the West. Remarkably, these tensions can be traced all the way back to Roman times.

This is why I'm reaching out to you today. I want to offer you a free copy of one of our most insightful eBooks: **Dueling Populisms** by Victor Davis Hanson. Hanson, a Hoover Senior Fellow and acclaimed historian, provides a unique perspective that I believe you'll find incredibly valuable.

In **Dueling Populisms** you'll discover:
* What to expect from a political landscape dominated by movements that oppose both the establishment and each other.
* The striking similarities between ancient populist movements and today's progressive and conservative populisms.
* Insights into what the future holds for America as we navigate these revived ancient tensions in our modern culture.

This eBook is especially relevant as we face increasing political polarization and try to anticipate and understand election outcomes. By understanding the historical context of these populist movements, you'll gain a clearer view of our current environment and the potential paths forward. Hanson's expertise will help you see beyond the surface of today's political debates and grasp the deeper currents at play.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to deepen your understanding of today's political dynamics. Get your free copy of **Dueling Populisms** using this secure link: [Get Your Free eBook](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20973srkgtj1ffkpm9a4n0pb2981t92bnmab33g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1g69pr4clh2bs)

I hope that it helps equip you to understand and participate in the civic discourse in the coming months.
Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

---

Don't miss out on this opportunity to deepen your understanding of today's political dynamics. Get your free copy of Dueling Populisms** using this secure link: I hope that it helps equip you to understand and participate in the civic discourse in the coming months. Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. | |

It has been ten years in the making, but the day has finally come! | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY0NjIyMzg4Nzk0NzU0MTM2LFwiclwiOjE2NDYyMjQyNTUwMjI1NDY2MX0iLCJzIjoiMjI1OTBhMGEyM2FjY2FlNiJ9)

---
|
---
Peter, It has been ten years in the making, but the day has finally come! The Department of State Health Services has posted [a link](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY0NjIyMzg4ODExNTMxMzYxLFwiclwiOjE2NDYyMjQyNTUwMjI1NDY2MX0iLCJzIjoiNjNjNDU3MWIxMzRjZmRhMCJ9) to the **NEW printable exemption affidavit** , allowing parents and college students to easily access and submit this form - no wait time, no taxpayer funds wasted on postage, no limit to the number of affidavits you can have on hand, and no state-level tracking of exemption requests.
**This has been a goal for TFVC since our inception in 2015, and this update marks a huge win for medical liberty. **
In addition to a new exemption affidavit form, the DSHS website clarifies that _all_ college and university students, including those completing coursework related to **healthcare or veterinary care** , have a right to use this form to exempt themselves from any vaccination requirements.********

|
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY0NjIyMzg4ODIwOTY4NTQ4LFwiclwiOjE2NDYyMjQyNTUwMjI1NDY2MX0iLCJzIjoiOGMyNTVmN2QyOTA5ZDYxMyJ9)
---
|
---
To use this form, just click on the [link](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY0NjIyMzg4ODMyNTAyODg4LFwiclwiOjE2NDYyMjQyNTUwMjI1NDY2MX0iLCJzIjoiZmVmMWFiODZiNTBkMTNmZiJ9), print the affidavit, and manually fill in parts **(A)** and **(B)** **_only_**. Part **(D)** must be completed in the presence of a notary public. Once notarized, turn in the form to the appropriate entity, i.e. your child’s daycare or middle school. Affidavits are still valid for two years from the date of notarization. You and your notary may also find our handy [How-To](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY0NjIyMzg4ODQxOTQwMDc5LFwiclwiOjE2NDYyMjQyNTUwMjI1NDY2MX0iLCJzIjoiNDAxZDRhYTMyYzgzZWYyYSJ9) helpful.

| | | [ ****TFVC's Updated Enrollment FAQs**** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY0NjIyMzg4ODUyNDI1ODQ2LFwiclwiOjE2NDYyMjQyNTUwMjI1NDY2MX0iLCJzIjoiYThjYjc1YTQxYmIxYjVmYSJ9)

clean_body: | | It has been ten years in the making, but the day has finally come! | | | | | | Peter, It has been ten years in the making, but the day has finally come! The Department of State Health Services has posted to the NEW printable exemption affidavit , allowing parents and college students to easily access and submit this form - no wait time, no taxpayer funds wasted on postage, no limit to the number of affidavits you can have on hand, and no state-level tracking of exemption requests. This has been a goal for TFVC since our inception in 2015, and this update marks a huge win for medical liberty. In addition to a new exemption affidavit form, the DSHS website clarifies that all college and university students, including those completing coursework related to healthcare or veterinary care , have a right to use this form to exempt themselves from any vaccination requirements.****** | | | To use this form, just click on the , print the affidavit, and manually fill in parts (A) and (B) only. Part (D) must be completed in the presence of a notary public. Once notarized, turn in the form to the appropriate entity, i.e. your child’s daycare or middle school. Affidavits are still valid for two years from the date of notarization. You and your notary may also find our handy helpful. | | | | While this is a major victory, it is not the end of our battle for medical liberty. TFVC will continue to fight for your right to accept or decline a vaccine for any reason without any coercion or state interference. We envision a future in Texas where we no longer have to submit paperwork to exercise our right to make medical decisions for ourselves or our children. Donate now to support us as we continue to fight for your medical freedoms! | | | | | | | Gratefully, Rebecca Hardy President, TFVC** ---|---|--- | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up or made a purchase from us. |

When you support Her Bold Move, you are supporting an incredible slate of fearless, progressive women candidates who are working to chip away at the male supermajorities in government that are costing women their lives. Hi Peter,

Safe places to give birth are becoming more and more scarce.

Between 2010 and 2022, over 500 US hospitals closed their obstetrics units, and 50% of ALL rural counties now lack hospital-based labor and delivery care. In fact,**1 in 3 counties have no OB/GYN at all.**

An analysis by the _National Partnership for Women and Families_ found that, after Trump signed his so-called Big Beautiful Bill, which strips away access to healthcare for millions of people, **150 more rural maternity units are at risk of closing.**

**When you consider what this actually means for millions of American women – who are already dealing with deadly assaults to their reproductive healthcare needs – this is horrifying.**

[**Too often, women in these rural, red districts are left behind by institutional Democratic support. We are working to get them the essential help they need by supporting women running for office in their parts of the country. Join us in this fight by rushing $25 today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250904Fwd_N_EH_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=25)

At Her Bold Move, this hits close to home for us for many reasons. When we interview candidates for endorsements, we always ask candidates to name a major issue impacting the women of their districts. Countless candidates list maternal care deserts as one of the top issues. This often leads to emotional conversations as they talk about what they’re seeing on the ground in their corners of America.

When rural hospitals shut down, women are often left with _NOWHERE_ TO SAFELY GIVE BIRTH, or even worse, with crisis pregnancy centers – which are dangerous places designed to provide women with misinformation and to scare and shame them out of obtaining an abortion.

Aftyn Behn, D-Nashville, stands at her desk during a legislative session Tuesday, April 23, 2024, when the Underage Abortion Trafficking Act, a law criminalizing adults who "intentionally recruit, harbor, or transport" an unemancipated minor to get an abortion without notarized parental consent, passed in the majority-male TN legislature 74-24. Behn filed suit against the law. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Aftyn Behn: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = For the past 8 years, Aftyn Behn has been organizing in rural and small-town communities. She is an advocate for women and a national expert in rural voter engagement. Now she is running in the special election for U.S. Congress in Tennessee, District 7. Aftyn is a phenomenal example of what we stand for at Her Bold Move. While too many organizations are running away from abortion ban states, we understand our responsibility to run towards them. We know that the women in those states are living under dangerous conditions, and the ONLY way to solve that is by increasing the amount of women they have representing them in government. When you support Her Bold Move, you are supporting an incredible slate of fearless, progressive women candidates who are working to chip away at the male supermajorities in government that are costing women their lives. We are thrilled to be supporting Aftyn in her special election, but we need your help. Aftyn is the only woman running in a crowded Democratic primary. The men in her primary are simply not strong advocates for the women in Southern states, for whom the situation is dire. Together, Erica Henry Senior Political Advisor Her Bold Move \----------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, Safe places to give birth are becoming more and more scarce. Between 2010 and 2022, over 500 US hospitals closed their obstetrics units, and 50% of ALL rural counties now lack hospital-based labor and delivery care. In fact,1 in 3 counties have no OB/GYN at all. An analysis by the National Partnership for Women and Families found that, after Trump signed his so-called Big Beautiful Bill, which strips away access to healthcare for millions of people, 150 more rural maternity units are at risk of closing. When you consider what this actually means for millions of American women – who are already dealing with deadly assaults to their reproductive healthcare needs – this is horrifying. At Her Bold Move, this hits close to home for us for many reasons. When we interview candidates for endorsements, we always ask candidates to name a major issue impacting the women of their districts. Countless candidates list maternal care deserts as one of the top issues. This often leads to emotional conversations as they talk about what they’re seeing on the ground in their corners of America. When rural hospitals shut down, women are often left with NOWHERE TO SAFELY GIVE BIRTH, or even worse, with crisis pregnancy centers – which are dangerous places designed to provide women with misinformation and to scare and shame them out of obtaining an abortion. = We are fighting back: If you want to support women running for office in rural America, Her Bold Move is the place to do that. Our candidates are consistently working on this issue, and we are proud to be supporting women running for office in red and purple states alike. In fact, last cycle, 44% of Her Bold Move VICTORIES came out of Red States. # Farage fights back!
