# [NASA to put nuclear reactor on the moon [LIBERALS FURIOUS]](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Trump has ordered NASA to put a nuclear reactor on the moon by 2030...
And of course, liberals are laughing.
Just like they laughed at **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Of all the "conspiracy" theories surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **may be the most shocking. But it's far from a "conspiracy"... no, it's very real.
And **[lost NASA in-flight recordings](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** are now proving it. They've kept **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** secret for decades and they'll do everything in their power to stop it from getting out
But you can **[click here now](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to finally get the truth.
P.S. After decades of secrets, the FULL truth about the Apollo moon landings is finally being exposed in **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/736dba35-e7ea-4c75-bb27-f1df7e2066c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Watch it now while it's still available.

# War on Cartel Terrorists! - Marines kill 11 cartel members in naval strike
U.S. Marines conducted an unprecedented strike on a Tren de Aragua cartel vessel off Venezuela, **[killing 11 members of the organization](https://substack.com/redirect/c1dde948-b2dc-43a1-ab4f-41e01e0cf2ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Trump designated as a terrorist group, representing a shift from traditional "seize and apprehend" operations to lethal force.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1dde948-b2dc-43a1-ab4f-41e01e0cf2ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **"Gloves Are Off" Approach:** Secretary of State Marco Rubio declared the U.S. will "wage war on narco-terrorist organizations," arguing that previous seizure methods don't work because cartels simply factor losing 2% of cargo into their business model, while lethal strikes will actually deter them.
* **Maduro's Response:** Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro accused the U.S. of seeking regime change through military threats, calling the naval buildup "the biggest threat that has been seen on our continent in the last 100 years," though experts remain skeptical that regime change is the primary objective.
* **International Implications:** Former Venezuelan diplomat Isaias Medina described the strike as a "turning point" against international organized crime, noting that "safe harbors in international waters are no longer sanctuaries for traffickers," while experts view it as an extension of Trump's anti-Maduro policies rather than preparation for regime change.

* * *
# Tim Walz makes fool of himself again - Wishing for Trump's health decline
Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz faced criticism for remarks at a Labor Day picnic in Duluth where he referenced online conspiracy theories about Trump's health, saying "you woke up thinking there might be news" and **["there will be news sometime,"](https://substack.com/redirect/ddb1d796-ec26-402b-a7b9-4436e326da99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** which many interpreted as a wish for Trump's death.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4bda86b5-5229-47bc-9cd4-e2acd0093d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Republican Backlash:** GOP officials including House Majority Whip Tom Emmer and Rep. Pete Stauber condemned Walz's comments, with Emmer stating that "wishing ill on others doesn't make you a leader--it makes you small" and criticizing the timing given recent assassination attempts against Trump.
* **Social Media Criticism:** Conservative influencers and commentators amplified the controversy on social media, with some calling Walz's remarks "vile" and "disgusting," particularly given the recent Catholic school shooting in Minneapolis that occurred in his state.
* **Context:** Walz has emerged as a vocal Trump critic since the 2024 election, previously calling for Democrats to "bully the s***" out of Trump, while Trump himself moved to dispel health rumors by stating he was "very active" over Labor Day weekend.

* * *
# Family of murdered Chicago teen calls Trump to send in National Guard -
## "If Mr. Trump wants to bring these troops to Chicago, hey, bring them on."
Chicago resident Marquita Salley's 16-year-old son Gregory Bernard Wilson III was shot and killed in an alley behind their Chicago South Side home in March 2023, with the suspect now in jail awaiting trial on September 18th. Now she is **[calling for the National Guard](https://substack.com/redirect/6394acee-cc38-4fbf-9749-1cc918fb7e0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to clean up the city.
* **Deteriorating Safety:** Both Salley, 41, and her mother Gaynelle Simmons, 61, described how Chicago's South Side has become significantly more dangerous since their youth, when children could safely walk the streets and play outside until streetlights came on.
* **Current Crime Crisis:** Over Labor Day weekend alone, Chicago experienced at least 32 shootings that left eight dead and dozens wounded, exemplifying the ongoing violence that has residents afraid to use public transportation, walk alone, or let children play outside.
* **Support for Federal Intervention:** While Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker opposes Trump administration offers to deploy National Guard troops, Simmons welcomes the idea, saying communities have "nothing to lose" and need a visible presence to deter violence and protect residents who are currently living in fear.
"If Mr. Trump wants to bring these troops to Chicago, hey, bring them on. What have we got to lose? You know what I'm saying? I don't want them to get out here and shoot our kids or nothing like that, but be a presence... put some fear in them. Let them know that they're here, and they want to protect the city of Chicago," Simmons said.

name: President Obama
subject: This undermines our democracy itself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need you to be part of the effort to fight back.
|
---

Peter, what’s happening in Texas right now demands our attention.
What we’re witnessing right now is a power grab. Politicians are gerrymandering district lines in order to unfairly pick their voters instead of the other way around.
These folks are going out of their way to silence the will of the people, and deliberately undermine our democracy.
**But let’s be clear:** the American people have the power to stop it. But it depends on how much each of us are willing to stand up for the democratic ideals and principles that generations of Americans fought for. If we care about them as deeply as we claim to, then we are going to have to step up.
That’s exactly why Eric Holder and I started All On The Line. This grassroots movement is using every tool at its disposal to defend democracy in Texas and anywhere else we need to be. The other day, I got a chance to speak to the Texas lawmakers who left the state to help highlight how brazen and cynical this mid-decade redistricting is. I told them I could not be prouder of what they had done to help focus the attention of the nation on this issue.
We can’t lose focus on what matters. This isn’t just about the politicians trying to game the system. It’s about who gets hurt in the process. It's about making sure we protect the voices – and the votes – of the American people.
By definition, gerrymandering comes at the expense of voters. Politicians deploy “cracking and packing” strategies to chop up the electorate so they can maximize the number of districts they think they can control. And when this happens, it ends up diluting the voting power of communities of color. Right now, some people in Washington, D.C., want to go even further — changing the rules of the census in violation of the Constitution to purposely undercount minority populations so they can aggressively redraw district maps across the country.
We need you to be part of the effort to fight back. Speak out, talk to your friends, make sure people know what’s at stake. If we don’t respond effectively, then the politicians behind these power grabs won’t stop in Texas. They do not appear to believe in this idea of an inclusive, expansive democracy. They want to restrict it, and they’re not that shy about saying so.
[**This is a moment for us to come together and make sure no one gets away with attacking the foundations of our democracy. Will you join us and help support this work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114596175/567531409/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ObamaAugNOR_email_20250903-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR-BHO_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250903-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR-BHO_&utm_campaign=ObamaAugNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiNTg0MGE2LTliODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1VjRBMRf6E29fncYEOf7SN3ebp9MZLr00d7hHd2NMh0=)
Thank you,
Barack Obama

name: First Look News
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson Dueling Populisms
body:
Populism is a word often used to describe emerging political trends around the world.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zue6e1v16ji1v34mkunu73r68bd002pbqddd0cm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i60or4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,Populism is a word often used to describe emerging political trends around the world. But populism isn't just a modern phenomenon -- it goes back centuries.
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztbcq57qcb0kobsdagg6ku40d0fna252tvvatmv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i60or4chh2bs)
---
| | Traditionally described as a battle between Left and Right, political differences are actually far more complex. What we are witnessing today are two distinct populist movements challenging party establishments across the West. Remarkably, these tensions can be traced all the way back to Roman times.

This is why I'm reaching out to you today. I want to offer you a free copy of one of our most insightful eBooks: **Dueling Populisms** by Victor Davis Hanson. Hanson, a Hoover Senior Fellow and acclaimed historian, provides a unique perspective that I believe you'll find incredibly valuable.

In **Dueling Populisms** you'll discover:
* What to expect from a political landscape dominated by movements that oppose both the establishment and each other.
* The striking similarities between ancient populist movements and today's progressive and conservative populisms.
* Insights into what the future holds for America as we navigate these revived ancient tensions in our modern culture.

This eBook is especially relevant as we face increasing political polarization and try to anticipate and understand election outcomes. By understanding the historical context of these populist movements, you'll gain a clearer view of our current environment and the potential paths forward. Hanson's expertise will help you see beyond the surface of today's political debates and grasp the deeper currents at play.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to deepen your understanding of today's political dynamics. Get your free copy of **Dueling Populisms** using this secure link: [Get Your Free eBook](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4hgjjhaue21adum17u11pisubrcjj3c6dlf0uvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i60or4chh2bs)

I hope that it helps equip you to understand and participate in the civic discourse in the coming months.
Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

They tried to take me out with hoaxes, witch hunts, and even assassination attempts, but I’m still here, and I WILL NEVER SURRENDER.
It’s people like you that keep me going. Seriously!

clean_body: I’m very much alive and stronger than ever before! Democrats were praying for my death, so here’s my response to the fake news! | | | | I'M ALIVE! Friend, The fake news media and the radical left tried to spread LIES, saying your favorite President, Donald J. Trump, was dead or sick. Can you believe it? DISGRACEFUL! Let me tell you something, I’m more alive than ever! They say I wasn’t around for a couple of days, and suddenly they’re writing my obituary? Meanwhile, Crooked Joe Biden could disappear for months, and the media wouldn’t say a word. SAD! Complete and Total FAKE NEWS! These rumors are just another desperate attack from the failing left who can’t stand that we’re WINNING and bigly! They tried to take me out with hoaxes, witch hunts, and even assassination attempts, but I’m still here, and I WILL NEVER SURRENDER. It’s people like you that keep me going. Seriously! I’m going to list some names that donated to me to show my appreciation, and you might show up in my next email if you donate too: $20 from Marylee in Indiana. $5 from Pete in Georgia. $1 from Richard in Pennsylvania. $47 from Scott in Texas. $100 from Susan in Florida. $500 from Sonja in South Carolina. It truly does mean the world to me to have so many people give their hard-earned dollars to our MAGA Movement, BUT I NEED YOUR HELP TO KEEP THE MOMENTUM GOING BEFORE THE DEMOCRATS LAUNCH ANOTHER HOAX THAT I’M DEAD! The radical left will stop at nothing to derail us, so that’s why Together, we’ll send a message that the American people are with me, and we’ll NEVER SURRENDER! Please chip in what you can before midnight, and let’s show them what MAGA IS MADE OF! Thank you! \- DJT | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate authorized’s committee. . | | P.O. BOX 13570 ARLINGTON, VA 22219 Click here to change your subscription status.

name: Anika Page
subject: Don’t Miss Lord Daniel Hannan—Flying in from the UK to Jackson!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/hannanevent-12849881?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
This is it—the moment you’ve been waiting for! **Lord Daniel Hannan** , one of the sharpest conservative minds in the world, is **personally flying in from the United Kingdom** to speak in **Jackson, Mississippi** —and you can be in the room. He’s coming to share his unique perspective on how the **United States can lead the world without paying for everything** , giving insights you won’t get anywhere else. This is a rare opportunity to hear from someone who has shaped global policy and played a key role in Brexit. **Event Details:**
* **Date:** September 24, 2025
* **Time:** 11:30 AM
* **Location:** River Hills Country Club, Jackson, MS

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=006608f30c&e=5703353baa)
---
_You can purchase tickets by clicking the photo above!_
| **Why you can’t miss this:**
* Experience an international perspective on American leadership—Lord Hannan has lived it, studied it, and influenced it.
* Network with local leaders, thinkers, and professionals in a one-of-a-kind, intimate setting.
* Hear exclusive insights on global politics and America’s role in the world—ideas that could shape your thinking for years to come.

Tickets are disappearing fast, and once they’re gone, this is your **last chance** to join this incredible event. Don't miss out!
---
| [Purchase Tickets Here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5c31a50e90&e=5703353baa "Purchase Tickets Here!")

| This is a rare chance. A UK Parliamentarian. Flying in just to speak here. Seats are nearly gone. Act now before it’s too late!

Anika Page
Director of Operations

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Raising our voices this Labor Day / Alzando nuestras voces este Día del Trabajo
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Speaking up for a community benefits agreement that San Antonians deserve
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Tia%20speaking%20at%20Project%20Marvel%20press%20conf.%20Labor%20Day%202025.JPG]
Our team in San Antonio marked Labor Day by joining forces with local allies to demand that a robust community benefits agreement package be in place for Project Marvel — one that includes substantial investments in quality public education, affordable housing initiatives, reliable public transit, and well-paying jobs with fair labor practices.
It's only fair that city officials and developers agree to help with the needs of the community before moving forward with this multi-billion dollar project!
Read more about our press conference with allies. [https://www.ksat.com/news/local/2025/09/01/education-labor-groups-to-hold-press-conference-in-opposition-to-project-marvel/]
Email Megan Joy at mjmacias@organizetexas.org [mjmacias@organizetexas.org] for more information on this latest TOP San Antonio organizing effort and how you can get involved.
Showing solidarity and flexing worker power with labor allies in Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20Unite%20Here%20strike%20Labor%20Day%202025.jpg]
TOP, New Economy for Working Houston (NEW Houston), Organized Power in Numbers (OPIN), and Texas Gulf Coast AFL-CIO hosted a Workers Over Billionaires: Labor Day Celebration at 8th Wonder Brewery in Houston , where frontline workers, union leaders, and community members enjoyed good food and music, while sharing stories of fighting for fair wages, safe workplaces, and dignity on the job.
The celebration coincided with UNITE HERE 23 hotel workers launching a 9-day strike for fair pay. [https://www.hoteldive.com/news/houston-hotel-workers-strike/758963/]
Too many working families are financially scraping by right now, struggling to cover the essentials — like rent, childcare, medication, and groceries — all while billionaires keep getting richer.
As workers, we have to remember that WE collectively have the power to flip the script. Every right we have on the job — weekends, overtime pay, safer work conditions — was won because workers stood together. And our solidarity is only growing.
COMING UP:
Brunch and brainstorm with TOP's probation reform campaign Sept. 27
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Bexar%20County%20Right2Justice.jpg]
Bexar County's probation system CAN and SHOULD be reformed to better serve residents. If you agree, join TOP on Saturday, Sept. 27, from 11 a.m. - 2 p.m. in San Antonio , as we brainstorm over brunch to make local policy changes, so that more residents can successfully complete probation as a rehabilitative experience, allowing them to more freely contribute to the well-being of our families and communities.
Seating is limited, so RSVP today! [https://secure.everyaction.com/JElzt9IXtEaLa0r72CHK_g2]
Our first visioning brunch was a well-attended success, so come be a part of our fight for a local probation system that works fairly for EVERYONE in Bexar County — no matter race, age, gender, or background.
For more event information, email Michael N. at mnachebe@organizetexas.org [mnachebe@organizetexas.org] or Laquita lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Consider scheduling your flu shot soon
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Covid%20booster%20woman%20bandaid.jpg]
Remember: Vaccines remain one of the most effective ways we can keep ourselves and loved ones from facing the brunt of illnesses like the flu. Click here for more information about the state of the flu as autumn approaches, and consider scheduling your shot. [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/02/well/flu-shot-vaccine-cost-side-effects.html]
Español
Defender un acuerdo de beneficios comunitarios que los habitantes de San Antonio merecen
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Tia%20speaking%20at%20Project%20Marvel%20press%20conf.%20Labor%20Day%202025.JPG]
Nuestro equipo en San Antonio conmemoró el Día del Trabajo uniendo fuerzas con aliados locales para exigir la implementación de un sólido acuerdo de beneficios comunitarios para el Proyecto Marvel, que incluya inversiones sustanciales en educación pública de calidad, iniciativas de vivienda asequible, transporte público confiable y empleos bien remunerados con prácticas laborales justas.
¡Es justo que las autoridades de la ciudad y los desarrolladores se comprometan a atender las necesidades de la comunidad antes de iniciar obras en este proyecto de varios miles de millones de dólares!
Lea más sobre nuestra conferencia de prensa con aliados. [https://www.ksat.com/news/local/2025/09/01/education-labor-groups-to-hold-press-conference-in-opposition-to-project-marvel/]
Para obtener más información sobre esta reciente iniciativa de organización de TOP en San Antonio y cómo participar, escriba a Megan Joy a mjmacias@organizetexas.org [mjmacias@organizetexas.org] .
Demostrando solidaridad y ejerciendo el poder de los trabajadores con los aliados laborales en Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20Unite%20Here%20strike%20Labor%20Day%202025.jpg]
TOP, Nueva Economía para los Trabajadores de Houston (NEW Houston), Poder Organizado en Números (OPIN) y la AFL-CIO de la Costa del Golfo de Texas organizaron una celebración del Día del Trabajo "Trabajadores por Sobre los Multimillonarios" en la cervecería 8th Wonder de Houston . Allí, trabajadores de primera línea, líderes sindicales y miembros de la comunidad disfrutaron de buena comida y música, mientras compartían historias de lucha por salarios justos, lugares de trabajo seguros y dignidad laboral.
La celebración coincidió con el inicio de una huelga de 9 días de trabajadores de hoteles de UNITE HERE 23 por un salario justo. [https://www.hoteldive.com/news/houston-hotel-workers-strike/758963/]
Demasiadas familias trabajadoras están pasando apuros económicos en este momento, luchando por cubrir lo esencial —como el alquiler, el cuidado de los niños, los medicamentos y la comida— mientras los multimillonarios se enriquecen cada vez más. Como trabajadores, debemos recordar que, colectivamente, tenemos el poder de cambiar el rumbo. Todos nuestros derechos laborales —fines de semana, pago de horas extras, condiciones laborales más seguras— se ganaron gracias a la unidad de los trabajadores. Y nuestra solidaridad no hace más que crecer.
PRÓXIMAMENTE:
Almuerzo y lluvia de ideas con la campaña de reforma de la libertad condicional de TOP, 27 de sept.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Bexar%20County%20Right2Justice.jpg]
El sistema de libertad condicional del Condado de Bexar PUEDE y DEBE reformarse para servir mejor a los residentes. Si está de acuerdo, únase a TOP el sábado 27 de septiembre, de 11 a.m. a 2 p.m. en San Antonio , donde compartiremos ideas durante un brunch para implementar cambios en las políticas locales y así más residentes puedan completar con éxito la libertad condicional como una experiencia de rehabilitación, permitiéndoles contribuir con mayor libertad al bienestar de nuestras familias y comunidades.
Los asientos son limitados, así que confirma tu asistencia hoy mismo. [https://secure.everyaction.com/JElzt9IXtEaLa0r72CHK_g2]
Nuestro primer brunch visionario fue todo un éxito, así que participe en nuestra lucha por un sistema de libertad condicional local que funcione de manera justa para TODOS en el Condado de Bexar, sin importar raza, edad, género u origen.
Para obtener más información sobre el evento, envíe un correo electrónico a Michael N. a mnachebe@organizetexas.org [mnachebe@organizetexas.org] o a Laquita lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: Considere programar su vacuna contra la gripe pronto
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Covid%20booster%20woman%20bandaid.jpg]
Recuerde: Las vacunas siguen siendo una de las maneras más efectivas de protegernos y proteger a nuestros seres queridos de enfermedades como la gripe. Haga clic aquí para obtener más información sobre la gripe con la llegada del otoño y considere programar su vacunación. [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/02/well/flu-shot-vaccine-cost-side-effects.html]
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=jKaJjkByx7q%2F6%2BXTJsB9MUQKu59o0mOqkn2F6LVr3nLCTEjRM8BhkOyIlFvXkwO5obQIACMpFuR8QB%2Fp3eXaXWOqBe4IvnkB3SyEPwjSX7tPBgfnGxnQDU2MV%2BqJwuvdyUsdnNjpxfgNql2OXQdTpTlfPvno%2BHRaB1nLljvwa17CkQcyWPSERDGw7xdfx6%2F5VMaT3A6Ghf%2FJN77ZhjphTnkoLkWq3UPbu%2FsssYSEmI5VFlk4%2Fc3MVGBTePPOEhHb5m8rM1oNOBrmrk5s0cUbY%2Bkb5Jc8SxtlCsytCAaLr8SbANL4iKOAFjqrvDdTEtuK2%2F1V2zi0hNXJPnjYn2nWuR6DYGzwEfJ%2BrZUdVhdb1VSSWi9XoZxCnOH8nFUotSekl1aif2oq5LKCiHnGHF%2Bb5RAyo65uFeqaTiuELGeYMQU%3D .

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: "Speaker Johnson, why are you protecting pedophiles?"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# ["Speaker Johnson, why are you protecting pedophiles?"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a57eebd-c7b8-4da0-8dcb-197f2072e06e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T569eaea1-79e3-4348-a5c3-6cfdc9a92828/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tada1639b-5c6e-4f62-8c6e-701e3706ce0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), the forward this email to friends to help build support!)_ A majority of the House supports the full release of the Epstein files -- including Trump opponents AND supporters. But Speaker Johnson won't let them actually vote to make it happen. **Why is Johnson protecting pedophiles? And the people who enabled them, or stood by and did nothing?** He's the leader of the House. The right thing to do is clear. It shouldn't take much courage to come out against pedophiles. So why won't he do it? [**Add your name, and ask him: "Speaker Johnson, why are you protecting pedophiles?"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20f687a8-ac2c-460f-a035-3ff156efd986/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Nonsense Round-up
body:
Peter, I can’t think of a better day to wrap-up this post-Labor Day and back-to-school week than a good nonsense roundup...because nonsense and the Leftist Lunatics who peddle it apparently don’t take a holiday. Ever.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, I can’t think of a better day to wrap-up this post-Labor Day and back-to-school week than a good nonsense roundup...because nonsense and the Leftist Lunatics who peddle it apparently don’t take a holiday. Ever. So here you go – enjoy!
1. Ocean County Public (i.e. taxpayer-funded!) Library offered free “gender-affirming haircuts” last week to celebrate back-to-school. I’m not quite sure what a “gender-affirming haircut” is...but I am pretty sure haircuts in general shouldn’t be funded by the taxpayer. It’s the beautiful blend of wokeism and handouts that the Leftists so love.
2. Trenton got a pile of money ($66 million, to be exact) from the American Rescue Plan Act and earmarked about $8 million to rebuild and renovate parks around the city. But did they do what any New Jerseyan would do who is embarking on a home or yard renovation? Did they make a plan, seek quotes to identify the best price, and keep a tight rein on expenses? Obviously, no. Because if they run out of money, they’ll just get more from you, the taxpayer. The [Jersey Vindicator](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/40ab0e15e5750bc1fe16554fd92211c1/eJyNUMFOAjEQ_ZeeqWULRNwbIYRsQA5Gz6Z0J2yVnTbTWXQl_Luzajhp4m0y896b995ZMaBDrmpVqnf-sHaiRorAhxQAeRmRnf-62tm0mBQjdQz4uqbYJVWefyVfAcN6XtzZkeI-gUAeHxbLTbVbP2-r3UaQyZH8-JfObTGeXnVW94tqqy6XP4WhDbw6iXZWJVMHQ6I6SCp-oqPgG-aUS2NegDL0p4B18I4j3UQ6GDu2MzOeGzs3e2jkpnmwGTFrUSBwHCLqfYytxqj3odZeWiKpSQAdujfX63gC4tCCPgwTtsLXqSPfuAxZCz3J54juqP3gjLV3VGcj1l1KgPVP7xvovwNcPgHVHJA7) did some solid reporting on this, so I’ll link it here so you can get the details. Suffice it to say, they include no-bid contracts, obscene “overtime” payments to the tune of 6 figures for one individual, and a lot of questionable spending that has little to do with parks.
3. The West Deptford Board of Education just discovered it has paid $56,000 that it didn’t need to over a span of 10+ years (and we wonder why taxes keep going up and schools still claim they don’t have enough money...). To make a long story short (go here for the long story!) they were paying the Borough of National Park for sewer services they were already receiving. This is the brilliance of the people running our publicly funded institutions. Shameful!
4. Cory Booker is getting married (you may have seen the news alongside the Taylor Swift engagement...but help us if anyone tries to call this New Jersey’s Royal Wedding). And while we wish him the best, did this deserve a top spot on our feeds and on multiple news sites? I think not. And does he have 2028 on the brain or am I just cynical? Likely both are true.

Did I miss any good nonsense that went on in the last week? Send it my way. We’re calling it out and finding humor when we can because the fight for reshaping our state towards common sense is going to be long and brutal. But we’re making headway a little at a time and I’m proud to be in this fight with you all! For New Jersey,
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club _Want to support our work? You can donate securely_[ _here_](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/d8255de12fda00d8cb160643fb41791e/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnC1Ti8qbRIhYHaLOsa0DLensso7SB_73tg_qUtB15nmf4Z0rMJIgzgqI4cSXMIzAA4tSGYXEM00s5GMbjoZBFHhQKjqmVjcG4uvX8Bu4jyfBdOgBnw06ZLNOZnm2SneLbJU70gjrbvzlGQeDj2e-TLIFdN1PMVaK561z1xCzbfDeqFCuFW9t6fgDs6lj35e6qjT1aqQae7Js9n2LbduX2i80CUanEsYgFa8_5Hh-CrsbBQxmXQ==) _. Thank you in advance! _

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line) Mailing Address: Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. I’ve got an important announcement to share with you, friend.

My name is Scott Colom, and I’m a seventh-generation Mississippian running for U.S. Senate because I can no longer sit on the sidelines while our leaders put profits over the people they are supposed to serve.

I’ve spent my career keeping our communities safe, holding the powerful accountable, and delivering justice — and now, I’m ready to take that same fight to Washington to lower costs, save our hospitals, and bring good jobs back home.

[**_If you understand what’s at stake in this race, will you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester to become a Founding Donor to this campaign and help move Mississippi forward?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114601421/567548530/710495605?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.04_Colom-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM4NWRlOS1hMTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EwoiOLN_ZF54QE_r3CwcdM_S00bvxXFKAl_5av0wzdA=) | | ******[CHIP IN $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114601422/567548531/710495605?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.04_Colom-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM4NWRlOS1hMTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EwoiOLN_ZF54QE_r3CwcdM_S00bvxXFKAl_5av0wzdA=)******
---
Team, we’re at a pivotal moment in this country where the cost of everyday goods is climbing, hospitals are closing, and working families are being left behind by the very leaders who claim to have our backs.

So we must ask ourselves: Will we allow them to keep putting profits over people? Or are we going to rise to the occasion and create a future that we all deserve?

For years, I’ve worked to mitigate violent crime in Mississippi, but I’ve also seen firsthand how investing in the community can turn things around.

This campaign is about doing just that: Investing in our communities. That means fighting for working families — making sure no child goes hungry, no parent has to travel hours for care because too many hospitals have shut down, and every Mississippian has a real chance at bettering their lives.

But it won’t be easy. We’re up against a well-funded incumbent who’s been ranked the least effective Senator in Congress, and has no problem putting billionaires before Mississippi families.

With deep pockets and powerful allies, my opponent will spend whatever it takes to win. But my team has a clear path to win this race.

**Our strategy relies on your help. And if we’re going to build the most competitive campaign possible, we need to make a big push now, from the start.

Please.**

[**_Can I count on you to become a founding donor of this campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today? It’s not the amount that matters as the donation itself – when we all come together, it’ll make a big difference._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114601423/567548532/710495605?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.04_Colom-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM4NWRlOS1hMTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EwoiOLN_ZF54QE_r3CwcdM_S00bvxXFKAl_5av0wzdA=)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

# [What should we do instead of sending the National Guard to our cities? ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=172779160&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNzc5MTYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY5OTkyNzksImV4cCI6MTc1OTU5MTI3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bjL0_m-0l_CMHpbDYf6Z03X1CuCNYFGW_p3TELsoHPw)
### We should solve more crimes.
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)

Welcome to Conor Lamb

To set up your profile and discover more on Substack, [click here](https://substack.com/redirect/636871ad-e7e0-4767-bb0b-c521d7e8a21a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0445e424-778b-4b6a-aa83-069dd05b86e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The President [says](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4459fe-bcb5-4c8f-81e7-2f03d12ba82c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he is deploying the National Guard to Chicago, his next act after using them in Washington for critical missions like [landscaping](https://substack.com/redirect/0e717dd8-a998-4895-b9b2-bd2d580046bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and picking up trash. Others have written about how [radical](https://substack.com/redirect/ef18ce84-19c4-46e1-a573-06f3123c27d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it is for an American president to use the military for political purposes. My question is different: If we wanted to reduce violent crime in our cities, what would we do instead?
After all, more than [half](https://substack.com/redirect/b1546c7e-6551-40da-9c3b-63f1b1c2de48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of American adults of approve of Trump's handling of crime. That may be a difficult pill to swallow, but it means we should quickly define a solution of our own. Thankfully, one exists, and it's easy to understand. The best way to reduce violent crime in our cities would be to solve more of them. And the National Guard will not help with that.
I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/4e9c83cb-4eac-4d5b-8674-0d0d4c18b35c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) earlier this summer about one of my first cases as a federal prosecutor, in which a group of excellent and experienced city cops removed a gun and a violent criminal from the street without any shots fired, and gave me a case I could successfully prove in court. That's what we need more of.
One of my favorite professors in college once joked that a fact could be true even though sociologists say it is. The fact that you get less violent crime if police are better are solving those crimes (reflected in something called the "clearance rate") is a fact of this kind. Still, [research](https://substack.com/redirect/4e5d9964-0299-46ae-a0ab-92d71d4cd8c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) does show that a greater certainty of punishment deters crime more effectively than longer sentences, which actually creates a bipartisan opening: it suggests that increasing the clearance rate of violent crimes could simultaneously reduce crime (an often-stated conservative goal) and provide support for less draconian sentencing policies (an often-stated liberal goal).
Consider the case of Chicago. There were 8 people killed and 50 wounded there over Labor Day weekend [alone](https://substack.com/redirect/0079dd41-6c9e-4dd9-8fc7-20ce50a0e63b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For years, Chicago stood out as a more violent city than its large peers like New York. It's no surprise that Chicago has one of the [lowest](https://substack.com/redirect/e3644371-cc40-4e6e-a759-79eec7ff96ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) clearance rates for violent crime of any major city in the country. [Data](https://substack.com/redirect/914ee0f1-daa8-4727-ae5c-a0ee716e5585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from 2023 showed that Chicago police made an arrest in only 20% (!!!) of shootings. If you're not getting caught 4 out of 5 times you do something wrong, why not keep doing it?
So maybe the real question here is what the military will be doing to help solve crimes. Nothing, as far as I can tell. They aren't trained in ballistics, or witness interviews, or any of the thousands of data points a police officer or detective would gather to try to solve a shooting or robbery. They haven't worked the streets long enough to know who is dangerous and who isn't, much less to cultivate the kind of sources that can warn of crime about to come, or break open a cold case. They aren't even empowered to make arrests when they are federally deployed. Thus, while Trump people will argue that you get crime-reduction [benefit](https://substack.com/redirect/2e8187cc-10f2-4be4-8797-f3cb32f7094d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from a larger police presence, you probably won't get that here, since criminals will quickly find out the guardsmen can't arrest them. And if the deployment is anything like DC, the military won't be in the highest-crime [neighborhoods](https://substack.com/redirect/d360e45e-d329-4222-8707-299583253ff6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the federal agents who are empowered to make arrests will do what is easy, which is arrest people for [minor](https://substack.com/redirect/a0c6605a-0674-450b-b926-b102d00f5cac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) offenses that are unrelated to violent crime.
What could we do instead? A few years ago many of us worked on and voted for the American Rescue Plan. It gave money to local governments around the country, which they could use to meet their most pressing needs coming out of the pandemic. Some places like [Houston](https://substack.com/redirect/02938f0d-2538-490d-80b7-d9d82bf8e687?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) used the money to add police investigators and technology, which allowed them to solve more crime. Boston and Denver are other examples (same link as Houston) of cities that have drastically increased their clearance rates by investing in the people and tools required to make that happen.
In a sense, the job for the federal government is pretty simple: provide money for cities that are struggling to even retain the police they have, and lack the resources to attract new, experienced investigators. If it were up to me, I'd send even more money that President Clinton did in the 90s when he put 100,000 cops on the street. This would be a hard sell even within the Democratic Party on Capitol Hill, but it's necessary if we want to do the job effectively and regain people's trust. There is probably no other way for most "Democrat-run" cities to make much of an impact on this problem. In [Pittsburgh](https://substack.com/redirect/4c74bed0-92d7-4b24-a3b1-a8917b6bd555?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), for example, police staffing is at a 20-year low because officers can leave after a few years for more money and a safer experience in the suburbs. The amount of money it would take for Pittsburgh, or Chicago, or many other cities to fill the gap is simply prohibitive.
The other federal priority would be to empower the ATF, an agency that knows a lot about investigating and prosecuting gun violence. This [article](https://substack.com/redirect/8faee7c0-633c-49fe-9bc6-73fdccb63130?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from several years ago is a must-read to explain how difficult it is for ATF to trace firearms used in crimes because of the restrictions that the gun lobby has placed on them. When you work cases like this day-to-day, the experience is maddening. I used to marvel at the multiple ways we could instantaneously surveil drug traffickers, but we would spend days trying to trace a single weapon recovered from a crime scene.
The truth is that successfully investigating and prosecuting violent crime is hard, because these crimes occur suddenly and the witnesses to them usually don't want to talk. It's easier for police to conduct drug stings because they can be planned and controlled. Improving the police response to violent crime would take sustained, serious work. But Trump has proven unwilling to legislate outside of the budget reconciliation framework, where he calls all the shots. A meaningful crime bill can't be done that way, so Trump probably won't do one.
If you've made it this far, though, you must share my frustration that one of the worst effects Trump has had on public policy is that his unwillingness to entertain any debate about effective solutions has pushed that debate far to the fringes of public discourse. We just don't spend enough time talking about what works anymore. But just because Trump is doing the wrong thing doesn't mean we should. The public deserves to know that these troop deployments are bad not only because of what they represent, but because they reflect a false promise. Trump is not going to help our cities solve more of their crimes, full stop. Now let's convince the public that we will.

You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Conor Lamb 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m officially in the race for U.S. Senate.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=082825_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=082825_1]
Hi, Peter,
I’m Roy Cooper, and I am running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. I believe that our brightest days are still ahead, but we have to work together to fix what’s broken in Washington.
Politicians in DC are running up our debt, ripping away our health care, disrespecting our veterans, cutting help for the poor and putting our Medicare at risk — just to give tax breaks to the very rich. I’ve had enough.
We have to change things, but I need you with me. Together, we can win this Senate race and help Democrats take back the majority. Will you split a contribution of $20 or another amount that’s right for you between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to get us started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=082825_1]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=082825_1]
These are no ordinary times, Peter . I believe elected leaders should work to create safety, prosperity and opportunity for every American. Republicans in Washington don’t seem to share that sense of duty.
When I look at what’s happening in Washington now, lawmakers are tearing down our middle class to put even more money in billionaires’ pockets. They’re cutting critical jobs at agencies that help keep our country running. Not even our National Parks or Weather Service are safe.
They’re punching down — attacking the most vulnerable among us — to make themselves seem strong. Something has to give.
There’s another path, Peter. When I was Governor of North Carolina, we expanded Medicaid. We passed pay raises for public school teachers and we built a strong economy by investing in clean energy and investing in our people.
Washington can look like this, too. It’s time to elect leaders who are ready to do the hard work of strengthening our middle class, restoring voting rights and reproductive rights, protecting our environment and ensuring every child has the excellent education they deserve.
If this is the America you believe in, this campaign is for you, Peter .
We’re in for a tough election here in North Carolina, but with the help of committed supporters, we’ve won the toughest races before. I’m grateful to have The Real Texas's support in this crucial race, and I’d like to have yours, too. Your donation today will help us take on the challenge of the most competitive Senate campaign in 2026. Please give whatever is right for you and split a donation between our team and The Real Texas today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=082825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=082825_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=082825_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=082825_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=082825_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=082825_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=082825_1&amount=25]
Let’s do this together,
Roy Cooper

name: Derek Tran
subject: Your voice can stop a dangerous power grab
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114602990/567552934/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUwMTIzMmQtYTQ4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qi8dfI8btT3pG4V6QKUtSBaygZARUSe-73I5wCz2ae8=)
In case you missed it, Donald Trump declared a "crime emergency" in Washington, D.C. and sent federal agents and National Guard troops into the city. Now, he’s pushing Congress to let him extend the D.C. takeover beyond the 30-day legal limit and even open the door to military occupations in cities across the country. Chicago may be next. I’ll be there myself next month, standing with community leaders and making sure our voices are heard. **Let’s call this what it is:** Trump’s takeover of D.C. is the first step in an authoritarian power grab. He's weaponizing the federal government and law enforcement to occupy Democrat-led cities and undermine local control. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114602993/567552937/824138868?refcode=em-9.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUwMTIzMmQtYTQ4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qi8dfI8btT3pG4V6QKUtSBaygZARUSe-73I5wCz2ae8=&emci=deefedd8-1289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5e01232d-a489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)
**Judge rules Trump can't act as national police chief** _The president broke the law when he deployed troops to Los Angeles, Judge Charles Breyer ruled_
---
This week, a federal judge ruled that Trump’s use of troops in Los Angeles violated federal law. But instead of backing down, he’s trying to expand these illegal power grabs.
**We cannot allow that.**
**[I’m asking you to join me in demanding that Congress shut this down: No extension past 30 days in D.C. and no new authority for Trump to send troops into our communities. Not now, not ever. Sign on today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114602995/567552940/824138868?refcode=em-9.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUwMTIzMmQtYTQ4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qi8dfI8btT3pG4V6QKUtSBaygZARUSe-73I5wCz2ae8=&emci=deefedd8-1289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5e01232d-a489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)**
**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114602997/567552943/824138868?refcode=em-9.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUwMTIzMmQtYTQ4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qi8dfI8btT3pG4V6QKUtSBaygZARUSe-73I5wCz2ae8=&emci=deefedd8-1289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5e01232d-a489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=27336212)**
---
Trump’s authoritarian D.C. takeover ends in just a few days unless Congress extends it. Don’t delay and send your message to Congress now, before they vote on this dangerous “crime bill.” Let’s ensure this power grab is stopped in its tracks.
Thank you for standing up with me. Together, we’ll protect local rule and defend our democracy.
-Derek
P.S. If you’re able, please also consider **[making a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114602999/567552945/1527952032?refcode=em-9.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUwMTIzMmQtYTQ4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qi8dfI8btT3pG4V6QKUtSBaygZARUSe-73I5wCz2ae8=)** to help me keep this fight going. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: The cure for the radical left’s lunacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zef01nd8cta7eg65dkd2joo688vpu15l70qtjg28_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)
Friend,

For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

If you invade the country, NGOs will pay your legal bills as you enjoy free housing and debit cards filled with taxpayer cash.

If you wave the Mexican flag while assaulting law enforcement, the news will call it a _"potent sign of protest."_

If you burn the American flag, they'll call it free speech.

But if you dare tear down a Pride flag, you face years in prison.

This demonstrates the lunacy of the radical left.

It’s also what’s at stake if we rest on our laurels instead of taking action to win in 2026, 2028, and beyond...

**Turning Point PAC has a plan to hold the line!**

We have identified 3 battleground states where we can have the most impact: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

By establishing field offices and ramping up field operations in those states, [you and I can build a RED WALL](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs7stapr71fkvs22ia2tsdosrgs1c6c0tcpo52mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs) to protect our America First victories.

To do so, we’ll need to raise $75,000 before the end of the month to fund this mission.

[To encourage MAGA patriots to step up, we’re giving away my new book, _Right Wing Revolution_ , and an exclusive President Trump lithograph when you give before the end of the month.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgo6n22plo8mcc0mjqctgufe8ahjtfcj98l36bp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zglo1njgaol8qa7o7btc6nqvq1igclj1slr3rtig_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)
[Donate $25](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6uq23m1udmibt08122giolblocn2r6c229ven20_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs) for a copy of my new book, _**Right Wing Revolution**_. [Donate $25](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4ird707kt44uhf5q252f1dtdi8aintjb9cvskog_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs) [Donate $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr59chprq7eb2jk46hrfuungpreji7b1lbhrg49g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs) for a copy of my new book and a President Trump lithograph. [Donate $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6leb5th1sbbld5acp6fa2u3ojquopu7bjdnaqe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs) [Donate $250](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt051p50dq2i94dolue15i27u377g3r0d8csrqno_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs) for a President Trump lithograph and a SIGNED copy of **_Right Wing Revolution_**. [Donate $250](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbivbf1m5hf99u6kjedj1ef3s8ualtgd4fo0r1jg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)
I know this is no small ask, but this is no small operation.

**Winning in Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire is critical to the enduring success of President Trump’s America First agenda.**

These states have a number of important factors that make them the perfect targets for our grassroots ground game.
1. They are considered contested states that are important to both parties.
2. These states are growing.
3. **Republicans outnumber Democrats.**

Plus, if we win these states, we don’t have to worry about winning in other states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, or Wisconsin.

That’s the truth.

_**Only three states stand between us and a series of America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**_

Please help us [finish what we started](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6au5r7tp120lu9nnnhh11rjc8k110tdpe6ihatg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs) and secure an America First future by donating today.
[Donate $25 = Get _Right Wing Revolution_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zanhnali09j0g7s68nn1aqmi9eo5p0jh2augeo9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 = Get Pres. Trump lithograph and _Right Wing Revolution_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zeiqaear8nvplmlo5f5dgtku2ksn4bgtvlk71duo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $250 = Get Signed _Right Wing Revolution_ and lithograph](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6rmj452dih87fei0rmblh6dtopf0asa81s91nho_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)
For America,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

P.S. Now that you’ve heard our plan, I want you to understand what is at stake if we fail: our Republic.

Everything President Trump has achieved... _undone_.
Our America First movement... _finished_.
Our freedom... _surrendered_.
The future of America... _**in peril!**_

We CANNOT let that happen.

[This is why it is CRITICAL that we raise $75,000 before the end of the month to build the RED WALL. Please rush your support today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zphv0qrmiubup9iskn4vg2r6p36e99dm793lhub0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)
[Build the RED WALL](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu64u7smqdcaffp95m1kgs8uo5dal0glticr8ic0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c1i62oj4c9h2bs)

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Announcing Justice Democrats’ NEW candidate →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Our second 2026 primary challenger is here,
Peter!

Today, we’re endorsing Angela Gonzales-Torres for Congress! Angela is
running in California’s 34th district: the very heart of Los Angeles. She
is a working-class education advocate and community leader ready to take
on incumbent Rep. Jimmy Gomez and the Washington establishment he
represents.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-1-at?refcode=em20250904-36985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f ]A picture of Angela Gonzales-Torres standing in front of a mural.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-1-at?refcode=em20250904-36985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f ]Contribute $5

Establishment leaders and wealthy elites in Washington have done
everything in their power to stamp down on progressives, and protect their
own. They have consistently chosen to fight the next generation of
leadership within their own party harder than they fight against Trump and
the GOP.

Here’s the situation: last cycle, AIPAC threatened to spend over $100
million to unseat the entire Squad of Justice Democrats in Congress and
they failed. But with the corporate establishment’s approval, AIPAC did
succeed in two races and we cannot allow that to happen again. So today,
we’ve set a big goal, and even if we get half of it, it’ll be a huge feat.
But it’s important for us to try.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-1-at?refcode=em20250904-36985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f ]Make a donation right now to help us raise as much as possible for
Angela in the first 24 hours of the campaign. 100% of your donation will
go directly to the founding of Angela’s grassroots campaign and holding
Gomez and the Democratic establishment accountable.

For months, corporate and establishment Democrats have done everything in
their power to stop another Zohran Mamdani or anyone like him from
succeeding — despite their overwhelming popularity with the Democratic
base. Last cycle, they did everything in their power to stop Cori Bush and
Jamaal Bowman from returning to Congress. And before that, after the Squad
was elected in 2018, they did everything to stop another Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib from
happening.

Over the years, they’ve blacklisted progressives to undermine their
grassroots campaigns. They continue to raise money for conservative
Democrats who stand against Trump when it’s convenient, but support bills
that further his inhumane and corrupt agenda. They’ve blamed progressives
for Trump’s presidency, interfered in primaries with GOP billionaire money
rather than give voters a fair fight, and have done everything other than
welcome the progressive change Americans desperately need and are
clamoring for.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-1-at?refcode=em20250904-36985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f ]That’s why we need you to go big with us in these first 24 hours – we
need to make this statement loud and clear. I’ll be honest with you, I’m
not sure we’re going to raise as much as we need to today. But if we’re
able to pull off something BIG for Angela, it’ll put every single
out-of-touch, corporate Democrat on notice. No establishment Democrat
should feel safe.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-1-at?refcode=em20250904-36985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f ]Contribute $5

Together with all of you, we’ve not only sent 10 Justice Democrats to
Congress – we have built long-term infrastructure to sustain the
recruitment and support of federal candidates accountable to everyday
people and unbeholden to the billionaire class and corporations who are in
the pockets of leadership in both parties. We are meaningfully shaping
national politics and fighting to ensure that every safe Democratic seat
in Congress is represented by leaders who have the urgency and the lived
experience needed to ruthlessly fight like hell for the working class
against all odds.

It’s why this second endorsement is a critical one for us. There are no
more excuses for incumbent Democrats who accept money from Corporate PACs
or lobbies that align more with Trump and the GOP than the values
Democrats say they support.

Angela is running against incumbent Rep. Jimmy Gomez who has left his
community behind.

* Despite promising to stop taking corporate PAC money, he has continued
to collect big checks from corporate PACs through his leadership PAC.
* He has voted to greenlight Donald Trump’s Crypto corruption, allowing
Trump and his family to continue to make billions of dollars off his
Presidency.
* Gomez is also one of the largest recipients of Israel lobby money from
AIPAC. Even as Israel commits genocide against the Palestinian people,
Gomez continues to vote to send billions of dollars of weapons
overseas while working people in Los Angeles struggle to make ends
meet.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-1-at?refcode=em20250904-36985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f ]The people of California’s 34th District deserve better, and Democrats
nationwide do too. If 7,000 people donate the amount of our average
donation, we could hit our ambitious goal. Will you contribute
$5 to help us get there?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-1-at?refcode=em20250904-36985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f ]Contribute $5

Whether you can give $1 or $50, every bit makes a huge difference on today
of all days. This is our opportunity to strike back against the corporate
establishment that has blocked progressive reform – Medicare for All, a
Green New Deal, ending funding for genocide, getting money out of politics
– at every turn.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250904-36985-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36985_1203867_sNPC3f&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36985%2E1203867%2EsNPC3f

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Wes Moore
subject: This is all because of you, Peter
body:
Because of your support, we hit our end-of-month goal.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=556%2E1086043%2EGbW6nK)
My team just came to me with some great news, Peter.
Your continued support helped us sprint through the finish line and meet our August fundraising goal.
**So I want to say _thank you._**
Everything we have accomplished together is thanks to you. When you chip into emails just like this one, it directly powers our mission to leave no one behind. I’m incredibly grateful. 🙏🏽
Elevate,
Wes
P.S. I’ve got a special announcement coming up very soon, but my team is keeping it a secret. Make sure you stay tuned...
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250904-1?refcode=em-20250904-1&refcode2=556_1086043_GbW6nK&akid=556%2E1086043%2EGbW6nK)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=556%2E1086043%2EGbW6nK)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=556%2E1086043%2EGbW6nK)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER
