body:
| |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114603459/567553995/598411781?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250904_FR_SupremeCourt_0_3MO_PaDems_NA_NA_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRiNjNiYS1hNTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skv51aJp9XS5JrGOqYGtjKDkOCT1XnRigjIWh2G8GKU=) **Peter — Leonard Leo and Jeffrey Yass don’t live in your community.** They don’t know your family. And they certainly don’t care about justice in Pennsylvania.

But right now, dark money organizations linked to these right-wing billionaires are pouring their fortunes into flipping our state Supreme Court. Why? Because they know the court is the backstop for protecting abortion rights, stopping gerrymandering, and keeping elections free and fair.

**[Rush a donation now to help us defend our courts against these billionaire buyouts!!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114603460/567553996/598411781?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250904_FR_SupremeCourt_0_3MO_PaDems_NA_NA_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRiNjNiYS1hNTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skv51aJp9XS5JrGOqYGtjKDkOCT1XnRigjIWh2G8GKU=)**

They don’t want fair courts, they want loyal courts. Courts that answer to MAGA extremists instead of to the Constitution. Courts that do their bidding while working families in Pennsylvania pay the price.

**_If they win, it won’t just be about this year._** They’re playing the long game: lock down the court now, and control the redistricting process in 2030. That’s how they plan to rig our democracy for another decade.

Let me be clear.
The Americans who will be disproportionately impacted by Trump’s undemocratic ban are those with disabilities and our men and women in uniform serving our country overseas, who overwhelmingly rely on mail-in voting.
We can’t let Trump silence their voices or their votes.
Thank you,
NANCY

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. Peter,

I’m reaching out because something serious is happening at the helm of American public health, and I want your perspective.

**The Center for Disease Control is in crisis.**

Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. recently fired Director Susan Monarez -- just weeks into her tenure -- and stacked senior leadership with individuals known for vaccine skepticism.

Top CDC officials resigned in protest. Public health advocates are sounding alarms. And former leaders from both parties are warning that these actions put American lives in jeopardy.

**I believe our health institutions must be guided by science, not politics. That’s why I’ve joined the growing call for RFK Jr. to be removed from office immediately.**

**[But I want to hear from you: Do you agree RFK Jr. should be removed from his post at HHS?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114604137/567555886/1794637994?refcode=em-9.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjYwNTg4NC1hNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QAVJd8eSueNYLaAQvtVUsOjM0hhFE5ce6vSlCQv-MQo=&emci=da2d6fc3-bf88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5f605884-a789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)**

name: Megan Hondl
subject: My reflections after 12 days at the MN State Fair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter!
Megan Hondl here, Kelly’s campaign manager. I hope you’re well! On Monday, we wrapped up 12 days at our Minnesota State Fair booth. When Kelly decided to have a booth at the fair, I really didn’t know what to expect. I’ll be honest - I was a little nervous. I figured that Minnesotans wouldn’t want to talk politics between bites of pork chop on a stick and roasted corn. I was worried that people wouldn’t be willing to listen to each other, especially if they disagreed. And, Peter, I’ve never been happier to admit that I was wrong.
Collage of photos of Kelly at the State Fair [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/graphics/25-state-fair-collage.png]
I want to share a little story from my time at the booth: on day one, we had two men come up to chat with me and our volunteers. After confirming that we were not politically aligned, we found one thing we agreed on: our politics have gotten too divisive . I talked about Kelly’s experience growing up in a Republican family and knowing that good ideas can come from both sides of the aisle. I also shared her deep Democratic values, and how our President’s dangerous rhetoric and hateful language is hurting us all. I talked about how our booth’s theme is the kindness revolution, a message Kelly embodies and has shared at her numerous town halls. They walked away admitting that they might be open to switching up their vote next year! There were plenty of conversations just like that that happened at our booth, and we closed up the booth on Monday feeling like Minnesotans got to know Kelly a bit better, and that we spread kindness to those that stopped by.
Peter, as Kelly says, we all need to do our part and be a little bit braver, and we’re trying to do just that. And it doesn’t hurt that we get to enjoy some Sweet Martha’s cookies and food on a stick while we do it!
As we enter September, we enter our last month of our third fundraising quarter of the year. We set a goal to raise $50,000 the month of September to close our gap and end this quarter strong.
It is necessary we reach each quarter's fundraising goals to ensure we can continue to build this momentum and enter the upcoming election year in a strong position. Peter, can you chip in any amount today to help us kick off September and chip away at our EOQ goals? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you for all that you do for Kelly, and this whole team, Peter.
P.S. - Kelly joined the DFL daily call this past Friday at the fair. clean_body: [] Hi Peter! Megan Hondl here, Kelly’s campaign manager. I hope you’re well! On Monday, we wrapped up 12 days at our Minnesota State Fair booth. When Kelly decided to have a booth at the fair, I really didn’t know what to expect. I’ll be honest - I was a little nervous. I figured that Minnesotans wouldn’t want to talk politics between bites of pork chop on a stick and roasted corn. I was worried that people wouldn’t be willing to listen to each other, especially if they disagreed. And, Peter, I’ve never been happier to admit that I was wrong. Collage of photos of Kelly at the State Fair [] I want to share a little story from my time at the booth: on day one, we had two men come up to chat with me and our volunteers. After confirming that we were not politically aligned, we found one thing we agreed on: our politics have gotten too divisive . I talked about Kelly’s experience growing up in a Republican family and knowing that good ideas can come from both sides of the aisle. I also shared her deep Democratic values, and how our President’s dangerous rhetoric and hateful language is hurting us all. I talked about how our booth’s theme is the kindness revolution, a message Kelly embodies and has shared at her numerous town halls. They walked away admitting that they might be open to switching up their vote next year! There were plenty of conversations just like that that happened at our booth, and we closed up the booth on Monday feeling like Minnesotans got to know Kelly a bit better, and that we spread kindness to those that stopped by. Peter, as Kelly says, we all need to do our part and be a little bit braver, and we’re trying to do just that. And it doesn’t hurt that we get to enjoy some Sweet Martha’s cookies and food on a stick while we do it! As we enter September, we enter our last month of our third fundraising quarter of the year. We set a goal to raise $50,000 the month of September to close our gap and end this quarter strong. It is necessary we reach each quarter's fundraising goals to ensure we can continue to build this momentum and enter the upcoming election year in a strong position. Peter, can you chip in any amount today to help us kick off September and chip away at our EOQ goals? [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Donate $10 [] Donate $25 [] Donate $50 [] Donate $100 [] Donate Other Amount [] Thank you for all that you do for Kelly, and this whole team, Peter. name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: MAGA is dismantling our courts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
We only get one chance to defend democracy, and the shadow dockets might strip us away from that. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1TZbxeqMRbn5yU3f55er-bkrV1h86OZhwItAG-Z37alI6Dwu_UBPt6vUUsoZCVM1h8a24mBklJDey9PoAYfZsBm3eM_z55vOpbxAqR_9fmCWqHpwPyhbF18lsvXRbmJEPDCsQHfGABUsS3UCKYAKHHS2R6WH6xsBrVUNqVNkRzI55sBj2VLkqzDDlYAvmq1GWc1qdXgYk4mcFvd-yMN5yVsnKUWvXhklw7gsHNZbZA6BeJxY0w5zND8fzhDngjeIyOACQgIva9Z3DjKg-dHo82cjMb3MIHtcQX0aBGPw0X-n/4jm/J16qccSeSn2GOfEHc-n82Q/h0/h001.Min6L1c2r8LRw1lyL1eTjn5KJUx0hVqb_RiX_qT5eLs)
---
Friends, The Supreme Court is no longer serving the people, it's serving MAGA. In case after case, the Court is abandoning precedent, **hiding behind the shadow docket,** and siding with Trump's agenda. Shadow dockets are rulings issued without full briefings, oral arguments, or explanations. Orders so opaque that even lower courts struggle to follow them. Since Trump returned to office, his administration has flooded the Court with emergency petitions, **demanding fast-tracked decisions on issues ranging from immigration to public health.** The Court has been more than willing to comply. _What 's even more alarming is that federal judges themselves are speaking out._ Across the country, judges appointed by Democrats, Republicans, and even Trump are expressing frustration that the Supreme Court's frequent interventions, often without explanation, are undermining their work and leaving them vulnerable to attacks from MAGA leaders and violent threats. In these extraordinary times, judges say the Court is effectively leaving them "out to dry" _**and even appearing to side with Trump 's political agenda. **_ This is an attack on our democracy. By bending the rules for Trump and rewriting standards in his favor, MAGA justices are undermining the integrity of our courts, the very foundation of our system of checks and balances. We cannot afford to sit back. **If we lose our courts, we lose our democracy.** This fight is urgent, and we only have one chance to stop it. [**No Dem Left Behind is fighting to hold extremists accountable, defend the rule of law, and protect the institutions that safeguard our freedoms. But we can 't do it alone. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us defend democracy from MAGA's attack on our courts.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1TZbxeqMRbn5yU3f55er-blc5nZC_Emio3p1U3p93QR-MFLPvtFeKJEOa5BJm9dmSYuypWdwUuuHdf69TgNYufD_RqMSA3fF_d3yo3A87PWsCWmkhCgCuJ2zgrB1B3WLQtNo-aWUVUlqFEmxgt0xjKNAn8uiVxW4nZdgWvZcqKEg_VSma4asaoZdoua4oA_OZHnzQ9IDAkpk9XIKlV0zVOUgNf8iwNGtLLFbJhf2r7hz0KqsTho3po6mB1lg9wlT4taaMA_SwYPWj5cc5yn0r8QwTZRy9mfuIlKJfi-wefwg/4jm/J16qccSeSn2GOfEHc-n82Q/h1/h001.eLfcEsp6cOVSRGBC83kVfsbTNq3-vKkRrsLKfLZ-qt0)

clean_body: We only get one chance to defend democracy, and the shadow dockets might strip us away from that. | | Friends, The Supreme Court is no longer serving the people, it's serving MAGA. In case after case, the Court is abandoning precedent, hiding behind the shadow docket, and siding with Trump's agenda. Shadow dockets are rulings issued without full briefings, oral arguments, or explanations. Orders so opaque that even lower courts struggle to follow them. Since Trump returned to office, his administration has flooded the Court with emergency petitions, demanding fast-tracked decisions on issues ranging from immigration to public health. The Court has been more than willing to comply. What 's even more alarming is that federal judges themselves are speaking out. Across the country, judges appointed by Democrats, Republicans, and even Trump are expressing frustration that the Supreme Court's frequent interventions, often without explanation, are undermining their work and leaving them vulnerable to attacks from MAGA leaders and violent threats. In these extraordinary times, judges say the Court is effectively leaving them "out to dry" and even appearing to side with Trump 's political agenda. This is an attack on our democracy. By bending the rules for Trump and rewriting standards in his favor, MAGA justices are undermining the integrity of our courts, the very foundation of our system of checks and balances. We cannot afford to sit back. If we lose our courts, we lose our democracy. This fight is urgent, and we only have one chance to stop it. Together, we can stop MAGA from dismantling our future. -The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . Friend, **In case you missed it, national headlines are now saying what we’ve been warning about: MI-08 is the GOP’s top target...** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114604888/567559049/1362877131?refcode=em-9.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRhYTYzOC1hODg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDEWtZ24qoGcisEuLZuMyQw2X3EstIMxxCoWI4_Zw8Y=)

| | | Hi there, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, your DSCC chair. I have a time-sensitive request for you -- **not everyone will receive this invite, but I need to be sure _you_ do.**

**[I'm conducting an _exclusive_ strategy survey with our strongest supporters to strengthen our plans to win big in the midterms -- and our records indicate that you're a TOP Democrat in Pennsylvania. Your direct input could make or break our path to victory, so please, will you take my Democratic Strategy Survey before midnight?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21904?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=21143%2E9716520%2Edbuo7h)**

| | [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21904?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=21143%2E9716520%2Edbuo7h)
---

Right now, Trump is gambling with our future -- our jobs, health care, fundamental freedoms, and more -- all to deliver massive tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans. Winning back the Senate is our best chance to stop his MAGA extremism, but to do it, we'll have to take on some of Trump's biggest GOP allies.

Those battles will be tough -- and flipping Republican-held seats will take bold and brilliant strategy. With so much on the line, we can't leave anything to chance. **This survey will only take a moment of your time, but your voice will make a real difference in how we fight back.

[I know that your input will be invaluable, so please -- will you take my survey before midnight to help Democrats win big in the midterms? We'll be standing by to read your response >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21904?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=21143%2E9716520%2Edbuo7h)**

| [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21904?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250904-KirstenGillibrand-ExclusiveStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=21143%2E9716520%2Edbuo7h)
---

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

subject: If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:

---

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=47a838ac30bf49999ce58fe9e4bd55e4&_e=LQoFiTXQ06g9PzUt0yesgtDyCwdzcCcHvNog1TC2AIOBbazp1P9BopiWpaGT_hrfnBA8Y0c9dPcoaaFhw92prxgLhp1O2Zc3G-jXmdqQg_4stfVUI8x5Lwfc3y-Vz2mztFDCRWeRKTihLZVe8aN8Ip9m99Rm_agiXezV28DFxLiCHqc26E3uKRMO-6aZIhbMv0tu-0874mMXKcXPIjDrRQpsE_JnjChTpeJiBgoHleTxCnqm1nhwX5ckuPFY-8GLz8rU_8_gkJP7FjiyOjE6uGM9W237hN3-_qMPdslCWX552NrM7DeWr1aI1EKHANevt7_TJtyiYgyjsuEHFfGXRssSS2Rv9MQUqWKBnj_XvbniAntxNyYi4PVk-tzuCMRZMThxjTVzUy-b4HSdC6WOwerVbRme8R_p3DJk6CNxeV0l-AzXl8iyTHVTrr1LlzwuG3y_0zd2Bx5Qsxy17302C-wf3d1dJAB6qh5txyWYKgx6dE81lpum2w8zQc56YBVC5PRWkKAOsPO4klHZg1AsQrF3RbAeyyOi_relX2UJA3J5KyBWKNGSPIrVOi4aZbJmh6WtF354i5dKIV-DxMlisbZToL8KpwZVnqauFhLfRNaPeg2h2D9drD0d76t-fXaVtiJNjlwRUBrle2-ta-1E7TMBGBeJ2HtrwrWuU6M4LsTjAYXteT5V_xhQvh1uHsOdHj547iv-aTM4Zx4wlFE_vA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Re: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?
_Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files?_
Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons.
We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people.
But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes.
You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge.
Let me tell you what it’s been like in Washington these last seven months.
The leaders of Georgia’s clinics and hospitals and nursing homes, caregivers for seniors and the disabled, nurses, teachers, food pantry directors — they all came to us and pleaded with Georgia's representatives in Congress: don’t do this. Don’t devastate health care. Don’t abandon seniors. Don’t starve kids.
Sen. Warnock and I listened. We fought that bill, and we voted No.
We put Georgia first.
But every Republican member of Congress who is supposed to represent Georgia put loyalty to Trump over loyalty to our state.
***
That brings me to the 2026 election.
_2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule._
And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won.
I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
_There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago._
This is a moment of struggle for the very substance of our Republic. This descent into one-man rule must be stopped.
**[If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please chip in to my campaign today. This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250904-1-subs&t=1&akid=719%2E5691347%2EEWAxzf)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250904-1-subs&t=2&akid=719%2E5691347%2EEWAxzf)**
Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.
And come next November, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you for your support.
\- Jon
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250904-1-subs&t=3&akid=719%2E5691347%2EEWAxzf)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=719%2E5691347%2EEWAxzf) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=719%2E5691347%2EEWAxzf) if you'd like to unsubscribe.
clean_body: Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files? Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files? Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons. We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people. But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes. You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge. Let me tell you what it’s been like in Washington these last seven months. The leaders of Georgia’s clinics and hospitals and nursing homes, caregivers for seniors and the disabled, nurses, teachers, food pantry directors — they all came to us and pleaded with Georgia's representatives in Congress: don’t do this. Don’t devastate health care. Don’t abandon seniors. Don’t starve kids. Sen. Warnock and I listened. We fought that bill, and we voted No. We put Georgia first. But every Republican member of Congress who is supposed to represent Georgia put loyalty to Trump over loyalty to our state. * That brings me to the 2026 election. 2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule. And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won. I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago. This is a moment of struggle for the very substance of our Republic. This descent into one-man rule must be stopped. Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining. And come next November, we will raise it higher. In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption. Thank you for your support. \- Jon Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

name: Emily Randall
subject: I was denied entry to the ICE detention center in my district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
To arrest people who are putting their lives on the line to fight a wildfire is disgusting.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609313/567573817/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) | Peter, I want to make sure you were aware of two critical developments from the last few days. **1.) Customs and Border Patrol agents raided the firefighting crew at the Bear Gulch Fire and arrested two people.** The Bear Gulch Fire has already burned more than 9,000 acres on the Olympic Peninsula. These firefighters are putting their lives on the line to stop homes from burning and people from dying. But instead of doing anything to keep our communities safe from fires and climate disasters, CBP agents are arresting our first responders. [_**I recorded a message for you about this situation and what we're doing about it — please watch and share:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609316/567573821/1203500717?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609321/567573825/-296333560?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) **2.) I was denied entry to the Northwest Detention Center, where the firefighters are being held.** On Saturday, my staff and I arrived at the ICE detention facility in Tacoma. Upon arriving and providing ID, the Lieutenant on duty stated that, as they were uninformed of our visit and because it was a weekend, we could not enter. I stated my congressional authority to perform unannounced visits and **[cited legal statute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609322/567573828/1112622871?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442)**. The desk officer called his supervisor, who also denied us entry. I again stated my authority and the relevant statute, but we were still denied entry. They confirmed the presence of the two arrested firefighters, but I could not see them or speak to them. It is illegal to keep a member of Congress from performing their oversight duty at a DHS facility. I made sure the desk officer and his supervisor understood that they were breaking the law. [_**Please watch and share KING 5’s coverage of the incident →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609325/567573829/-803653937?v=MRxLB1xsrzI&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) To arrest people who are putting their lives on the line to fight a wildfire is disgusting. To hold them in a facility [**without enough medical staff**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609326/567573833/-1867840939?cb=MTc1Njk5NzE0NzY1NA==&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) is unconscionable. My colleagues and I will continue to monitor the situation and provide updates. **Please share this story with your friends and family so we can shine a bright spotlight on the actions of this administration.** Thank you so much for your continued vigilance and support. — Emily _**More resources:**_
* _**[KOMO News: “WA lawmaker denied entry to ICE facility where Bear Gulch crew members are detained”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609327/567573834/1112622871?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442)**_

* _[**MSNBC: “ICE swoops in on firefighters IN THE MIDDLE of battling wildfire”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114609328/567573835/-803653937?v=fdSvt44Q00Y&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.04_FireFighters_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFjMzE0NS1hZjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OBBnZE7Plow_X7niBTvIrfOhnVq_wlehGrB0SZwUKc=&emci=b0db2154-9d89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=351c3145-af89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442)_

clean_body: To arrest people who are putting their lives on the line to fight a wildfire is disgusting. | Peter, I want to make sure you were aware of two critical developments from the last few days. 1.) Customs and Border Patrol agents raided the firefighting crew at the Bear Gulch Fire and arrested two people. The Bear Gulch Fire has already burned more than 9,000 acres on the Olympic Peninsula. These firefighters are putting their lives on the line to stop homes from burning and people from dying. But instead of doing anything to keep our communities safe from fires and climate disasters, CBP agents are arresting our first responders. 2.) I was denied entry to the Northwest Detention Center, where the firefighters are being held. On Saturday, my staff and I arrived at the ICE detention facility in Tacoma. Upon arriving and providing ID, the Lieutenant on duty stated that, as they were uninformed of our visit and because it was a weekend, we could not enter. I stated my congressional authority to perform unannounced visits and . The desk officer called his supervisor, who also denied us entry. I again stated my authority and the relevant statute, but we were still denied entry. They confirmed the presence of the two arrested firefighters, but I could not see them or speak to them. It is illegal to keep a member of Congress from performing their oversight duty at a DHS facility. I made sure the desk officer and his supervisor understood that they were breaking the law. To arrest people who are putting their lives on the line to fight a wildfire is disgusting. To hold them in a facility is unconscionable. My colleagues and I will continue to monitor the situation and provide updates. Please share this story with your friends and family so we can shine a bright spotlight on the actions of this administration. Thank you so much for your continued vigilance and support. — Emily More resources: * = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . # EXPOSED: Ilhan Omar is worth millions, even as she claims she isn't
Rep. Ilhan Omar's **[net worth soared](https://substack.com/redirect/2b84f26d-5a50-4ff3-a08e-19f808cdd2c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 2025, despite her denying millionaire status, fueled by her husband's winery and venture capital firm, congressional financial disclosures reveal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2b84f26d-5a50-4ff3-a08e-19f808cdd2c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Husband 's Businesses Drive Wealth:** Tim Mynett's winery, eStCru Wines, and venture capital firm, Rose Lake Capital, saw massive valuation spikes, with assets now valued between $6 million and $30 million.
* **Omar 's Debt Persists:** Despite the wealth surge, Omar reports up to $100,000 in credit card and student loan debt, alongside modest savings and retirement funds.
* **Political Context Emerges:** The disclosure coincides with Omar's renewed push for gun control following a Minneapolis school shooting, drawing attention to her financial and political narrative.
* **Critics Question Transparency:** Omar's past denials of wealth, coupled with the rapid asset growth, fuel skepticism about her financial transparency amid ongoing political scrutiny.

# Drill Baby, Drill shatters US oil production records
The U.S. shattered **[crude oil production records in June](https://substack.com/redirect/4239d568-dcaa-424e-9f79-7edbcd206e3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 2025, pumping 13.58 million barrels daily, driven by enhanced well productivity and deregulation, solidifying its global energy dominance, the EIA reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4239d568-dcaa-424e-9f79-7edbcd206e3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Historic Production Milestones** : The U.S. hit 13 million barrels per day 21 times since 2023, with six instances in 2025, reflecting sustained growth in oil output.
* **Regional Production Breakdown** : Lower 48 states, excluding the Gulf, will contribute 11.15 million barrels daily in 2025, with the Gulf and Alaska adding 1.83 and 0.43 million, respectively.
* **EIA's 2025 Forecast** : U.S. crude oil production is projected to average 13.41 million barrels per day in 2025, a slight increase from the prior 13.37 million estimate.
* **Global Leadership Affirmed** : The U.S. topped global crude oil production in 2024 at 13.194 million barrels daily, per the Energy Institute, reinforcing its pivotal role in energy markets.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eafaa088-1e6f-4802-bf48-c54152f4a572?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
* * *
# Sydney Sweeney's "Good Jeans" are VERY good for business
American Eagle Outfitters' **[stock soared 33% Thursday](https://substack.com/redirect/7dc08c7e-3d88-44db-b04b-d4f62c44a535?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , fueled by a controversial Sydney Sweeney ad campaign that sparked debate but drove unprecedented customer interest, boosting the retailer's appeal among Gen Z shoppers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7dc08c7e-3d88-44db-b04b-d4f62c44a535?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Celebrity Campaigns Surge** : Partnerships with Sydney Sweeney and Travis Kelce generated 40 billion ad impressions, adding over 700,000 new customers, revitalizing American Eagle's brand.
* **Sales Forecast Improves** : The retailer expects flat annual comparable sales, surpassing analysts' predicted 1.1% drop, signaling confidence in sustained demand.
* **Controversy Sparks Debate** : Sweeney's "Great Jeans" campaign faced backlash for perceived racial undertones, yet it significantly increased brand visibility and engagement.
* **Economic Challenges Persist** : Despite marketing success, American Eagle faces economic uncertainty, with tariffs potentially adding $70 million in costs in the second half of 2025.

* * *
* * *
# The woke marketing agencies behind Cracker Barrel disaster are named and shamed
Cracker Barrel's rebrand, unveiled in August 2025, sparked fierce backlash for ditching its iconic logo, forcing the chain to restore its nostalgic "Old Timer" design after customers revolted online and **[now the agencies behind it have been named.](https://substack.com/redirect/9cb618ee-07bb-4610-b1d8-369c1016c1a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9cb618ee-07bb-4610-b1d8-369c1016c1a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Partnered with Marketing Firms** : Cracker Barrel collaborated with Prophet, Viral Nation, and Blue Engine for its rebrand, aiming to modernize its image, but the firms faced scrutiny for the controversial logo change.
* **Social Media Campaign** : Viral Nation crafted a social media push to engage younger audiences, yet the campaign failed to quell outrage over the logo and sterile store redesigns.
* **Financial and Cultural Impact** : The rebrand led to a $143 million market value drop, highlighting the risks of alienating loyal customers by altering a brand's nostalgic identity.
* **Customer Sentiment Ignored** : Despite earlier warnings from investor Sardar Biglari, Cracker Barrel's leadership dismissed concerns, underestimating the emotional connection customers had with the original branding.

* * *
* * *
# Macy's shares soar despite anticipated tariff challenges
Macy's shares **[soared 18% Wednesday](https://substack.com/redirect/646fd89f-60c0-48a4-b79b-5b65ec01741e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as the retailer raised its 2025 profit and sales forecasts, defying tariff pressures, with revamped stores and luxury brands driving optimism in New York.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a38dbc1d-184d-4cce-a58c-654f1af76338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Turnaround Strategy Pays Off** : Macy's turnaround plan, including closing 150 underperforming stores and investing "[in] high-potential locations," boosts sales, with 125 revamped stores showing 1.1% comparable sales growth.
* **Luxury Brands Shine** : Bloomingdale's and Bluemercury chains saw stronger demand, with comparable sales up 4.8% and 6.2% respectively, offsetting weaker performance at Macy's namesake stores.
* **Selective Price Adjustments** : Macy's is selectively raising prices to mitigate tariff impacts, maintaining competitive pricing while diversifying its supply chain to balance costs.
* **Strong Financial Performance** : Second-quarter net sales hit $4.81 billion, beating estimates of $4.76 billion, with adjusted earnings of 41 cents per share, surpassing Wall Street's 18-cent forecast.

* * *
* * *
# SEC's bold plan for Crypto in America goes public
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission **[unveiled bold plans Thursday](https://substack.com/redirect/2d6b340a-83bc-47ef-87e9-2be0ebcb1db5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to overhaul cryptocurrency regulations and ease Wall Street rules, aiming to integrate digital assets into traditional finance markets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d6b340a-83bc-47ef-87e9-2be0ebcb1db5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Crypto Rules Overhauled** : The SEC's agenda includes proposing rules for digital asset sales, potentially offering exemptions and safe harbors to foster crypto's growth.
* **Exchange Trading Enabled** : Amendments under consideration would allow cryptocurrencies to trade on national securities exchanges and alternative trading systems.
* **Wall Street Relief** : The SEC plans to reduce burdensome regulations, responding to Wall Street's calls for streamlined compliance processes.
* **Industry Impact Significant** : If enacted, these changes could deeply integrate crypto with traditional finance, marking a major win for the digital asset sector.

Omar 's Debt Persists: Despite the wealth surge, Omar reports up to $100,000 in credit card and student loan debt, alongside modest savings and retirement funds. Drill Baby, Drill shatters US oil production records The U.S. shattered 2025, pumping 13.58 million barrels daily, driven by enhanced well productivity and deregulation, solidifying its global energy dominance, the EIA reports. | | ---|---|--- Historic Production Milestones : The U.S. hit 13 million barrels per day 21 times since 2023, with six instances in 2025, reflecting sustained growth in oil output. Regional Production Breakdown : Lower 48 states, excluding the Gulf, will contribute 11.15 million barrels daily in 2025, with the Gulf and Alaska adding 1.83 and 0.43 million, respectively. EIA's 2025 Forecast : U.S. crude oil production is projected to average 13.41 million barrels per day in 2025, a slight increase from the prior 13.37 million estimate. Global Leadership Affirmed : The U.S. topped global crude oil production in 2024 at 13.194 million barrels daily, per the Energy Institute, reinforcing its pivotal role in energy markets. | | ---|---|--- Sydney Sweeney's "Good Jeans" are VERY good for business American Eagle Outfitters' , fueled by a controversial Sydney Sweeney ad campaign that sparked debate but drove unprecedented customer interest, boosting the retailer's appeal among Gen Z shoppers. | | ---|---|--- Celebrity Campaigns Surge : Partnerships with Sydney Sweeney and Travis Kelce generated 40 billion ad impressions, adding over 700,000 new customers, revitalizing American Eagle's brand. Sales Forecast Improves : The retailer expects flat annual comparable sales, surpassing analysts' predicted 1.1% drop, signaling confidence in sustained demand. Controversy Sparks Debate : Sweeney's "Great Jeans" campaign faced backlash for perceived racial undertones, yet it significantly increased brand visibility and engagement. Economic Challenges Persist : Despite marketing success, American Eagle faces economic uncertainty, with tariffs potentially adding $70 million in costs in the second half of 2025. The woke marketing agencies behind Cracker Barrel disaster are named and shamed Cracker Barrel's rebrand, unveiled in August 2025, sparked fierce backlash for ditching its iconic logo, forcing the chain to restore its nostalgic "Old Timer" design after customers revolted online and | | ---|---|--- Partnered with Marketing Firms : Cracker Barrel collaborated with Prophet, Viral Nation, and Blue Engine for its rebrand, aiming to modernize its image, but the firms faced scrutiny for the controversial logo change. Social Media Campaign : Viral Nation crafted a social media push to engage younger audiences, yet the campaign failed to quell outrage over the logo and sterile store redesigns. Financial and Cultural Impact : The rebrand led to a $143 million market value drop, highlighting the risks of alienating loyal customers by altering a brand's nostalgic identity. Customer Sentiment Ignored : Despite earlier warnings from investor Sardar Biglari, Cracker Barrel's leadership dismissed concerns, underestimating the emotional connection customers had with the original branding. Macy's shares soar despite anticipated tariff challenges Macy's shares as the retailer raised its 2025 profit and sales forecasts, defying tariff pressures, with revamped stores and luxury brands driving optimism in New York. | | ---|---|--- Turnaround Strategy Pays Off : Macy's turnaround plan, including closing 150 underperforming stores and investing "[in] high-potential locations," boosts sales, with 125 revamped stores showing 1.1% comparable sales growth. Luxury Brands Shine : Bloomingdale's and Bluemercury chains saw stronger demand, with comparable sales up 4.8% and 6.2% respectively, offsetting weaker performance at Macy's namesake stores. Selective Price Adjustments : Macy's is selectively raising prices to mitigate tariff impacts, maintaining competitive pricing while diversifying its supply chain to balance costs. Strong Financial Performance : Second-quarter net sales hit $4.81 billion, beating estimates of $4.76 billion, with adjusted earnings of 41 cents per share, surpassing Wall Street's 18-cent forecast. SEC's bold plan for Crypto in America goes public The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to overhaul cryptocurrency regulations and ease Wall Street rules, aiming to integrate digital assets into traditional finance markets. | | ---|---|--- Crypto Rules Overhauled : The SEC's agenda includes proposing rules for digital asset sales, potentially offering exemptions and safe harbors to foster crypto's growth. Exchange Trading Enabled : Amendments under consideration would allow cryptocurrencies to trade on national securities exchanges and alternative trading systems. Wall Street Relief : The SEC plans to reduce burdensome regulations, responding to Wall Street's calls for streamlined compliance processes. I know you get a ton of emails – from other campaigns, and even from ours. **So let me start with this: you’re not an ATM.** When I decided to run for Congress, I promised myself this campaign would never be about treating people like dollar signs. Because the truth is, what powers our movement isn’t money – it’s people. It’s the farmworker who spends a long day in the fields, then still finds time to volunteer. It’s the teacher who brings her students to a community forum so they can see democracy in action. It’s the small business owner who believes the Valley deserves leaders who actually listen. That’s what this campaign is about. Not corporate PACs. Not billionaire donors. But neighbors, families, and communities standing together to demand the representation we deserve. And yes, running a grassroots campaign takes resources. But when you chip in, you’re not just donating. | MassGOP Post-Labor Day Update
---
---
| Dear Republican Friends,
Summer is almost officially behind us, and we're entering the fall with renewed determination to elect more Republicans to city offices this fall and Beacon Hill in 2026.
The MassGOP spent this summer with our heads down and doing our homework -- raising funds, readying our 2026 convention plans, and spreading the Republican message to voters who want more than one-party rule in Massachusetts.
We have made remarkable progress since our last update to you in June.
Political:
Our focus this fall is shifting into training for next year's elections. This Saturday will be the first of our trainings spanning this year and next.
If you live in Worcester County please join us! You can [RSVP at this link](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YBgU0nZAVCEVsMfjrj751qX_I2tBZ-X3wo-BggaOeg30ctgESCEhSEmRuHls-UO7ULhgUGOLuPr11L7iJESCRcRW_47do69CTNC9BKe1dsXfLwm6Eg2ER300bo2iLd4i4YgpxV8i84Ebu2k_OEz1WwzNWUGIo6tu9_b5KLR28OaHZV034yb-mwyXTCbtjDB0YFqCngTY0eUYxq78m1h__3eAaUMzusZmh0&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) or the button below.
At these trainings, we'll be discussing filings, fundraising, dates, and data that can help our Republican Town Committees and candidates be most effective in 2026. Don't miss your chance to learn what works!

---
| | [RSVP FOR MASSGOP FALL TRAININGS](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrptMFH_HcxNX4BM5n_YbN5HcRfgmOnJ5ISzJ3uaOJVH3vEHMgLJ97fw1w-JZeTcRtOOhYuRZjZOyA7EAKgOwqcIC6Y846rVvOjBCY1tB0HEDr9FmyWqz0D-F-2z-98CeW42j9AlZCrnXns69XVm3lKDA58n2CQ8Q4oaD8P2BYpk3DTvS1Dx2TkR9mfVaUHSNVrFhAoffUzp82_DtIiXqTj6k=&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==)

| 🚨 Current List of MassGOP Fall Trainings (more to come!) 🚨
WORCESTER Saturday, September 6th Start Time: 10AM Location: Office of Brad Wyatt, 765 W Boylston St -- 2nd Floor, Worcester, MA Note: Park in the lot down the street, not at the Dunkin Donuts.
WESTERN MASS Saturday, October 4th Start Time: 11AM Location: Tony & Penny's Restaurant, 18 Canterbury St, Ludlow, MA
NORTH ESSEX COUNTY Saturday, October 11th Start Time: 10AM Location: Gloucester Fraternity Club, 27 Webster St, Gloucester, MA
MERRIMACK VALLEY Saturday, October 18th Start Time: 12PM Location: Roma Restaurant, 29 Middlesex St, Haverhill, MA
BRISTOL COUNTY (Feat. Sen. Dooner) Saturday, October 25th Start Time: 1PM Location: Wamsutta Club, 427 County St, New Bedford, MA Note: A demonstration of best door-knocking techniques will be led by Sen. Dooner following the speaking portion).
CAPE COD Saturday, November 1st Start Time: 10AM Location: Cape & Islands Board of Realtors Conference Center, 22 Mid-Tech Drive, West Yarmouth, MA
SOUTH ESSEX COUNTY Saturday, November 15th Start Time: 10AM Location: Italian American Citizens Club, 7 Blaney Ave, Peabody, MA

| The trainings will focus heavily on learning Numinar, the MassGOP's voter contact software for 2026. Learn the basics in Worcester this Saturday, or if you're already set up, become a pro by watching our how-to videos made by Alyssa, our MassGOP intern and first Numinar Ambassador. If you want to be an ambassador for your region, please email [mark@massgop.com](mailto:mark@massgop.com) for details.

This form helps jog your memory: Who is the beloved high school coach? Who is the go-to attorney in town? Working together, we can field a historic number of Republican candidates across the Commonwealth in 2026.

| Communications:
Making the case for balanced government has never been easier. Just look at all the ways Governor Maura Healey and the Democratic super-majority have abdicated their responsibilities:
* [Business groups](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YBuqBx_SydoEak3gpgQEcPNj7uX612CMOUF8v6dRwhBv-G1WlMOsE7YoY_1CemJ5Q3AqEAF6LwSY4DM0vUMMpZBo2bsiRWPvozbsqkHv6w-QgDqx601TanJmlmuiV2zKGwaz_qTrQhzuvjsJFYpqSgBw==&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) say so-called "tax cuts" from 2023 are "too little" to keep them operating;
* A [Massachusetts business](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YB9TYdpbpod9DE9ljgojntE9vch_XRMFURnOHx2BbiA3BvssuEjAwBksyb-kgx1HYTHYaPDwqWY3QT0zMrFSHtanZu3ncQ7iQpkvmfAImm3wbNX3aYrQZpVQgvWgGGyG4YZKpbxUc43Lmi6X6m6KRyKKFctVTF9hcANrCnZVYeD8CVfTK04LaKIjZmetIbJB-we_7yN2zkrWI=&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) is suing the Healey administration for what it claims was a backroom deal over green energy highway rest stops;
* Our U.S. Attorney Leah Foley arrested Suffolk County [Sheriff Steve Tompkins](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YB-_SFKB_JxkZWQnzGMUeRMI_729gB01RgVaqqM6mzcGEVPpszG6hYrgV7Lc4YfMcBH7EPOUqYnZyWR3-MyBaSkZ1D3ZvTM5nHkISPfbOh4QsteN0i7KyyFUVS6xDZfAlIfrqveexJRqOg4EwlV3YM_mlSEafgoEQWHKf1-NuGfC4G2pD-vz-xxA==&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) for extortion, leading to his stepping away from office;
* New media reporting uncovered a state program training [migrants and illegal aliens](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YBGO2vgR1kVe5JyIw2vonuJvTy9Muy2idxEn169y7tq1TzyVA8RsW8U5F0lnGWxlwYO4dzPHkUD7kY_8ryrW2SONNYL6k8sw3kD5Nf8x3xC-17N-Z1OSZjUJWcy9LY06UCv_UfelHYSK0HuRRqoOeUCy7cemKqQPV5h6dUn91TPycC5P4UeiSMgA==&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) to become police officers; and,
* Our [GOP caucus on Beacon Hill](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YBqbJDzPBc_6Bu8qoLrdT6mEf9QJzzLooxDunEOwCtbBrxDNA57db0vOFP2LSX2z2wfWiyqcpVQU7Kp6UvwEFYuX-PT-KiSzMN87r1_-vPsOSwpqfgWe6iK3kLL9G2iBO5Fu4ZFt6hoZkqhO_lT0sQGIeV6bVYfqXeLAtggA3ScEGjnEsRqAGQhT15NtT8STYJUYV3Rh-5Xpupy8iwSrvBdg==&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) held the line on taxes while Governor Healey was rebuked by her own party for submitting a bloated budget.

Our own Plymouth County [District Attorney Tim Cruz](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YBWVzY39vSKiEMsoggqmdb_6S9le1t38YYNeEj9MrPkWyy1aG76mDUrqafFb0arse5HGPb-y1vI2U2KjRonDJQ5NFJ5esGHp4P5p9hgaXMrmXE5TnBeyRB_ENQUfpkffq1j241bCEZ7OWCJEDg3w8G2_WjjCmfUDdlWLd8Cq1vbR7dgUdWvFIwQQ==&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) was tapped to serve as President of the National District Attorney Association, proving that Massachusetts Republicans in law enforcement to know best how to keep our communities safe.
At the national level, the Trump administration has called out Massachusetts for its failed migrant shelter system, and we've been right there with him doing the same. [We showed Fox News](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YBktH8WljE-ZXkxvL1GX5R7yBJxb9bklUEZ2TGZ7i3-ka9ol1IjVX0Jsxqsh5qjYVtp4HqsfBwiiP5dwDdE9xQpdPsApscfJZQEKwHtqEukSLnRhVDWnizHYabFsbgg37cDRIO8JTs-hj-4rQ3mQBsw3nYYYiZjhHWxBoNqRA9cMB_qroYiK4xba1omEBa5OrKL8GGU-wM4Uj9_5ImRknJsIiiDnB_pnVWjzuMC_TyER-WYD9TQ8agC67av-XLuam7rl25Do5i7kLaqKVrM-2PDmYAYu10SnpdljjBLdkPfNp3SMnq8jB__SPGR__iPOJxMogF1PFcJG97zR14ftA1YNLyTTS1M13L_6wTgkpIdHIamG43OsAg0iQCsdgW2NmF0i77m5Cbmn9d9pVs5keD4w==&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) how Governor Healey is moving migrants and illegal aliens into permanent housing using the HomeBASE program, giving them up to $30,000 in free rent to stay here forever.
Massachusetts Democrats are pushing their party even further to the left. When Sen. Elizabeth Warren endorsed New York's socialist candidate for mayor, we spoke out.

---
| | [Watch Our Fox News Interview Here](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YB8YXGv7kmZIkyzRjHqvVn8DhpCDaV3ly1xrM_fBWpN6o8QHOg8VwexS9PUgDzYk4TuvYgqVwPAMJoWeKroykvIQ87jbnPeEvxF3M2AkR2-ywtVJn-ft2Qtee9C-JFD6sx&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==)

State Committeewoman Leanne Harris took over as Chair of the Party's Public Relations Committee, which will serve as an arm of the MassGOP that communicates directly with the grassroots. The Committee sent its first newsletter out last month and is always looking for new content, so please reach out to Leanne directly with your ideas by emailing her at [leannejharris@gmail.com](mailto:leannejharris@gmail.com).
The MassGOP's "Back to Normal" digital show continues to pay dividends. After our host Jeff Semon interviewed parents from the Burlington Public Schools concerned about an explicit survey, the U.S. Department of Education [launched a civil rights investigation](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpuy0bWAY89YBKynJybNSwf4BePiNep2eRRDdnFG9CfFli-NUMAjfT4M_iBywnEoUPzeo7Gc73Ztm1efDWCMqS7CgOY5pIuo1inCyP8j6GpfaEm2yd73HfOLSguyxdKXLO46PPm3AfNJ4oJjtoNEKiQ9ThSyL1ruiTC-xEvVZ_RfMPfUPVKu5om8k_pOTlZC6JXV1hicIcL3mpn2Olav5JCE=&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==). | State Committee Meeting:
The State Committee held its most recent meeting on July 31st, and our Members passed four Resolutions that you may read in full on the new [Resolutions page of our website here](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpvAaLByewqDviRnrivnZjfV8CGPJFY_bi9uMBY2cTpcipDaPIaxwCbGl6hAmq6CogQ62WyeoRVYDa6UPzxL2On_8vWphpi8duYnfQMRap0-rHLuKLOU3OcdcEUPSnyazmw==&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==).

1. Resolution that Reinforces 72% of Massachusetts Voters for an Audit of the Legislature
2. Resolution to Keep the Number of Supreme Court Justices to Nine
3. Resolution to Honor the Contributions of Eric Tarpinian-Jachym
4. Resolution to Preserve Columbus Day (special thank you to Ginny Gardner for speaking on behalf of Member Nicky Miceli)

We will continue to post past and future resolutions passed by the State Committee as our page grows.
In addition, we elected two new Officers to manage the Party's finances for 2025-2026, Treasurer Mindy McKenzie and Assistant Treasurer Anthony Ventresca.
---
|
### Election Integrity:

Thanks to the great work of our Election Integrity Committee and its Chair Julie Hall and Kathy Lynch, we have solicited over 250 volunteers committed to helping pursue honest and fair elections across Massachusetts this year and next. If you want to participate with the Committee or the ballot questions pursuing voter ID for elections, please reach out to them directly.
###

### Looking Ahead:

It's easy to be discouraged and think Massachusetts is a lost cause. But I'm reminded every time I speak with the Republican National Committee how outstanding the MassGOP is among our state parties. We're constantly asked to advise other states who want to emulate our practices, and that's in no small part thanks to our tremendous Members of the Republican State Committee and the grassroots activists who inspire us.
Please join us on the road for trainings this fall and consider running for office. Each of us has a small part to play in a statewide plan that will result in retaking the governor's office and building our ranks on Beacon Hill. We can't do it without you.
Share your events on the [MassGOP Events](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K6PYnmkr5x6DiQNQf5XYawCvM3lhASiGh8zLWpWbzhd_4JQlAnNrpsLLKAq3CiUq-9MfOoBUqq0MnuMKByC-KtwVv7_D5zT9hlLRrzSoO2xgvfHcdrUN1SLHsxZyAxjHCeGAmsVoCbPqi8sNeK9ny5IJIq1tPfI9&c=gbo_RtydCTg0dYuqTQm43p__UGh59e2kz3-_MnGft4FiCIJqpZNxeg==&ch=f7saMtwlNnAvJSRnnxMLgCc2fvhASJjXsYjlLmrG64XBWaYV_G3SCw==) page and send us your suggestions. If you have candidate you want to highlight, please share them with us, too. We'll begin highlighting various candidates and ways you can help them directly, so stay tuned for more.
Politics is a team sort, and we care about our teammates -- you! I look forward to seeing you in our classes or holding signs for candidates this fall.
---

The MassGOP spent this summer with our heads down and doing our homework -- raising funds, readying our 2026 convention plans, and spreading the Republican message to voters who want more than one-party rule in Massachusetts. We have made remarkable progress since our last update to you in June. Political: Our focus this fall is shifting into training for next year's elections. This Saturday will be the first of our trainings spanning this year and next. If you live in Worcester County please join us! You can == or the button below. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

The moment we feared is here. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is putting all of us
at risk as he doubles down on his anti-science crusade.

In June, he fired ALL the members of the Center for Disease Control’s
vaccine advisory panel, replacing them with his own vaccine skeptics.
Then, last week, he fired the head of the CDC who had been confirmed by
the Senate just weeks before. After she refused to leave, four top career
officials resigned in protest.

Experts are sounding the alarm that public health and access to lifesaving
vaccines are on the line. And now, over 1,000 current and former Health
and Human Services employees have signed an open letter calling for RFK
Jr. to step down.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33980?source=email-20250904&t=1011&akid=9336%2E5885482%2E1azfUr ]Headline: More than 1,000 current, former HHS employees sign letter
calling on RFK Jr. to resign

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33980?source=email-20250904&t=1012&akid=9336%2E5885482%2E1azfUr ]Together let’s show them that the grassroots has their back and will
demand action. Add your name now: Tell Congress to force RFK Jr. to
resign.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33980?source=email-20250904&t=1013&akid=9336%2E5885482%2E1azfUr ]ADD YOUR NAME

RFK Jr. has a long track record of spreading dangerous misinformation
about vaccines. His reckless lies have fueled outbreaks of preventable
diseases in schools, clinics, and communities. These aren’t just words –
they have real consequences.

It’s not just public health professionals who are concerned. Even
conservative Senators like Bill Cassidy and John Thune are publicly
calling for answers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33980?source=email-20250904&t=1014&akid=9336%2E5885482%2E1azfUr ]Headline: RFK Jr. will face 'hard questions' over CDC shakeup, Thune
says

The cracks are starting to show in Washington. And now it’s up to ALL of
us to turn up the heat to FORCE Congress to stop RFK’s anti-science
rampage before it’s too late.

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is on Capitol Hill and we’re ready to
take action. We’ll work with Senate offices, meet allies, and bird-dog RFK
Jr. at every event. But first we need you to add your name to show
Congress there’s a grassroots demand for accountability.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33980?source=email-20250904&t=1015&akid=9336%2E5885482%2E1azfUr ]RFK Jr. must resign, or Congress must act. Will you add your name now
to stop RFK Jr. from gambling with our families’ health?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33980?source=email-20250904&t=1016&akid=9336%2E5885482%2E1azfUr ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo Peter Willis, The moment we feared is here. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is putting all of us at risk as he doubles down on his anti-science crusade. In June, he fired ALL the members of the Center for Disease Control’s vaccine advisory panel, replacing them with his own vaccine skeptics. Then, last week, he fired the head of the CDC who had been confirmed by the Senate just weeks before. After she refused to leave, four top career officials resigned in protest. Experts are sounding the alarm that public health and access to lifesaving vaccines are on the line. And now, over 1,000 current and former Health and Human Services employees have signed an open letter calling for RFK Jr. to step down. [ ]Headline: More than 1,000 current, former HHS employees sign letter calling on RFK Jr. to resign [ ]Together let’s show them that the grassroots has their back and will demand action. Add your name now: Tell Congress to force RFK Jr. to resign. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME RFK Jr. has a long track record of spreading dangerous misinformation about vaccines. His reckless lies have fueled outbreaks of preventable diseases in schools, clinics, and communities. These aren’t just words – they have real consequences. It’s not just public health professionals who are concerned. Even conservative Senators like Bill Cassidy and John Thune are publicly calling for answers. [ ]Headline: RFK Jr. will face 'hard questions' over CDC shakeup, Thune says The cracks are starting to show in Washington. And now it’s up to ALL of us to turn up the heat to FORCE Congress to stop RFK’s anti-science rampage before it’s too late. Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is on Capitol Hill and we’re ready to take action. We’ll work with Senate offices, meet allies, and bird-dog RFK Jr. at every event. But first we need you to add your name to show Congress there’s a grassroots demand for accountability. [ ]RFK Jr. must resign, or Congress must act. Will you add your name now to stop RFK Jr. from gambling with our families’ health? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win. subject: A few quick questions:
body:

Derek, we have a few quick questions for you: If you knew that a $3 contribution to the DNC would help Democrats win back Congress next year, wouldn’t it be the best $3 you’ve spent this year? If you knew that $3 would go directly toward helping us defeat every single Republican who voted to slash health care and food assistance for millions of people, wouldn’t it feel like the most gratifying donation you’ve ever made? And if we told you that your $3 donation would help us keep the pressure on every single Republican to do their job and ensure the full Epstein files are released to the public, wouldn’t you click the link below to give $3 _right now_? **These questions aren’t rooted in fictional scenarios — this is the work that we’re able to do with the support of grassroots supporters like you.** Your $3 donation helps us invest in organizing across the country, invest in all 50 state parties so they have the resources they need, and fight to elect Democrats who will fight for working families and communities in their states, districts, and communities to stop Trump and his allies from ripping our democracy to shreds. **[**If this work is worth $3 to you, that’s the donation we’re asking you to make to the DNC today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250904_4512_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4512_22930333_fC_Fni&akid=4512%2E22930333%2EfC_Fni) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250904_4512_fr&refcode2=4512_22930333_fC_Fni&akid=4512%2E22930333%2EfC_Fni)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.XG4v41&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=1&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)
---
Team, it’s Sherrod Brown.
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
[**Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between GIFFORDS PAC and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.XG4v41&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=2&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.2aRT2u&amount=10&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=21&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.dnONMu&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=22&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.B8Zbxc&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=23&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.smQfhz&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=24&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.Xj8vgw&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=25&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.2aRT2u&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=26&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Friend, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $10 now, split between GIFFORDS PAC and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.XG4v41&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=27&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.2aRT2u&amount=10&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=46&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.dnONMu&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=47&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.B8Zbxc&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=48&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.smQfhz&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=49&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.Xj8vgw&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=50&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.2aRT2u&refcode=em250904-1-b&t=51&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL)**
---
****
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=52&akid=10797%2E3935704%2E2H6CyL) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Nancy Mace Calls out Pam's "Businesswoman" Image
body:
Nancy Mace for Governor Campaign today called attention to documents obtained by FITSNews implicating Lieutenant Governor Pamela Evette’s husband | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-calls-out-pams-businesswoman-image?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| | **NANCY MACE CALLS OUT PAMELA EVETTE’S FRAUD “BUSINESSWOMAN” IMAGE AMID HUSBAND’S SCANDAL** Nancy Mace for Governor Campaign today called attention to documents obtained by FITSNews implicating Lieutenant Governor Pamela Evette’s husband, David Evette, in an alleged business fraud scheme where he admitted wrongdoing. While Pamela Evette markets herself as a successful businesswoman, records show her husband admitted to diverting company funds “to pay family bills” while running Priority One Services, Inc., forcing a financial settlement to make the company whole. David Evette even said, “While doing this, I knew that it was wrong and I felt bad about it.” “South Carolinians deserve leaders with integrity, not candidates selling a polished business persona while their family’s past tells a very different story,” **said Sydney Long, spokesperson for Nancy Mace.** “Running as a ‘businesswoman’ doesn’t erase Evette’s alleged fraud or questionable ethics. Nancy Mace built her career from the ground up, running a small business, waiting tables at Waffle House, and never being handed a silver spoon. Voters should ask whether Pamela Evette’s fraudulent ‘businesswoman’ image and her husband’s sordid history reflect the values our state truly deserves.” Nancy Mace is bringing common sense conservative leadership to South Carolina families, not self-promotion or corporate spin or unethical values.

---
| [FITSNews Article](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=57b875d78f&e=ddc57b5ede "FITSNews Article")
---
|
