name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: Trump almost got me killed on January 6th. Then he pardoned the people who did it.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sep25.1qlyBC&refcode=em250904-1-f&refcode2=3965.734936.PGPsYN&t=1&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)
---
Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired and directed by Donald Trump.
I have been betrayed by the so-called “party of law and order” — more like the mob and disorder party. The only outreach Trump has done to the J6 officers has been when he called us “pussies” and “thugs” when we were testifying to the January 6 select committee.
Trump calls it a “day of love.” If that’s true, his supporters almost loved me to death.
I can assure you their hearts were not full of love as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed.
All of those “lovely people” got pardons. And now, Trump is going to give full military honors to Ashli Babbitt. No honors for Brian Sicknick, who served in the Air National Guard and died the next day, or for the officers who died by suicide in the aftermath.
MAGA elected officials literally just voted against putting up a plaque at the Capitol to honor my fellow officers for defending them, but Ashli Babbitt gets a 21 gun salute. Babbitt’s family is getting a $5 million settlement, and other rioters are suing for reparations, too. The Justice Department is considering giving it to them — but nothing for the injured January 6th officers.
It’s not easy to look back at that day. It’s not easy to watch things like this happen after what we lived through. It’s not easy to feel like your country has abandoned you after you put your life on the line to defend it. MAGA elected officials cannot even say “thank you” to us.
But Ruben Gallego has not abandoned us. He fought in Iraq, he fought in Congress, and he was ready to fight on January 6th. He’s a friend to the officers who defended the Capitol that day, and he’s on the front line of the fight against Trump and MAGA now.
I know the only way we’ll get true accountability and justice for January 6th is by defeating them. Ruben beat one of Trump’s most extreme MAGA soldiers last year, Kari Lake. He knows how to win, and he’s working overtime to make sure we defeat MAGA everywhere next year.
This is the most important thing anyone can do to stop Trump. So, I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help support my friend Ruben.
[**Can you make today the day you make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego? Help me make sure he has everything he needs to take the fight to Trump and the MAGA Right.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sep25.1qlyBC&refcode=em250904-1-f&t=2&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-sep25.a-zHbn&refcode=em250904-1-f&t=21&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-sep25.aC7k03&refcode=em250904-1-f&t=22&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-sep25.oj3RYL&refcode=em250904-1-f&t=23&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-sep25.p4qkkY&refcode=em250904-1-f&t=24&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-sep25.NjhLmK&refcode=em250904-1-f&t=25&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sep25.t19Lf6&refcode=em250904-1-f&t=26&akid=3965%2E734936%2EPGPsYN)**
---
****
Thank you very much,
Aquilino Gonell

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | BREAKING NEWS Joni Ernst will NOT RUN in Iowa’s U.S. Senate race, leaving this must-win seat WIDE OPEN! | | | Top election forecasters have already shifted Iowa in the Democrats’ direction. With this news, the odds just shifted in our favor AGAIN. National Republicans know they’re in BIG trouble, Peter: Joni’s departure will put them in danger of losing the seat that could decide Senate control. So, while the other side scrambles, we MUST seize this momentum to take the lead in this race. This may be the most important moment of our entire campaign. I’m counting on this grassroots team to have my back right now. My team just set a $100,000 Rapid Response Goal we’ve got to hit in the next 48 hours. | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Josh | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

subject: The Republican plot to rewrite the U.S. Constitution:
body:
This possibility is much, much closer than you'd imagine |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114612865/567586185/-877057620?sourceid=1056941&refcode=WUEFE904_20250904_ConCon_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFhOThiYi1iNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJPdVVpEAvhc5WrrD4HL6bDYsAKqnsBGVdKP_PMgiSA=) Peter,

We know Republicans are working to destroy our fundamental freedoms from every angle. They're banning abortion, attacking IVF, and, based on rumblings from certain Republican-controlled legislatures, coming for birth control next. They're radically reshaping our courts and destroying our federal workforce. They're flouting foundational American ideals in order to fashion the current president into an unstoppable tyrant.

**They've made it clear, in other words, that their goal is to attack the very root of what defines America.**

And there's one plan of attack that doesn't get enough attention: **The Republican plot to rewrite the U.S. Constitution.** You read that right: If the GOP controls enough state legislatures, they can call a constitutional convention and _rewrite_ our country's founding document.

[**State races are ground zero in the fight for our freedoms. Please donate to EMILYs List today if you're ready to help Democratic pro-choice women WIN at every level of office, everywhere:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114612871/567586223/-877057620?sourceid=1056941&refcode=WUEFE904_20250904_ConCon_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFhOThiYi1iNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJPdVVpEAvhc5WrrD4HL6bDYsAKqnsBGVdKP_PMgiSA=) | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114612881/567586235/-140265690?sourceid=1056941&refcode=WUEFE904_20250904_ConCon_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFhOThiYi1iNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJPdVVpEAvhc5WrrD4HL6bDYsAKqnsBGVdKP_PMgiSA=)
---
Republicans have been working for decades to overwhelm state legislatures and rewrite the rules to ensure they stay in power at all costs. 28 states have already pledged to call for a constitutional convention, which means Republicans need to convince just SIX more to enshrine their anti-choice, anti-democracy ideas into our Constitution.

**I'm here to tell you we won't let that happen.** We've been working to build governing majorities in critical states for decades, because we know that state legislatures are vital in protecting our rights. This cycle is no different: we have strong Democratic pro-choice women running at the state level in both 2025 and 2026. **_Every win_ for a Democratic pro-choice woman means Republicans get further from their goal. **
[**That's why we need you, Peter. Take a stand for our freedoms by supporting our work to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. Join the movement by donating here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114612886/567586253/-877057620?sourceid=1056941&refcode=WUEFE904_20250904_ConCon_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFhOThiYi1iNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJPdVVpEAvhc5WrrD4HL6bDYsAKqnsBGVdKP_PMgiSA=)

clean_body: This possibility is much, much closer than you'd imagine | = Peter, We know Republicans are working to destroy our fundamental freedoms from every angle. They're banning abortion, attacking IVF, and, based on rumblings from certain Republican-controlled legislatures, coming for birth control next. They're radically reshaping our courts and destroying our federal workforce. They're flouting foundational American ideals in order to fashion the current president into an unstoppable tyrant. They've made it clear, in other words, that their goal is to attack the very root of what defines America. And there's one plan of attack that doesn't get enough attention: The Republican plot to rewrite the U.S. Constitution. You read that right: If the GOP controls enough state legislatures, they can call a constitutional convention and rewrite our country's founding document. = | = Republicans have been working for decades to overwhelm state legislatures and rewrite the rules to ensure they stay in power at all costs. 28 states have already pledged to call for a constitutional convention, which means Republicans need to convince just SIX more to enshrine their anti-choice, anti-democracy ideas into our Constitution. I'm here to tell you we won't let that happen. We've been working to build governing majorities in critical states for decades, because we know that state legislatures are vital in protecting our rights. This cycle is no different: we have strong Democratic pro-choice women running at the state level in both 2025 and 2026. Every win for a Democratic pro-choice woman means Republicans get further from their goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for taking a stand, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Mike Nellis - Endless Urgency
subject: If Democrats Want to Rebuild Trust, Start with the Epstein Files
body:
If we don't at least try to hold the rich and powerful criminals accountable, why should anyone trust us to fight for them?

| |
---|---|---

# [If Democrats Want to Rebuild Trust, Start with the Epstein Files](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=172810138&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyODEwMTM4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcwMDkzNjEsImV4cCI6MTc1OTYwMTM2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c0aCMpSd1HyyZaG79GVDPZ0EvrFzy5OqC2pnm6ekXL4)
### If we don't at least try to hold rich and powerful criminals accountable, why should anyone trust us to fight for them?
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Sep 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=172810138&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyODEwMTM4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NzAwOTM2MSwiZXhwIjoxNzU5NjAxMzYxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8EkXguhH84AG9MBIHmCTRbetNljMdIUeTfFuQYazs7o&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=172810138&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyODEwMTM4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcwMDkzNjEsImV4cCI6MTc1OTYwMTM2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c0aCMpSd1HyyZaG79GVDPZ0EvrFzy5OqC2pnm6ekXL4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=172810138&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyODEwMTM4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcwMDkzNjEsImV4cCI6MTc1OTYwMTM2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c0aCMpSd1HyyZaG79GVDPZ0EvrFzy5OqC2pnm6ekXL4)
---
| | [](https://substack..azMeMqBxVZQ7sywdIOa2B9_fY3V4j_GF4J7DnL_hOms?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/if-democrats-want-to-rebuild-trust?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

There's been this wave of advice--from some Democratic strategists and online commentators--that we should move past Donald Trump's Epstein cover-up and stick to the so-called "kitchen table" issues like the economy. And I've gotta say: I'm incredibly frustrated with the shallowness of that thinking.
Yesterday, I watched survivors speak--some of them for the first time--about the horrific abuse they endured at the hands of Jeffrey Epstein, Ghislaine Maxwell, and the army of enablers who protected them. And yes, that includes Donald Trump, Alex Acosta, and even Robert Kennedy Jr. I got angry. Not just at the perpetrators, but at the people who want us to look away. To move on. To stay quiet.
So let me be clear about why we can't afford to let this go--not morally, not politically, not strategically.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/57b132f6-ce47-4cab-b008-73550068f611?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/57b132f6-ce47-4cab-b008-73550068f611?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### The Moral Case
There are reportedly over a thousand victims. Young women and men, sexually and psychologically abused and trafficked--while the U.S. government looked the other way. The list of rich, powerful people who either participated in this or protected it is long, and too few have faced any consequences.
Those survivors who spoke up yesterday showed more courage than most elected officials ever have. They deserve justice--not just "being heard," not just vague sympathy. Real accountability. It might be unrealistic to expect every perpetrator or enabler to be prosecuted, but are we really saying that the only two people who'll ever face charges are Epstein--who died under suspicious circumstances--and Maxwell, who Trump will likely pardon when his term is over? Seriously, bank on that.
This is what people mean when they say we live in a two-tiered justice system. If you're rich, famous, or well-connected, you can ruin lives and walk away untouched. It happened after the 2008 financial collapse--millions lost their homes, and no one went to jail. That betrayal still haunts us, and Democrats paid the price for failing to hold anyone accountable.
And now it's happening again. Whether it's Epstein or Diddy or whoever's next, the pattern is the same: rich men get protected, their victims get forgotten. A thousand survivors, and we're supposed to believe there are only two criminals? Are you fucking kidding me?
Why would anyone trust a justice system that lets that happen just because the perpetrators are wealthy and tight with the President?
If we want Americans to believe in democracy again--if we want to show that the Democratic Party actually stands for something--we can't flinch from this. This is the fight. The fight for justice. The fight to prove that no one is above the law. The fight to show we don't just talk about fairness--we mean it.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/57b132f6-ce47-4cab-b008-73550068f611?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/57b132f6-ce47-4cab-b008-73550068f611?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **The Politics.**
This scandal is an existential threat to Trump and the Republican Party. It fractures his base, energizes ours, and disgusts the independents who hate both parties. The polling shows it. Democrats are fired up. Every single Democratic member of Congress voted to release the Epstein files--only a few Republicans joined them.
And now, conservative influencers are panicking. InfoWars doesn't know which side to take. Andrew Schultz, Joe Rogan, Theo Von--they're all shitting on Trump over Epstein now. Trump's coalition is fraying, and it's happening earlier than he can afford.
So why the hell would we pull back now?
Ro Khanna, Robert Garcia, Thomas Massie--and more--are right to keep pushing. It's the right thing to do. It's what Congress should be doing when a corrupt president and his Attorney General bury the crimes of the ultra-wealthy.
Are some Democrats nervous because a few of our own people might be in those files? Fine. Let the truth come out. I'll accept that. Because this isn't just about hurting Trump--it's about showing who we are. A party that is not blind to party allegiance in the face justice. That we'll fight for the victims, not cover for our friends. That we're willing to go wherever the truth leads. And follow through on it.
We don't know everything Trump's done--but we know what he doesn't want us to see. We know he's lied. About his relationship with Epstein. About calling it a hoax. About releasing the files. About what his allies were involved in.
On both ethics and politics, this is the right fight.
And if Democrats can't find the courage on their own, they should borrow it from the survivors who spoke yesterday--who risked their privacy, their healing, and their safety to demand justice. We owe them the same level of resolve.
When we take back the Senate and House next year--and the White House in 2028--we'll have a real opportunity to show what the Democratic Party is made of. Who we fight for. What we do with power.
Let the Epstein cover-up be the entry point. Let it be the proof that we're serious about fixing what's broken in this country. That we mean what we say. That justice and fairness and opportunity isn't just for the privileged few.
It's for everybody.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/57b132f6-ce47-4cab-b008-73550068f611?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

Donald Trump knows Americans disapprove of his MAGA agenda – **Trump’s disapproval rating stands at 55% according to the Economist.**

body:
Being LGBTQI+ isn’t a disease, and it’s certainly not something that can or should be “fixed” by a therapist.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114614104/567590411/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-09-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTc4YjE0Mi1iOTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk01wQ8aOukwOyVhkjAQ_u8nYc4KVxOxtTO3HmvHHy0=)
---
| Peter,

Being LGBTQI+ isn’t a disease, and it’s certainly not something that can or should be “fixed” by a therapist.

But right now, the Supreme Court is considering whether to uphold state bans on conversion therapy for minors. This practice has been discredited and condemned by every leading medical and mental health association. It is harmful, dangerous, and puts the well-being of LGBTQ+ youth at risk.

As Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, I’m proud to stand with House Democrats in calling on the Court to protect these young people and uphold these bans. But we need to show that the American people are with us.

That’s why I’m asking you today:

**👉 **[_**Will you add your name to demand the Supreme Court protect LGBTQ+ youth and uphold bans on conversion therapy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114614105/567590412/-1137224667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTc4YjE0Mi1iOTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lk01wQ8aOukwOyVhkjAQ_u8nYc4KVxOxtTO3HmvHHy0=&emci=5778b142-b989-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5a78b142-b989-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6681226)

– Linda

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Straight from the mouth of NBC's Chuck Todd, folks:
“Is anyone really happy with this bizarre Electoral College system we use today to decide our president?”
The answer is no. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again. And there are legitimate ways to do it!
From constitutional amendments to ideas like the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact and more, we can make this happen. We just need your support.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. Please, chip in $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=090425_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=090425_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=090425_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=090425_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=090425_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=090425_1&amount=250] Other Amount [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=090425_1&amount=35]
The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote. It's clear that they want to use the Electoral College and more as a basis to make sure they never lose an election again.
We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California.
We need your help to make it happen, Team. Support our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=090425_1&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Straight from the mouth of NBC's Chuck Todd, folks: “Is anyone really happy with this bizarre Electoral College system we use today to decide our president?” The answer is no. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again. And there are legitimate ways to do it! From constitutional amendments to ideas like the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact and more, we can make this happen. We just need your support. Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. name: Team Tina
subject: Trump is trying to bully Oregon. Tina won’t be intimidated.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
We won’t turn our backs on our neighbors |
#
---
Peter, Donald Trump is trying to bully Oregon into abandoning our state’s sanctuary law. He’s threatened funding, lawsuits, and even prosecution of public officials. But Governor Kotek made it clear: _**Oregon will not back down.**_ **[When our values and neighbors are under attack, it’s up to all of us to speak out. Add your name to show your support for Tina’s decision to protect Oregon’s sanctuary law and reject Trump’s intimidation tactics.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114614852/567593025/-288985481?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2QzMjQ0My1iYjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pGvMQm9n6hbBf_KQJ9Iavxk-0E-imKYD6R9A6IJ3V4=&emci=2b29673b-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=93d32443-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15353729)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114614853/567593026/-288985481?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2QzMjQ0My1iYjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pGvMQm9n6hbBf_KQJ9Iavxk-0E-imKYD6R9A6IJ3V4=&emci=2b29673b-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=93d32443-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15353729)
---
Our nearly 40-year-old sanctuary law, which has been upheld by voters, ensures local law enforcement can focus on public safety rather than doing the job of federal immigration officials.
But Trump and his allies are trying to force Oregonians to turn our backs on our immigrant neighbors who work hard, pay taxes, and make our communities stronger._**That’s not who we are, Peter — and we need to make sure they hear it loud and clear. **_
**[Add your name today to show you support Tina’s response to protect Oregon’s values and our state’s sanctuary law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114614854/567593027/-288985481?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2QzMjQ0My1iYjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pGvMQm9n6hbBf_KQJ9Iavxk-0E-imKYD6R9A6IJ3V4=&emci=2b29673b-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=93d32443-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15353729)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114614855/567593028/-288985481?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2QzMjQ0My1iYjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pGvMQm9n6hbBf_KQJ9Iavxk-0E-imKYD6R9A6IJ3V4=&emci=2b29673b-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=93d32443-bb89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15353729)

When our communities are under threat, Oregonians come together to defend one another.
Thank you for adding your voice,
Team Tina

What’ll you have? I’m running for Congress, but I haven’t stopped waitressing here in Eau Claire. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114615008/567593446/818649939?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.04_OTS-Rebecca-Cooke-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWFhODdjMi1iYjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hxMCDzdVy0GAu4rXcn_RGiUKm1eoOAgKneo1_G44SA=) I’ve been serving since I was a teenager — helping to put myself through school and make ends meet. I love this job, and I think there’s real dignity in hospitality work. I also believe the lessons you learn waiting tables can apply everywhere, even in Congress. This campaign is built on the same values you learn on the restaurant floor: hard work, respect, and showing up for people, no matter what. I think Washington could use more of these values — and fewer career politicians and billionaires who’ve never worked or waited tables in their life. That’s why I’m running — and that’s why I’m asking: **[_Can you throw some love into the tip jar for Off the Sidelines PAC and me to bring real change to Washington? name: Donald John Trump
subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2074elaxwssbuycxvw2tgd03xoafafocus88c0sn937pntfstg3h7e87rjchg8nc5hru2wr5o2ez0cv625i&__stmp=t22u44&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t22u44&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3m72xmyx6ty0nn8k4scaoi14tuykmdnybx9vzmo72mhi0n2iopluxjy4z4pz4gvdm6khmgtr36v9hsqo0yfib7b83trpmfgex01whqd1pe72j0zyyodgy69daqde6gqvnpquvpf2xo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t22u44&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t22u44&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t22u44&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t22u44&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3m72xmyx6ty0nn8k4scaoi14tuykmdnybx9vzmo72mhi0n2iopluxjy4z4pz4gvdm6khmgtr36v9hsqo0yfib7b83trpmfgex01whqd1pe72j0zyyodgy69daqde6gqvnpquvpf2xo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t22u44&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t22u44&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| Here in Michigan, we know how devastating a bad storm can be. Families lose homes, communities face weeks of cleanup, and the workers who keep us safe are stretched thin.

That’s why it’s so alarming to see Donald Trump and his allies weakening FEMA, the agency tasked with keeping Americans safe when disaster strikes.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114615667/567595552/834583907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjUzODRiOS1iZDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nev5MZNyfmQqRVruMscY6u-yiCvUQ2lc5k-MeTPKyHk=&emci=1a246ab3-bd89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=965384b9-bd89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=750857)

That’s why it’s so alarming to see Donald Trump and his allies weakening FEMA, the agency tasked with keeping Americans safe when disaster strikes. 🚨 FEMA employees themselves are sounding the alarm. They say Trump’s policies are delaying emergency response, cutting critical programs, and even driving out career experts who know how to keep families safe. So I’m asking for your voice: | | | Thank you for making your voice heard. – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . These Republican-funded ads repeat the GOP’s same old false claims in an effort to tear down state judges who are upholding our democracy.
November’s elections in Pennsylvania will ask voters to retain three sitting justices known for standing up to Republicans’ anti-democratic policies – **these elections will decide the court’s balance of power and could affect the next redistricting efforts.**
The GOP is dumping seven-figures into these races – and right-wing activists are calling their extreme MAGA base into action. They know the impact these races could have on reproductive freedom, civil rights, and redistricting in a key swing state.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Congress’s chief Islamophobe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Both Rashida and I have a message for Randy: We’re not going anywhere.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1796%2E791427%2EXMOHqL)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25-tlaib.mScH2B&refcode=em250904-1-180&t=2&akid=1796%2E791427%2EXMOHqL)
Friend — Randy Fine, Congress’s chief Islamophobe, is at it again.
This time, he’s calling my colleague and sister in struggle Rashida Tlaib the “ugly face of Islam in America”, adding: “It’s up to us to stop them.”
Friend, Randy Fine didn’t say “radical Islam” or “Islamic extremism”, the usual right-wing dogwhistles. No, in his tweet, Randy Fine is simply attacking all Muslim people in America. Saying that they must be “stopped.”
Just imagine if he was talking about any other religion. Imagine if a member of Congress called one of their colleagues “the ugly face of Christianity” or “the ugly face of Judaism.” They would rightfully be met with immediate, sweeping condemnation. But for Republicans, Muslim people are fair game for hateful attacks.
**Randy Fine is a racist bigot who has made it clear that he wants Muslim people to be forced out of American society.**
Well, both Rashida and I have a message for Randy: **_We’re not going anywhere.**_
In the video clip that Randy is reacting to, Rashida Tlaib is showing more moral courage and compassionate leadership than he ever could.
Rashida has watched from afar for two long years as her Palestinian brothers and sisters are bombed, shot, and starved to death. She has led the growing movement to secure a ceasefire, end military aid to Israel, and end the occupation of Palestine.
**That’s the real reason that Randy Fine is afraid of Rashida — day in and day out she exposes the lies of the pro-genocide, pro-Israel far-right that Randy represents.**
As the only two Muslim women in Congress, this kind of stuff isn’t new for Rashida and I. That’s why we stick together, and why we stick with this beautiful progressive movement. Because we are stronger when we are together in solidarity, standing up to racist attacks and staying focused on the fight for justice for all.
**[If you can, please support Rashida and I by splitting a contribution between our campaigns today. Your donation today sends a message that we will not be intimidated by racist name calling from incompetent Republicans like Randy Fine. Your donation sends a message that we will not give up the fight for the safety and dignity of Palestinians.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25-tlaib.mScH2B&refcode=em250904-1-180&t=3&akid=1796%2E791427%2EXMOHqL)

clean_body: Both Rashida and I have a message for Randy: We’re not going anywhere. Friend — Randy Fine, Congress’s chief Islamophobe, is at it again. This time, he’s calling my colleague and sister in struggle Rashida Tlaib the “ugly face of Islam in America”, adding: “It’s up to us to stop them.” Friend, Randy Fine didn’t say “radical Islam” or “Islamic extremism”, the usual right-wing dogwhistles. No, in his tweet, Randy Fine is simply attacking all Muslim people in America. Saying that they must be “stopped.” Just imagine if he was talking about any other religion. Imagine if a member of Congress called one of their colleagues “the ugly face of Christianity” or “the ugly face of Judaism.” They would rightfully be met with immediate, sweeping condemnation. But for Republicans, Muslim people are fair game for hateful attacks. Randy Fine is a racist bigot who has made it clear that he wants Muslim people to be forced out of American society. Well, both Rashida and I have a message for Randy: We’re not going anywhere. In the video clip that Randy is reacting to, Rashida Tlaib is showing more moral courage and compassionate leadership than he ever could. Rashida has watched from afar for two long years as her Palestinian brothers and sisters are bombed, shot, and starved to death. She has led the growing movement to secure a ceasefire, end military aid to Israel, and end the occupation of Palestine. Peter, do you hear the call? A nation in crisis needs you to help defend our democracy at every level of government. Local school boards, city councils, county commissions, and more need dedicated people like you to build local power and stop authoritarianism from taking root in our communities. We know that’s a BIG DEAL, so we want to make sure you have the necessary support to win and make a difference. Join us for our first Local Democracy Project virtual training where you’ll learn what it takes to run for office and launch a successful campaign! **[Training#1: Understanding What it Takes to Run, September 17, 6:00-7:00pm PT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nsSfQmGl1-n75GcF1au1lu-hGBR9gnfQtYqYHpon1N-J6s1eb8Gt0p9dYfL1RgemFW2FaEn051BmIfbvg9hiGPsJggMJSFiv-94Y5yefSuCA9NeTxVhIqpzquoDnP27O1r1iqBPMfZPk2Rwda_pVKnxgyfrBZdlY3VHQUDtJ5FcgFUEXeuZzrHkgJHEQ8ERSvzJ1GYLRLlmKxVtahKQYm0vAjX7fHva8UzjCbkY-o8mEFnV__omhBmNnXgGpmSn0sWUglL_aR7vLLE4U90RPxkj2ONBmO4LREyevt9bS11KnAq0XSgmdYzT0aIiaq9HM/4jm/zTgtEGdARVa_y3w1JRxeDg/h1/h001.lEMlIvyz7zuxAm9mOkHayfDRhqNfpkQewxe_XkI3puQ)** Hear from Local Democracy Project Executive Director and former congressional candidate Derek Marshall, Hesperia City Councilmember Chris Ochoa, and learn what it takes to build a strong campaign - fundraising, door knocking, building a platform - and WIN! | | | | Hi Peter, [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/GCxCOk0tNqcNzjmls3AjKw~~/AAUS1hA~/qCy3vIzwgu8dt-SDu5eGx0qaZqICO4gTwyUFu8MnrRgEGBnQ3JPJuNSI8pd0OboNxer0AUDHBvg0CQqCPXjlo6dd8ssMJGQOyCl0dyjUaeowRfvWvcXKLJEZLzNGA-VM6q6rHbNoCXo-lel0N5xvgdpVnRsrWB0E64oRXlw4jnSQa1rQwbgMX1Kj8D6SadLiWbBUgb_14giurXxGAVch8VrgTBxmQru60rRTFwehd3ZJpC3HKMVtwf-eTcaYEQmGIDAQ95k33ObTplJqqnCOcA~~) This is me years ago – just a kid from Nashville, learning the value of hard work from my mom. She was a single parent, a proud union member and the reason I know what it means to show up for your community. I’ve spent my life working hard – my first job at 14, driving my mom to work at 15, building small businesses while going to school, supporting my family and raising my two daughters with my wife Ericka. Every step has taught me that life isn’t about shortcuts – it’s about showing up, every day, for the people who depend on you. That’s exactly what I’ve tried to do in the Tennessee State Legislature. I’ve fought for working families, stood up against corruption and passed laws that make life a little easier – from education reforms to helping to suspend the grocery sales tax. I didn’t do it for headlines. I did it because it was the right thing to do. Now, I’m taking that fight to Congress. Housing costs, healthcare, and everyday bills are too high, and working families deserve someone who will deliver results, not play politics. **[I hope you’ll join me in this campaign. Every dollar helps us reach voters, build our team, and stand up for the families who’ve been forgotten for too long.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/gwABrQYRgwmbqXqb014bLw~~/AAUS1hA~/qCy3vIzwgu8dt-SDu5eGx0qaZqICO4gTwyUFu8MnrRgEGBnQ3JPJuNSI8pd0OboNxer0AUDHBvg0CQqCPXjlo6dd8ssMJGQOyCl0dyjUaeowRfvWvcXKLJEZLzNGA-VM6q6rHbNoCXo-lel0N5xvgdpVnRsrWB0E64oRXlw4jnSQa1rQwbgMX1Kj8D6SadLi3EKVC9ezvjrorLeWMgou5WUzE7V70I-YJE_7AWPrXrqG9W0ajyVnD2IBkE0rVmQaeJ1CNFgpd2MNFfSvVwKvZQ~~)** **[**DONATE $25**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/9NFonggu9JoUoXT3YorZWw~~/AAUS1hA~/WV5vxPOTYAyjbZN8aYeSoryMFZvmcQ86Fkl-NyvslRKZeB_cd-B5Z2CJdKJAY9zS8VJ9AM4jRVshZLpTUtuaxg74NuzBa6Bx7egUbSBkQqY9MYh0yst7zfpm7h9V5OD6AMCVJmS2zv6bwL3OEtcUKXMlCDoJuWAY3jdp5Pk0M5Vwp2F3m7aXJIwM9gijzyvXl9cXoi34DcoRiiQd8congdcuEp42u2efWEOczXQ0pN8taSkeXuS7mMKnMV-m9U3b_OL_WW8mpkdPQuAym6QQR2xO7qYwSO5brgLraHHyZWk~) ** Thanks for believing in this fight. I’ll never stop showing up for Tennessee. In solidarity,
Vincent Dixie
Candidate for Congress, TN-07

* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/9NFonggu9JoUoXT3YorZWw~~/AAUS1hA~/WV5vxPOTYAyjbZN8aYeSoryMFZvmcQ86Fkl-NyvslRKZeB_cd-B5Z2CJdKJAY9zS8VJ9AM4jRVshZLpTUtuaxg74NuzBa6Bx7egUbSBkQqY9MYh0yst7zfpm7h9V5OD6AMCVJmS2zv6bwL3OEtcUKXMlCDoJuWAY3jdp5Pk0M5Vwp2F3m7aXJIwM9gijzyvXl9cXoi34DcoRiiQd8congdcuEp42u2efWEOczXQ0pN8taSkeXuS7mMKnMV-m9U3b_OL_WW8mpkdPQuAym6QQR2xO7qYwSO5brgLraHHyZWk~) ** **

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: All eyes on New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
the stakes here are very high

| Peter, every single day since he took office in January, it seems like Donald Trump has found new ways to abuse his power and make life harder for our families.

He’s illegally withheld funding that New Jerseyans rely on for child care, for health care, and for access to healthy food.

He’s deployed the National Guard to American cities in a transparent attempt to instill terror and fear.

He signed a devastating spending bill that guts Medicaid access and makes everything from groceries to heating your home less affordable — all to give billionaires a giant tax cut.

And honestly, that’s just a fraction of it.

**As Trump has inflicted all this damage on our country, Republican politicians like Jack Ciattarelli have cheered him on every step of the way.**

There is seemingly nothing Trump can do — no matter how illegal, reckless, or outright devastating for New Jersey families — that would make Jack Ciattarelli say “enough is enough.”

**And Peter, polls show that Ciattarelli is within a few percentage points of becoming New Jersey’s next governor.**

If we’re going to win that race and prevent that from happening, we need to work night and day to get our message out.

I intend to do exactly that, Peter— because the stakes for New Jersey, and for our nation, are too high to give it anything less. But I can’t win this race without your help.

[_**Let’s send a message that the people reject Donald Trump and Jack Ciattarelli’s disastrous agenda, Peter. Let’s send a message that we won’t stand for their attacks on working families or on the rule of law — and that we’re ready to lead the way with a better path forward. Please rush a split donation between my campaign and Laura Gillen’s today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114616401/567598205/139688667?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-09-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGE0NmYzNS1jMTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8XA-j9R4lxStKbnar9lvpDWBQc8AAdyH_Tcqy9q-cMo=)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 9/4/2025
body:
Douglas County sheriff defies Freedom From Religion Foundation after it targeted Grandparents4Kids story hour
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey folks!
🚨 Day 2 of the **Durango 9R Dirty Dozen** : A band teacher hired during COVID molested 37 kids & now faces 56 federal charges. How did this happen—and who’s accountable? Parents demand answers.
Watch & share ➡️ **[Instagram](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [Facebook](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [X](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [TikTok](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Critics say [“green” building code mandates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) are driving up housing costs with little climate benefit, while small business owners complain they’re being [shut out of air quality hearings](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). [Gun rights advocates are suing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over Colorado’s new semiautomatic firearm law, calling it unconstitutional, and liberal groups are pushing a [2026 ballot measure to unwind TABOR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with a graduated income tax. Meanwhile, former Senator Cory Gardner has been [tapped to lead the Internet & Television Association](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and the “Make America Healthy Again” movement is [uniting unlikely allies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) around clean air, water, and healthier lifestyles.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Trump announced U.S. Space Command will move from Colorado Springs to Alabama, and said the Colorado's [ballot system was a "big factor" in the decision](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)——a move state leaders say endangers national security. Conservatives are also [struggling with older Gen Z voters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), who remain more aligned with Democrats even as the youngest bloc leans right. Yet one issue is bridging divides: a bipartisan push to [ban phones in classrooms](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with 39 states adopting restrictions to curb smartphone-driven anxiety and distraction.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** The loss of Space Command to Alabama underscores how political games carry [billion-dollar consequences for Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In Fort Morgan, [HGTV’s makeover](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) brought short-term buzz but failed to deliver lasting revival, showing that true renewal comes from faith, family, and community investment—not Hollywood. And as Christians mourn the Minneapolis Catholic school shooting victims, many [call for deeper prayer and resilience](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), insisting faith must remain strong even when mocked by the world.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, September 4, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Douglas County sheriff defies Freedom From Religion Foundation after it targeted Grandparents4Kids story hour](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY STEVE MCKENNA, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_A funny thing happened on my way to my 60s. Concepts of tolerance my parents, teachers, and others taught me as a child evolved. In the 1960s, tolerance meant accepting others, not persecuting them because they were different from you or your friends. Now, in my 60s, it seems more about persecuting those who fail to tolerate to the satisfaction of a bullying minority of ideologues._
_Case in point. To celebrate “See You at the Library” on July 16, Grandparents4Kids, a nonpolitical group I am fortunate to be a part of, planned to have Douglas County Deputy Sheriff read Kevin Sorbo’s book “The Test of Lionhood” at a story hour presented at, but not sponsored by, the Highlands Ranch library. The book follows a young cub, Lucas the Lionhearted, on a treacherous journey where he must show courage and resilience to find the rare ice flower and save his sister Chloe’s life._
_A group called the Freedom From Religion Foundation (FFRF) tried to derail the event by sending a threatening letter to the Sheriff’s office claiming that allowing a deputy to read Sorbo’s book would show “official favoritism toward religion over nonreligion,” potentially violating the US Constitution’s protection of religious freedom._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado Liberal Coalition Seeks To Unwind TABOR With Graduated Income Tax Plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A coalition of liberal advocacy groups is pushing a 2026 ballot measure to replace Colorado’s flat income tax with a graduated system, raising more than $2 billion annually for health care, education, and public safety.
* The plan would hike taxes on those earning over $506,000 a year while cutting rates for the vast majority of taxpayers, with most new revenue projected to come from individuals rather than businesses.
* To qualify, supporters must gather 125,000 signatures from across all 35 Senate districts and win 55% of the statewide vote—an expensive and uphill battle they admit will require millions in funding.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Colorado’s Air Quality Control Commission hearings show how small business voices are shut out](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Small business owners testified that Colorado’s Air Quality Control Commission (AQCC) hearings sideline them by denying “party status,” leaving them without the same legal footing as large NGOs or government-backed groups.
* Jeff Kendall, CEO of Bruin Waste, argued private landfills face stricter rules than municipal ones, putting family-run businesses at a disadvantage when competing with government-owned entities.
* Critics say Governor Polis has stacked unelected boards like the AQCC with political allies, allowing them to pick winners and losers while small businesses bear the brunt of heavy-handed regulations.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[HGTV Can’t Save Small Town America. Fort Morgan Proves it.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 3** _When HGTV came to Fort Morgan in 2023, we were promised a makeover, a shot at national attention, fresh energy, and maybe even prosperity. The pitch was simple: if a camera crew and a few celebrity designers could just spruce up our Main Street, our town would suddenly be “revived.”_
**[Are you racist? The Durango School Board thinks so.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY PROTECT LA PLATA KIDS | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 2** _Durango School District 9-R has spent heavily on a quiet plan to bring diversity, equity and inclusion policies into local classrooms. Attached to this commentary are invoices obtained through CORA requests to the district. They show the board paid Make It Plain Consulting more than $209,000 between 2021 and 2025._
__

**[The new golden calves: Progressives bow to political idols](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 2** _Idolatry is as old as humanity itself. Ancient Israel bowed before golden calves. Rome worshiped its emperors. Today, American progressives practice their own brand of idolatry—transforming politicians, activists, movements, and bureaucracies into secular saints._
__

**🍅 DID YOU KNOW?** **When tomatoes first arrived in Europe, many believed they were dangerous to eat.** Hernán Cortés is thought to have brought tomato seeds from Mesoamerica in 1519, and for centuries the fruit was grown mostly as a garden ornament. By the 1700s, aristocrats began eating tomatoes—but deaths followed, leading people to think the fruit was poisonous. In truth, the tomatoes’ acidity leached lead from pewter plates, and it was lead poisoning—not the tomatoes—that killed them.

Concepts of tolerance my parents, teachers, and others taught me as a child evolved. In the 1960s, tolerance meant accepting others, not persecuting them because they were different from you or your friends. Now, in my 60s, it seems more about persecuting those who fail to tolerate to the satisfaction of a bullying minority of ideologues. Case in point. To celebrate “See You at the Library” on July 16, Grandparents4Kids, a nonpolitical group I am fortunate to be a part of, planned to have Douglas County Deputy Sheriff read Kevin Sorbo’s book “The Test of Lionhood” at a story hour presented at, but not sponsored by, the Highlands Ranch library. The book follows a young cub, Lucas the Lionhearted, on a treacherous journey where he must show courage and resilience to find the rare ice flower and save his sister Chloe’s life. A group called the Freedom From Religion Foundation (FFRF) tried to derail the event by sending a threatening letter to the Sheriff’s office claiming that allowing a deputy to read Sorbo’s book would show “official favoritism toward religion over nonreligion,” potentially violating the US Constitution’s protection of religious freedom. | A coalition of liberal advocacy groups is pushing a 2026 ballot measure to replace Colorado’s flat income tax with a graduated system, raising more than $2 billion annually for health care, education, and public safety. # **[Trump Comments On Actress Who Moved Outside USA](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/ASd5cX0Z6hr63jDL-PMYxw)**
---
When Dan Scavino told us that Trump’s next post might break the Internet, he wasn’t exaggerating—he was warning us. And like clockwork, President Donald Trump dropped a Truth Social bomb so sharp-edged it might as well have come wrapped in barbed wire and sarcasm. The target? A familiar one: Rosie O’Donnell.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/ASd5cX0Z6hr63jDL-PMYxw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/5ur033HLFbyfVJCcXzDLaw)
# **[Reid Comments Stir Debate Online](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/5ur033HLFbyfVJCcXzDLaw)**
---
There’s a certain kind of delusion that stops being funny and starts becoming dangerous. Watching Joy Reid this week is a masterclass in that exact transformation. Because while social media cycles through her latest clips with equal parts amusement and exasperation, it’s worth remembering something very real: this woman was being paid millions by MSNBC [...]

Pritzker’s response was to shrug it off with a line that could only come from a politician insulated from the realities his constituents face: “Big cities have crime.” The comment came during an NBC 5 Chicago interview when [...]

body:
| La Crosse County to Door County and everywhere in between.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4957%2E35263%2EveT8L-)
Peter — We wrapped up our 45-stop tour across Wisconsin, and we made stops from La Crosse County to Door County and everywhere in between. We heard stories from Wisconsinites across zip codes, and one thing is clear: people are concerned about the devastating impacts of Trump’s ugly bill on their lives. Hard working families are at risk of losing their food safety nets. Veterans are at risk of losing access to care. Kids who could miss doctor’s visits due to the cuts in Medicaid. Donald Trump is putting the pockets of billionaires over the needs of everyday people. **[That’s why I’m working hard in the Senate to put a stop to this agenda. Will you stand with me today by pitching in?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-sep25.avzHzX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4957%2E35263%2EveT8L-)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-sep25.i9k4bD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4957%2E35263%2EveT8L-)

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: I want to personally thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I just need your help to ensure your voter profile is up-to-date. | I want to personally thank you, Peter.

Your generous survey responses and financial contributions are helping ensure the Senate stays firmly in Republican hands for years to come.

Patriots like you are the true backbone of our movement--and because of your efforts, President Trump and Senate Republicans have already achieved so many incredible accomplishments.

But we have one problem.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: They won’t stop at Texas to roll back our freedoms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Breaking news out of Texas |
#
---
Breaking news, team: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114618252/567604138/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzVmNjEzMzEtYzM4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ikYxSWuCSoGuTGFi4vB4qZVdY0pStbhlacBNDuP3A9g=) **Texas lawmakers are coming after abortion access with everything they’ve got** — empowering private citizens to sue doctors, pharmacists, or anyone who dares to provide abortion medication in person or by mail. **If signed into law, it would be the first of its kind in the nation** — a dangerous blueprint for anti-choice politicians to replicate across the country. Here in Michigan, we fought back and won protections for reproductive freedom by codifying it into our state constitution. **But let me be clear: Republicans won’t stop at Texas.** They’re working state by state to roll back freedoms we’ve fought for generations to secure. As Governor, I’ve made it my mission to protect the rights of every Michigander. And I started Fight Like Hell PAC to elect and re-elect leaders nationwide who are fighting to protect abortion access everywhere. **[The only way we stop this extreme agenda from spreading is by fighting together. clean_body: Breaking news out of Texas | Breaking news, team: = Texas lawmakers are coming after abortion access with everything they’ve got — empowering private citizens to sue doctors, pharmacists, or anyone who dares to provide abortion medication in person or by mail. If signed into law, it would be the first of its kind in the nation — a dangerous blueprint for anti-choice politicians to replicate across the country. Here in Michigan, we fought back and won protections for reproductive freedom by codifying it into our state constitution. But let me be clear: Republicans won’t stop at Texas. They’re working state by state to roll back freedoms we’ve fought for generations to secure. As Governor, I’ve made it my mission to protect the rights of every Michigander. And I started Fight Like Hell PAC to elect and re-elect leaders nationwide who are fighting to protect abortion access everywhere. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together, we’re going to fight like hell for reproductive rights in Michigan, in Texas, and across the country. Thank you, — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. name: Joe Jaworski
subject: The Texas GOP is embarrassing us
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
It’s ironic. Texas Republicans boast that we’re a “lone star” state that won’t be told what to do while taking orders from Trump. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/jaworski-redistricting-trump-14188843?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2d0a0f6c48&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , It’s ironic. Texas Republicans boast that we’re a “lone star” state that won’t be told what to do—no Medicaid expansion for the working poor, no free summer lunches for children, no connection to the federal electrical grid. But when Donald Trump “asked” Greg Abbott to redraw congressional maps mid-decade? Abbott snapped to attention, and the Legislature obeyed. **Let’s be clear: these new maps weren’t about correcting injustice. They were about one thing: helping Trump keep control of Congress in 2026.** Nearly two centuries ago, Texas heroes defiantly declared “come and take it.” Today’s Republican leaders simply handed “it” over without the slightest resistance. **That’s embarrassing. ** Trump’s politics are calling the shots in Texas. Some may be fine with that. **I’m not.** **I’m running for Attorney General to fight back—to defend democracy, protect voters, and stand up for Texans, not Washington politicians.** But I need your help to keep this campaign strong. [💪 **Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us stop Trump’s power grab and restore integrity to Texas government?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=043ac87eeb&e=5d8d80652b) Texas belongs to its people. Not Donald Trump. [**Read my op-ed in the Galveston County Daily News: Trump said 'jump' and Texas GOP asked 'How high boss?'**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=8baf5856ff&e=5d8d80652b) Onward,

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I am calling on RFK Jr. to resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Lives are needlessly on the line – so please, sign now to demand RFK Jr. be fired.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114618485/567605010/-2054079050?code=jtk905-su-nd&refcode=jtk905-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTNiMWUyOC1jNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VkH-DNlAQB2BTIAdA_5m5yPlcWo_5YviaGI2lzhix0s=)
---
Friend, I just finished questioning RFK Jr. in a Senate Finance Committee hearing, and it is clear he is unfit to lead.
* He's fired thousands of health care workers – _including the director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention._

* He's endangered the future of Medicaid, Medicare and Obamacare _and with them, affordable access to health care for tens of millions of people._

* He's gutted federal grants for medical research _and set back lifesaving cures by**decades.**_

* He's limited access to COVID-19 vaccines across the country _and canceled funding that helps states prepare for future pandemics._

**That is why I am calling for his resignation to protect the American people. **[If you agree, then please click now to be one of the 15,000 people I need to sign my emergency petition calling for him to be fired before 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114618490/567605012/-145463713?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk905-su-nd&refcode=jtk905-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTNiMWUyOC1jNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VkH-DNlAQB2BTIAdA_5m5yPlcWo_5YviaGI2lzhix0s=&emci=9bf123a5-0f89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3e3b1e28-c489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)
He never should've been confirmed in the first place. And every day he's allowed to stay in this role puts American public health even more at risk.
But since my Republican colleagues in the Senate refuse to stand up to Trump, it's going to take a groundswell of public outcry to encourage the president to remove him from office.
**This is important, friend – _[so please: Sign my rapid-response petition before 11:59 p.m. to join me in demanding RFK Jr. be fired.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114618494/567605018/-145463713?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk905-su-nd&refcode=jtk905-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTNiMWUyOC1jNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VkH-DNlAQB2BTIAdA_5m5yPlcWo_5YviaGI2lzhix0s=&emci=9bf123a5-0f89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3e3b1e28-c489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)_**
| | [ADD MY NAME: Fire RFK Jr. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114618498/567605023/-145463713?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk905-su-nd&refcode=jtk905-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTNiMWUyOC1jNDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VkH-DNlAQB2BTIAdA_5m5yPlcWo_5YviaGI2lzhix0s=&emci=9bf123a5-0f89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3e3b1e28-c489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)

This is important, friend – | | Thank you for speaking out alongside me. – Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: GENIUS Act: Cancel Your Money?
body:
Trump Blocked the Digital Dollar. This Law Brings It Back.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10926241/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVlN3WjVaYVdERw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDQ/LbmNseDFCdFk5bA/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYU5SU3laS0Vscw/gaLnm4g/s6vb499b498)

Trump Blocked the Digital Dollar. This Law Brings It Back.
# GENIUS Act Threatens Your Financial Future
The new federal law called the [GENIUS Act](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10926241/VaHR0cHM6Ly9lZi5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGRwYXJ0bmVycy0xNC5jb20vNFQyRjU2L0xDMjZLSC8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDQ/LbmNseDFCdFk5bA/qP3N1YjI9QXVnJnN1YjM9RnJlZVRoaW5rZXJEYWlseU1H/gaLnm4g/s1od56fa9bd) will essentially cancel your money. You see, the government and its allies have found a new way to roll out programmable, trackable digital currency without calling it a CBDC. Now, private corporations like Circle, BlackRock, and Tether are being handed the keys to issue stablecoins& Digital dollars backed by the U.S. government, but controlled by unelected tech and finance elites. This gives them full control to:
* Legally spy on how you spend every penny&
* Freeze your transactions or block your purchases&
* Enforce rules on when, where, or how you can use your money&

**You may think, I'll just never touch a stablecoin.** But here's the problem... **You won't have a choice.** Once these coins are embedded into major apps, banks, payroll systems& Even retail stores, you'll be pushed into using them by default. And once this system goes live across the board? Every American and every business will be trapped inside a financial system they don't control, and can't escape. **[Here's the secret for protecting your money](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10926241/VaHR0cHM6Ly9lZi5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGRwYXJ0bmVycy0xNC5jb20vNFQyRjU2L0xDMjZLSC8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDQ/LbmNseDFCdFk5bA/qP3N1YjI9QXVnJnN1YjM9RnJlZVRoaW5rZXJEYWlseU1H/gaLnm4g/s1od56fa9bd) from Big Tech having full control of...** When...
How...
And even **where** you spend your money. But you don't have to stand for it. You still have time to sidestep the system**but the window is closing fast.** [**Get your free information kit NOW before it's too late.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10926241/VaHR0cHM6Ly9lZi5wcmlvcml0eWdvbGRwYXJ0bmVycy0xNC5jb20vNFQyRjU2L0xDMjZLSC8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDQ/LbmNseDFCdFk5bA/qP3N1YjI9QXVnJnN1YjM9RnJlZVRoaW5rZXJEYWlseU1H/gaLnm4g/s1od56fa9bd) Inside, you'll get the 3 secret strategies you can put in place starting today& So they don't control your money tomorrow.
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10926241/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDQ/LbmNseDFCdFk5bA/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYU5SU3laS0Vscw/gaLnm4g/s1rb1156f1d)

An outright Marxist...
| **_A SECURE BRIEFING AUTHORIZED BY REP. JIM JORDAN_**

Friend,

I never thought I’d see something like this happen in the United States of America...
---

_**...Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash as Democrats Remain Divided**_
**“Far left’s prolific fundraising shows appeal to party’s base”**

The Democrats are only going to get _more extreme_ as they become more and more dependent on cash from radicals who hate America and the values that make our country great.

As long as the America First movement remains united, we can always OUTRAISE the Democrats – no matter how many millions they haul in from their radical donors! --- ]() Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

| | Peter, it's Austin — I'm reaching out with a personal update today. My daughter turned two yesterday! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114619160/567607495/1445643945?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_090425_BDAY_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU4Y2VjYi1jNjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jU-E_ZnfgMOuyRSEWI5Kp-X4qMHrCRSidLSFjqzDKk=) She changed my world when she arrived and has brought such immense joy into my wife and I's lives. **I can't wait to see what life has in store for her, and every day I fight with everything I have to create the country I want her to inherit.** As her dad and the Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania, I'm in the unique position to be able to push our state toward policy that will do right by her and her generation, and I take that role seriously. By going after funding for programs like SNAP and Medicaid, or subsidized childcare, Republicans are forcing families into a cycle of living paycheck to paycheck. As a leader, and especially as a father, I can't understand taking resources away from families trying to do better by their kids. I need you to know you can count on me to stand up for families, no matter their income, and make sure everyone has a fair shot at a better future. I'm in this for my daughter, for my family, and for yours, because our future is dependent on each other. [**If you're with me, chipping in to my campaign today will make a real difference in my ability to keep doing the work and deliver a better tomorrow for Pennsylvania kids and their families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114619161/567607496/1445643945?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_090425_BDAY_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU4Y2VjYi1jNjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jU-E_ZnfgMOuyRSEWI5Kp-X4qMHrCRSidLSFjqzDKk=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Republicans in Congress are scrambling to cover for Donald Trump on the Jeffrey Epstein files, and it's pathetic, Peter. **This week, the Republican-led House Oversight Committee released 33,000 pages of Epstein documents. Sounds impressive, right?_97% of it was already public._** The rest was so heavily redacted that it was worthless. Meanwhile, GOP Representative Thomas Massie is trying to force a real vote to release ALL the files within 30 days. But Republican leaders are frantically whipping votes against transparency. The White House is even calling support for the measure a "very hostile act to the administration." In other words: **The White House is literally threatening their own party members to keep Trump's secrets hidden.** Now, Republicans are doing everything they can to avoid a real vote on full transparency.
