name: Raul Ruiz
subject: Our farmers need our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=uzUXi85qfoqKSUFFHMBbwkCX61hVs0Umb9A%2FKyxsBCYsUArEBm%2B54feRQ3seoBoVeQpIQ%2BtgZ0SMjmUWT39f7JOQsGigFQCQTmn0g6F5LxGLStiKLcNXbUP7AbsLA%2BvfpP7uyXQlZGGWGhjFa4oVNcRPe76ZjoiKH70g3WuzivIOJuIy4osU6jBViAdeawSyJYSRnUA76mHdkQ3fHSB8rF1DpqvsihMM8%2BChn4%2BM6wnfWcHpHG50o95jn8IY6BhN%2BPNqCQHnEJk6f5As8jRgfiofdbiPSpIYuJwhiCHXjr7xCQ10swsxqtTQQ2gG%2BAa%2FB94gJv5dRZ1K%2FXAAC%2F%2B4lH8HDwvicE%2BvUVKwuBhZ2Nggsr9E%2BV1oQBmtzucrUQX3GwazGgekErK37T9ZRyIA83OP9wIBgQFKVBclSdqW%2BbgFEVYXKfjL%2FD2hNnp5XiVh]

# [#]
Hi, it’s Raul.

Our farmers feed the nation. Not only do they put food on our kitchen table, but they are a critical piece to our economy, especially in rural areas. Right now, farmers and farmworkers need our support.

Donald Trump’s policies are causing chaos across California's farming communities: ICE raids have left them without workers, tariffs are pricing them out of markets, and perfectly good harvests are being left to rot in the fields.

Recently, I met with farmers in CA-25 to discuss how we can keep our produce competitive and incentivize people to buy locally grown foods.

But here's what I need you to know: The crisis our rural communities are facing right now is because of harmful policies passed by the Republicans who prioritize politics over people.

Addressing our broken immigration system and fixing our economy doesn’t have to come at the expense of our farmers.

There’s a better way forward, but to get there, we need to protect every blue seat so that we can flip the House in 2026 and hold Republicans accountable.

Will you pitch in $ today to keep CA-25 blue so we can deliver solutions that work for all of us while protecting California’s farming communities? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep25?amount=]

DONATE $10 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep25?amount=10&amount=SBD_RR_EM_FR_090425_FARMER_D1_S1]

Thank you for standing with us,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer] CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]

name: Democratic National Committee
subject: re: Missouri
body:
---
Derek, If you’re looking for a way to make an impact _right now,_ we’re here to tell you this is it. Let us explain: **Democrats are fighting a major gerrymandering battle yet again — this time in Missouri.** And the outcome will directly impact all of us for years to come. [**If that’s all you need to hear, please split a $20 contribution to the Missouri Democratic Party and the DNC to help Democrats fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-mo-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250904_4499_fr&refcode2=4499_22930333_JZo9cd&akid=4499%2E22930333%2EJZo9cd) After redrawing congressional maps in Texas to give themselves five new seats, Republicans are once again following Trump’s orders and are turning their attention to Missouri. Just yesterday, they began a special session to break up one of just two blue districts in the state. And, if they succeed, it will be that much easier for the GOP to control Congress in 2026 and beyond. That’s why Republicans are laser-focused on this fight, and we need to be, too. Derek, Democrats are doing everything we can to stop this. Most urgently, we’re activating the DNC’s organizing operation to recruit for a massive demonstration at the Missouri State Capitol in less than a week. **We’re fighting fire with fire, because if Republicans succeed, the consequences could be disastrous for people all over the country.** [**But we’ll need your help to fight back. If you’re looking for a way to make an impact right now, this is your opportunity. Can you split a $20 contribution now between the Missouri Democratic Party and the DNC to help power our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-mo-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250904_4499_fr&refcode2=4499_22930333_JZo9cd&akid=4499%2E22930333%2EJZo9cd) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Missouri Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-mo-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20250904_4499_fr&refcode2=4499_22930333_JZo9cd&akid=4499%2E22930333%2EJZo9cd)**

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now.
Peter, I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision:
**_I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for._**
Peter, I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, **[I hope you’ll split a few dollars between my team and Heartland Patriots to help close our budget gap and fund this new ad buy →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94416?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94416?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy)**
Here’s why we made this choice:
Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me.
But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support.
**And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.**
This is how we do it, Peter. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor.
**[Peter, to be candid with you, I made this choice because I believe that our grassroots team will come through the way you always have and help us power this campaign to victory. To close our budget gap and fund this big ad buy, we’ve set a goal of 100 online donations before midnight tonight. If you could step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots, I would be incredibly grateful.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94416?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Mikie Sherrill and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94417?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94417?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94417?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94417?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94417?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94417?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94416?refcode=em20250904-9374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9374%2E614464%2EAJjpLy)

### Exposing DHS's false claims against Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, a man of service, integrity, and decades of honorable community life.

Friends,
The smear campaign against Zahid has begun.
Here, I'm setting the record straight. **Anyone who wishes to see our legal filings, including sworn testimony and countless letters of support, is welcome to contact me and I 'll share them with you.** You can also find more backstory and legal history about the _extensive_ bad faith and racism in targeting Zahid, at the legacy website [www.KeepZahidHome.org](https://substack.com/redirect/56916246-a8b4-4b9e-9209-7b83f1071c8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=172817028&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyODE3MDI4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcwMTU2NjgsImV4cCI6MTc1OTYwNzY2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.j19Z2yQfBKiavu637aelzqs-Qz-2u0ybZCM8sZ1jvDQ)
DHS's press release is deliberately inflammatory--using words like _" illegal," "fraudster," "sob story"_--and designed to frame Zahid as both criminal and undeserving. Here's how we can counter, clearly and forcefully, while keeping credibility intact:
* * *
## Core Talking Points
### 1\. **Zahid 's Service and Integrity**
* Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry is a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran, honorably discharged for injuries sustained in service.
* He has always entered the U.S. legally and has never been convicted of a crime in the United States.
* FBI record checks consistently clear him of wrongdoing.
* He himself tracked down and disclosed his old Australian conviction records to U.S. authorities--an act of integrity, not deception. Using self-reported information against him is the opposite of justice.

* * *
### 2\. **The Smear Campaign Itself**
* DHS's press release proves our point: this is a political smear campaign, not a fair legal process.
* Instead of focusing on real threats to public safety, DHS is recycling decades-old allegations, cherry-picking details, and attacking Zahid's character while ignoring his decades of honorable service and community leadership.
* The use of demeaning terms like _" sob story"_ in an official government communication is beneath the dignity of the United States. It shows hostility, not justice.

* * *
### 3\. **Contradictions and Bad Faith**
* DHS claims Zahid is both unfit to remain in the U.S. and simultaneously processed his naturalization applications, issuing interview notices as recently as August 2025.
* They cannot have it both ways: either he is ineligible, or he is being considered for citizenship. This contradiction exposes their bad faith.
* DHS/ICE have already admitted in other contexts to weaponizing routine immigration interviews as "bait and switch" traps--this is part of a documented pattern.

* * *
### 4\. **The Broader Pattern**
* Washingtonians should see this for what it is: political targeting of outspoken immigrants and Muslims under the guise of "enforcement."
* This is part of a broader campaign of intimidation against immigrant communities, not a legitimate public safety action.
* ICE detention is being used as punishment for people who comply with the law--Zahid showed up for his interview, and ICE literally ambushed him as he exited.

* * *
### 5\. **Faith in America**
* The Constitution, the rule of law, and the promise of fairness require that the government apply the law consistently and with integrity.
* If DHS were truly committed to protecting the country, they would focus on genuine threats, not on disabled veterans in wheelchairs who have served their communities for decades.
* What makes America strong is not cruelty--it's fairness, dignity, and honoring those who serve.

* * *
## Sample Quick Responses (for press or social media)
* **On the smear campaign:** "DHS's press release reads more like a political hit job than an official communication. It's full of inflammatory language and ignores the facts of Zahid's honorable service and peaceful life in Washington."
* **On Zahid 's past disclosures:** "Zahid is being punished for his own integrity--he himself disclosed old foreign records to U.S. authorities. Turning a man's honesty into the reason to attack him is the opposite of justice."
* **On contradictions:** "If DHS truly believed Zahid had no right to remain, why did they continue processing his citizenship applications and issue interview notices this month? They can't have it both ways--this is bad faith."
* **On community ties:** "Zahid has lived in Washington for decades, raised a family, served his neighbors, and been entrusted with leadership roles by the State of Washington itself. DHS ignores all of that because it doesn't fit their smear campaign."
* **On America 's principles:** "This is not about law and order--it's about whether America still honors fairness, service, and integrity. If a disabled veteran can be targeted this way, no immigrant family in Washington is safe."

* * *
About the "fraud" in Australia:
Zahid, as a young man, worked as a taxi driver in Australia after he emigrated to that country to pursue computer science. This was at a time when immigrant taxi drivers in Australia were _**routinely**_**physically assaulted, robbed of fares, and even killed.**
Zahid, who suffered many fare evasions and beatings at the hands of his white passengers - mouthfuls of blood, dozens of times - tried to take them to court many, many times, and received no justice. The racist enforcement of the law was terribly plain, such that even the Indian ambassador commented that "it is a good day in Australia when one of our own is not murdered."
One day, a customer hired Zahid for what he promised was a short ride. He lied. The fare on that ride was $400, and Zahid still had to pay gas and rent and all of the expenses of running the taxi. The passenger left his passport as surety and went inside, promising to return with the money. He never came back.
(This was at a time when replacing a passport was $50.)
Zahid tried to return the passport. He was accused by the officials of attempting to use it. Knowing he would get no justice if he fought their _wrongful_ accusations, he accepted a plea bargain. He pled guilty, and they gave him a few weeks of community service basically for the optics.
Again. HE DID NOTHING WRONG. In fact, _he was the only victim_ in that case.
So. On paper, Zahid "pled guilty" to fraud in Australia. It was treated as a misdemeanor charge, a "Rising of the Court," functionally equivalent to a parking ticket here. It also took place in the **mid-1990s.**
For DHS to be weaponizing this matter against him, when it has _already been litigated_ and _found to be irrelevant to Zahid 's naturalization_, reveals their corruption and bad faith.
* * *
The matter of "falsely claiming citizenship" I addressed in my last post. Expert testimony IN THE RECORD proves Zahid never made that mark.
* * *
Zahid's injuries. He's been in a wheelchair since long before I knew him. I take him to his VA appointments for pain medication and wheelchair repairs regularly. He's 100% service-connected disabled. He wanted to make a career of the Army - he loved it - before his injuries. The fact that they're trying to weaponize his pain against him, and argue that he's defrauded the government by being RIGHTFULLY compensated for _immense_ pain and suffering, and his literal crippling and loss of mobility - _**really?**_
Tell that to ANY disabled veteran, or anyone who knows and loves one, and see what response you get.
Whatever "settlement" they're talking about, neither I nor Zahid know anything about it.
* * *
This administration will do **anything** , sink to any level, dehumanize any honorable service, reveal their faithlessness and hypocrisy and falsity with every word, in order to try to prevent public awareness of what they're truly up to.
Don't let them get away with it. Don't let yourself be deceived.
* * *
As I write this to you, Zahid suffers under conditions that would be _**prosecuted as animal abuse**_**** if inflicted on pets. THOUSANDS upon THOUSANDS of human beings are being kept in these conditions in this country - with no recourse, no oversight, and no hope. We are kept spinning our wheels in legal systems rapidly being turned against us, while this weaponization and abuse of power churns on and on, with nearly limitless funding, and every incentive to go on the attack, smear Zahid's character, and hide the truth of what they're really doing.
As **Zahid himself said to me last night** , "When corporations are allowed to privately profit off of the deprivation of the people of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, there is no end to the oppression that will result."
* * *
First they came for the immigrants. Then they came for the dissidents. Then...?
* * *
Friends are asking me how Zahid is. Honestly I don't know what to tell you. He's in a concrete box with very little, very terrible food, no access to the law library they brag so much about, very little access to communication, no safety, no trust, no one he loves, no one who loves him.
He has no meds, not for his thyroid, not to prevent the incipient blindness, not to ease the acid burns he suffers in his chest day and night.
He's adjusting to the longer-term sense of the time he's going to have to be in there. There's very little functional hope. Even if he agrees to go abroad - which he hasn't - they still let people rot in there for months or more before letting them go.
There's no timeframe for an end to this. It's terrible.
WHICH IS WHY WE FIGHT.
Not just for him. For EVERYONE kept in these conditions - awaiting no trial, accused of no crime, deprived of dignity and freedom for no good reason.
Call your elected officials. Call the Attorney General's office and ask him to take up Zahid's case: Zahid is a sworn Officer of the Great State of Washington, a Boundary Review Board Commissioner _currently_. And he was handpicked and trusted by Governor Inslee himself as a Commissioner on Disability and Unemployment. His decades of honorable community service speaks for itself.
* * *
Zahid's story is not just about one man--it's about what kind of country we are willing to become. If a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran in a wheelchair can be smeared, shackled, and left to suffer in a concrete box, then no immigrant family, no dissenter, no vulnerable neighbor is safe.
But **we are not powerless.** We have our voices, our networks, our elected officials--and we have the truth. The Constitution does not belong to DHS, ICE, or any administration. It belongs to the people. And it is our duty to demand that it be honored.
I am asking you--friends, neighbors, Washingtonians, Americans--to stand with us. Share Zahid's story. Call your elected officials. Refuse to let smear campaigns replace justice. Together, we can hold the line against cruelty, and insist on fairness, dignity, and integrity in this country we love.
**This is why we fight. For Zahid. For every family in detention. For the soul of America itself.**

clean_body: Exposing DHS's false claims against Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, a man of service, integrity, and decades of honorable community life. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Exposing DHS's false claims against Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, a man of service, integrity, and decades of honorable community life. | | | Sep 4 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, The smear campaign against Zahid has begun. Here, I'm setting the record straight. Anyone who wishes to see our legal filings, including sworn testimony and countless letters of support, is welcome to contact me and I 'll share them with you. You can also find more backstory and legal history about the extensive bad faith and racism in targeting Zahid, at the legacy website . DHS's press release is deliberately inflammatory--using words like " illegal," "fraudster," "sob story"--and designed to frame Zahid as both criminal and undeserving. Here's how we can counter, clearly and forcefully, while keeping credibility intact: Core Talking Points 1\. Zahid 's Service and Integrity Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry is a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran, honorably discharged for injuries sustained in service. He has always entered the U.S. legally and has never been convicted of a crime in the United States. FBI record checks consistently clear him of wrongdoing. He himself tracked down and disclosed his old Australian conviction records to U.S. authorities--an act of integrity, not deception. Using self-reported information against him is the opposite of justice. 2\. The Smear Campaign Itself DHS's press release proves our point: this is a political smear campaign, not a fair legal process. Instead of focusing on real threats to public safety, DHS is recycling decades-old allegations, cherry-picking details, and attacking Zahid's character while ignoring his decades of honorable service and community leadership. The use of demeaning terms like " sob story" in an official government communication is beneath the dignity of the United States. It shows hostility, not justice. 3\. Contradictions and Bad Faith DHS claims Zahid is both unfit to remain in the U.S. and simultaneously processed his naturalization applications, issuing interview notices as recently as August 2025. They cannot have it both ways: either he is ineligible, or he is being considered for citizenship. This contradiction exposes their bad faith. DHS/ICE have already admitted in other contexts to weaponizing routine immigration interviews as "bait and switch" traps--this is part of a documented pattern. 4\. The Broader Pattern Washingtonians should see this for what it is: political targeting of outspoken immigrants and Muslims under the guise of "enforcement." This is part of a broader campaign of intimidation against immigrant communities, not a legitimate public safety action. ICE detention is being used as punishment for people who comply with the law--Zahid showed up for his interview, and ICE literally ambushed him as he exited. 5\. Faith in America The Constitution, the rule of law, and the promise of fairness require that the government apply the law consistently and with integrity. If DHS were truly committed to protecting the country, they would focus on genuine threats, not on disabled veterans in wheelchairs who have served their communities for decades. What makes America strong is not cruelty--it's fairness, dignity, and honoring those who serve. Sample Quick Responses (for press or social media) On the smear campaign: "DHS's press release reads more like a political hit job than an official communication. It's full of inflammatory language and ignores the facts of Zahid's honorable service and peaceful life in Washington." On Zahid 's past disclosures: "Zahid is being punished for his own integrity--he himself disclosed old foreign records to U.S. authorities. Turning a man's honesty into the reason to attack him is the opposite of justice." On contradictions: "If DHS truly believed Zahid had no right to remain, why did they continue processing his citizenship applications and issue interview notices this month? They can't have it both ways--this is bad faith." On community ties: "Zahid has lived in Washington for decades, raised a family, served his neighbors, and been entrusted with leadership roles by the State of Washington itself. DHS ignores all of that because it doesn't fit their smear campaign." On America 's principles: "This is not about law and order--it's about whether America still honors fairness, service, and integrity. If a disabled veteran can be targeted this way, no immigrant family in Washington is safe." About the "fraud" in Australia: Zahid, as a young man, worked as a taxi driver in Australia after he emigrated to that country to pursue computer science. This was at a time when immigrant taxi drivers in Australia were routinelyphysically assaulted, robbed of fares, and even killed. Zahid, who suffered many fare evasions and beatings at the hands of his white passengers - mouthfuls of blood, dozens of times - tried to take them to court many, many times, and received no justice. The racist enforcement of the law was terribly plain, such that even the Indian ambassador commented that "it is a good day in Australia when one of our own is not murdered." One day, a customer hired Zahid for what he promised was a short ride. He lied. The fare on that ride was $400, and Zahid still had to pay gas and rent and all of the expenses of running the taxi. The passenger left his passport as surety and went inside, promising to return with the money. He never came back. (This was at a time when replacing a passport was $50.) Zahid tried to return the passport. He was accused by the officials of attempting to use it. Knowing he would get no justice if he fought their wrongful accusations, he accepted a plea bargain. He pled guilty, and they gave him a few weeks of community service basically for the optics. Again. HE DID NOTHING WRONG. In fact, he was the only victim in that case. So. On paper, Zahid "pled guilty" to fraud in Australia. It was treated as a misdemeanor charge, a "Rising of the Court," functionally equivalent to a parking ticket here. It also took place in the mid-1990s. For DHS to be weaponizing this matter against him, when it has already been litigated and found to be irrelevant to Zahid 's naturalization, reveals their corruption and bad faith. The matter of "falsely claiming citizenship" I addressed in my last post. Expert testimony IN THE RECORD proves Zahid never made that mark. Zahid's injuries. He's been in a wheelchair since long before I knew him. I take him to his VA appointments for pain medication and wheelchair repairs regularly. He's 100% service-connected disabled. He wanted to make a career of the Army - he loved it - before his injuries. The fact that they're trying to weaponize his pain against him, and argue that he's defrauded the government by being RIGHTFULLY compensated for immense pain and suffering, and his literal crippling and loss of mobility - really? Tell that to ANY disabled veteran, or anyone who knows and loves one, and see what response you get. Whatever "settlement" they're talking about, neither I nor Zahid know anything about it. This administration will do anything , sink to any level, dehumanize any honorable service, reveal their faithlessness and hypocrisy and falsity with every word, in order to try to prevent public awareness of what they're truly up to. Don't let them get away with it. Don't let yourself be deceived. As I write this to you, Zahid suffers under conditions that would be prosecuted as animal abuse** if inflicted on pets. THOUSANDS upon THOUSANDS of human beings are being kept in these conditions in this country - with no recourse, no oversight, and no hope. We are kept spinning our wheels in legal systems rapidly being turned against us, while this weaponization and abuse of power churns on and on, with nearly limitless funding, and every incentive to go on the attack, smear Zahid's character, and hide the truth of what they're really doing. As Zahid himself said to me last night , "When corporations are allowed to privately profit off of the deprivation of the people of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, there is no end to the oppression that will result." First they came for the immigrants. Then they came for the dissidents. Then...? Friends are asking me how Zahid is. Honestly I don't know what to tell you. He's in a concrete box with very little, very terrible food, no access to the law library they brag so much about, very little access to communication, no safety, no trust, no one he loves, no one who loves him. He has no meds, not for his thyroid, not to prevent the incipient blindness, not to ease the acid burns he suffers in his chest day and night. He's adjusting to the longer-term sense of the time he's going to have to be in there. There's very little functional hope. Even if he agrees to go abroad - which he hasn't - they still let people rot in there for months or more before letting them go. There's no timeframe for an end to this. It's terrible. WHICH IS WHY WE FIGHT. Not just for him. For EVERYONE kept in these conditions - awaiting no trial, accused of no crime, deprived of dignity and freedom for no good reason. Call your elected officials. Call the Attorney General's office and ask him to take up Zahid's case: Zahid is a sworn Officer of the Great State of Washington, a Boundary Review Board Commissioner currently. And he was handpicked and trusted by Governor Inslee himself as a Commissioner on Disability and Unemployment. His decades of honorable community service speaks for itself. Zahid's story is not just about one man--it's about what kind of country we are willing to become. If a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran in a wheelchair can be smeared, shackled, and left to suffer in a concrete box, then no immigrant family, no dissenter, no vulnerable neighbor is safe. But we are not powerless. We have our voices, our networks, our elected officials--and we have the truth. The Constitution does not belong to DHS, ICE, or any administration. It belongs to the people. And it is our duty to demand that it be honored. I am asking you--friends, neighbors, Washingtonians, Americans--to stand with us. Share Zahid's story. Call your elected officials. Refuse to let smear campaigns replace justice. Together, we can hold the line against cruelty, and insist on fairness, dignity, and integrity in this country we love. This is why we fight. For Zahid. For every family in detention. For the soul of America itself. | | ---|---|--- "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. body:
The Trump administration has cut staff at the U.S. Forest Service and National Park Service and is rescinding the U.S. Forest Service’s Roadless Rule.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114619431/567608377/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTFjODg1NS1jODg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVjPH3xU08XvZQsIJc6JvcMudoWupbU5QMmuJ9ikpls=&emci=fb368e89-bd89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a11c8855-c889-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Last month, I went on a hike at the Baker Lake Trail, which is inside the Mount Baker-Snoqualmie National Forest.** I joined the Outdoor Alliance of Washington on this hike, where we looked at the forest and the trails, as well as discussed the impact of the Trump administration on public lands. The Trump administration has cut staff at the U.S. Forest Service and National Park Service and is rescinding the U.S. Forest Service's Roadless Rule, which protects nearly 59 million acres of national forest. The U.S. Forest Service Roadless Rule prevents and restricts new road construction, timber harvesting, and mineral leasing in designated "roadless areas." Republicans in Congress also tried to sell off 5.4 million acres of public land. **But after news of this came out, and public outcry came roaring back, we were able to beat back that effort to sell off public lands.** **We still have a lot of work to do to protect our public lands.** We must protect the Roadless Rule and our environment because a healthy environment is vital to Washingtonians’ way of life and the regional economy. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

body:
Every day, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies show us they’re willing to break the law and abuse their power. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114619550/567608844/651068048?refcode=header&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTRjODVmOC1jODg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Jp5ndNRhJljSjUpzkd1lNgK2De6i3GyHDy2IkWnOxk=)
---
Peter,
Every day, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies show us they’re willing to break the law and abuse their power. But Keith has never backed down from holding them accountable — and he won’t stop now.
Keith is fearlessly taking a stand against Trump’s federal overreach. But this fight will take all of us.
**Thanks to Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, supporting this crucial fight is easy. You can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign, and the Minnesota Department of Revenue will provide a full refund! **
Here’s how it works:
**Step 1:** Make your donation.
**Step 2:** We’ll send you a receipt and a PCR application form.

Friend,
A panel of judges, RADICAL, UNELECTED, AND OUT-OF-TOUCH, just rejected my appeal to protect our nation from the DISASTER of mass invasion and migrant crime!
These radical judges are BLOCKING me from doing the job you elected me to do - __DEPORTING ILLEGAL CRIMINALS!__

name: Team Downing
subject: Barack Obama COMMITTED TREASON!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Explosive docs show Obama officials pushed false Russia narrative. Is it time for indictments?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
Barack Obama has just been named in a criminal referral tied to the origins of the Trump–Russia collusion hoax.
[According to newly declassified documents released by Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard](https://trk.emails.troydowning._HBgSJabHqUKWte6_vg), Obama and top members of his administration may have manufactured intelligence to create the narrative that Donald Trump colluded with Russia, despite knowing no such evidence existed.
**Now, the Department of Justice has launched a "strike force" to investigate. **
With Attorney General Pam Bondi and FBI Director Kash Patel leading the charge, every shred of evidence is being examined, and no name is off-limits.
_Obama. Brennan. Clapper. Comey. Rice. Clinton. McCabe._
The list goes on.
So we’re asking you, Peter, a top conservative supporter: [Should Barack Obama be investigated, indicted, and arrested?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CAST YOUR VOTE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._1qO0aud85_Q)This may be the biggest political scandal in American history, and justice cannot be selective.
If the evidence points to crimes, no one – **_not even a former President_** — is above the law.
Time is short, and the DOJ strike force is moving fast. Please submit your critical input before 11:59 p.m.
Thank you,
**GOP Alerts (via Team Downing)**| |

Friend, I’ve always believed that progress doesn’t just come from Washington — it starts with leaders on the ground, in our communities, standing up for what’s right. That’s why I created the **Lobo Leadership Fund** : to lift up down-ballot Democrats who are fighting for affordable health care, reproductive freedom, voting rights, and fair wages in their own states and cities. These local leaders often face the toughest fights with the fewest resources. The GOP knows this, which is why they’re pouring dark money into school board, state legislature, and city council races. **If we don’t step up to support our candidates at every level, we risk losing the foundation of our democracy.** Your support for the Lobo Leadership Fund goes directly toward helping Democratic candidates build strong campaigns, organize in their communities, and win tough races. Together, we can give them the tools to push back against extremist agendas and deliver for working families. **[I’m proud to support this next generation of Democratic leaders — but I can’t do it without you. clean_body: Friend, I’ve always believed that progress doesn’t just come from Washington — it starts with leaders on the ground, in our communities, standing up for what’s right. That’s why I created the Lobo Leadership Fund : to lift up down-ballot Democrats who are fighting for affordable health care, reproductive freedom, voting rights, and fair wages in their own states and cities. These local leaders often face the toughest fights with the fewest resources. The GOP knows this, which is why they’re pouring dark money into school board, state legislature, and city council races. If we don’t step up to support our candidates at every level, we risk losing the foundation of our democracy. Your support for the Lobo Leadership Fund goes directly toward helping Democratic candidates build strong campaigns, organize in their communities, and win tough races. Together, we can give them the tools to push back against extremist agendas and deliver for working families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Lobo Leadership Fund will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being part of this fight. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Hi Peter,
Our democracy is on life support! If we’re going to make it to the next election, we need to start working right this minute, and that means we need your help. Can you contribute $5 or more to our movement today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250904_trumppetition_actrs&amount=5]
Trump just laid out his next outlandish and illegal move: he wants Republicans to take 100 more seats in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250904_trumppetition_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250904_trumppetition_actrs]
This is following his “big win” in Texas, where Republicans just rammed through a new redistricting map that could hand the GOP five extra Congressional seats . Now, other red states are lining up to follow.
On top of that, Trump is tying these plans directly to his push to end mail-in voting, in a direct assault on our democracy.
This isn’t politics as usual; it’s a coordinated attack to lock extremists into power, gut abortion rights, and silence women, immigrant communities, and LGBTQ+ voices for a generation. Our democracy is literally on life support.
Movement for Freedom is mobilizing voters in the communities Trump and his allies want to erase. But building a movement takes allies, accomplices, and resources, and we need you to stand with us.

Trump wants 100 seats. Let’s show him millions of us are ready to stop him.
— Movement for Freedom

name: Tom Fitton
subject: JW Opinion Project: What Is Your Trust In Government?
body:
That’s why for the past 31 years, your Judicial Watch has successfully fought public corruption and unlawful government secrecy to encourage honesty in government...and on occasion, thanks to the support of members like you, we’ve even changed the course of history.

| [ | |
---
|
--- ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76401&L=36017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGV0aXRpb25zL2ludDI1bmRlMDkxYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fa2dc50d05fbd17588a3370b8ffcb36ce9149205bc087e37301e8f1eb09ffcbf) |
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**In today’s world, it’s hard to know who to trust...**
That’s why for the past 31 years, your **Judicial Watch** has successfully fought public corruption and unlawful government secrecy to encourage honesty in government...and on occasion, thanks to the support of members like you, _we’ve_ _even changed the course_ _of history_.
And in today’s world, we are busier than ever...working side-by-side with **President Trump** as he works to fulfill his promise of restoring Americans’ trust in government!
And what a difference we are seeing!
**President Trump** is taking action to:

* **Direct****mass****deportations** of illegal aliens, criminal aliens first

* **Terminate****“Diversity, Equity, Inclusion” (DEI)** programs that spread racist woke propaganda in our S. Armed Forces; schools; and throughout the federal government, including the Departments of Defense, State and Education

* **Remov****e****Deep****State** officials whose loyalty was to the liberal and woke agendas, not to the S. Constitution and the rule of law

* **Eliminate** waste, fraud and abuse in TRILLIONS of dollars of bloat through the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)

I speak for many conservatives like us on the front lines here in Washington, when I say that this feels like a springtime resurrection of hope for restoring our faith in public institutions.
**At least, that’s how I see it.**_[What do you think?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76401&L=36017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGV0aXRpb25zL2ludDI1bmRlMDkxYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fa2dc50d05fbd17588a3370b8ffcb36ce9149205bc087e37301e8f1eb09ffcbf)_
My team and I care very deeply about the input from Judicial Watch members and patriotic Americans just like you, so we’ve launched this _[very important public opinion and educate project.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76401&L=36017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGV0aXRpb25zL2ludDI1bmRlMDkxYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fa2dc50d05fbd17588a3370b8ffcb36ce9149205bc087e37301e8f1eb09ffcbf)_
The _[survey only takes a few moments](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76401&L=36017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGV0aXRpb25zL2ludDI1bmRlMDkxYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fa2dc50d05fbd17588a3370b8ffcb36ce9149205bc087e37301e8f1eb09ffcbf)_ and will provide us with critical insights into what you think the Trump government is doing right. Or wrong.
We know what the mainstream media and left think, and I’m guessing they don’t speak for you. This is your opportunity to break their narratives and _[set the facts straight about how commonsense Americans feel](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76401&L=36017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGV0aXRpb25zL2ludDI1bmRlMDkxYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fa2dc50d05fbd17588a3370b8ffcb36ce9149205bc087e37301e8f1eb09ffcbf)_ about the state of our government.
Please take a few moments to complete the **Judicial Watch Members’ Trust in Government Survey**
| [YOUR OPINIONS MATTER – TAKE THE SURVEY](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76401&L=36017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGV0aXRpb25zL2ludDI1bmRlMDkxYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=fa2dc50d05fbd17588a3370b8ffcb36ce9149205bc087e37301e8f1eb09ffcbf)
---

subject: this team is making a difference

body:
First, I want to say thank you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114621192/567614286/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllMTQ4Ni1jYzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iyYmHC2HZ7qxtf-hzNeYLahxHZgsUqdFdunNSWAHHRE=) Hey team, it’s Andrea. First, I want to say _thank you._ With the support of this grassroots team, our campaign not only met, but exceeded our fundraising goal for the month of August. That’s great news, but let’s be clear: this campaign isn’t about raising as much money as we can. It’s about you, and at the end of the day, everything I’m doing in Congress is for one reason: **to keep delivering bold progress for everyday folks like you and your family.** That’s why I’m pushing for legislation to protect our communities from the increasing risk of wildfires. It’s why I’m pushing to reverse GOP cuts and restore funding for Medicaid and SNAP. And it’s why I’m working with anyone I can to find real solutions to end America’s mental health crisis. So your support really does keep me in the fight to tackle tough issues like these. And soon, your support will be critical: **Our team is facing a critical deadline at the end of the month, and afterwards, we’re required to submit a report for the FEC to release publicly. ** Look, we know extreme MAGA Republicans will be looking for any sign of weakness in our campaign, so I have to ask: **[Can you make a donation today to help us post the strongest report possible at the end of the quarter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114621194/567614288/-480163815?refcode=email_090425_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllMTQ4Ni1jYzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iyYmHC2HZ7qxtf-hzNeYLahxHZgsUqdFdunNSWAHHRE=)** | | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114621196/567614290/-480163815?refcode=email_090425_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllMTQ4Ni1jYzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iyYmHC2HZ7qxtf-hzNeYLahxHZgsUqdFdunNSWAHHRE=)**

name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m livid, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
| I’ll be honest, Peter: I’m livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly. The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism — and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence professionals. If you’re as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate for Democrats — please join me and Roy Cooper with a contribution to our campaigns: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/roy_cooper_email_warnersplit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114621459/567615251/338801658?refcode=ea.ee8644a8-cd89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.ee8644a8-cd89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTg2NDRhOC1jZDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLxH1txioi4oAtm6augIw7S9vI1Dbxno9YzFdAxNXWg=)** Hear me out, Peter: Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. **And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now.** Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit. **I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is.** This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer — a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists. Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention-seekers. **But for goodness sake — I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes.** It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right. I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress. **[Join me and Roy Cooper with an emergency donation today to help us fight back, defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms, and flip the Senate. clean_body: | I’ll be honest, Peter: I’m livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly. The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism — and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence professionals. If you’re as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate for Democrats — please join me and Roy Cooper with a contribution to our campaigns: = Hear me out, Peter: Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now. Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit. I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is. This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer — a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists. Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention-seekers. But for goodness sake — I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes. It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right. I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Mark Warner and Roy Cooper: | = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: Team Taylor
subject: Nobody knows what will happen next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Governor Tony Evers isn’t running for reelection, and neither is Judge Chris Taylor’s former opponent, Justice Rebecca Bradley.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250904-518&t=1&akid=518%2E294397%2ED4KfL6)
Wisconsin’s political future is more uncertain than ever.
Governor Tony Evers isn’t running for reelection, and neither is Judge Chris Taylor’s former opponent, Justice Rebecca Bradley.
That means two of the most important offices in our state, the Governor’s mansion and a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, are wide open in 2026.
**And the truth is, nobody knows what will happen next.**
What we do know is that right-wing special interests see this as their best shot to claw back power.
They’ll pour millions into electing an extremist governor and a right-wing Supreme Court justice — threatening reproductive healthcare access, fair state legislative maps, and our democracy.
This is where we come in. **If we build a grassroots coalition strong enough to take on dark money, we can make sure people decide the future of Wisconsin — not right-wing special interests.**
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in $10 to help us elect Judge Chris Taylor and protect Wisconsin’s future?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250904_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250904-518&refcode2=518_294397_D4KfL6&akid=518%2E294397%2ED4KfL6)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250904_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250904-518&refcode2=518_294397_D4KfL6&akid=518%2E294397%2ED4KfL6)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: This is a dangerous escalation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hey there —

Right now, National Guard troops are continuing to flood the streets of Washington, D.C.—and now they’re armed.

Our communities are safest when law enforcement is accountable to the people—not when soldiers carrying military-grade weapons are deployed against American civilians. Arming the Guard in our nation’s capital is a dangerous escalation that undermines trust, increases the risk of unnecessary violence, and sets a precedent we must not allow to stand.

Their only goal is to instill fear. This has nothing to do with public safety. Instead of protecting the city, they are focusing on bogus arrests of DC citizens videoing officers for accountability.

RESIST [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-September?&refcode=E15057-20250904-NationalGaurd-SB-Trump&amount=25]

This is a moment when we need leadership rooted in accountability and common sense. I’m calling for immediate oversight and restraint before this escalates into a tragedy.

If you agree that Washington, D.C. should not become a militarized zone, I need your voice alongside mine.

Together, we can ensure public safety is protected—not threatened—by those sworn to serve it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-September?&refcode=E15057-20250904-NationalGaurd-SL-Trump&amount=25]

- Eric
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2025-fr-august?refcode=E15057-20250904-NationalGaurd-footer-Trump&amount=25]

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Why’s it so important to donate?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
There’s a good chance your inbox is full of emails from worthy causes and campaigns asking you to make a donation. Probably a better than good chance.
#

Friends —
There’s a good chance your inbox is full of emails from worthy causes and campaigns asking you to make a donation. Probably a better than good chance.
We’re sure you’re asking yourself why it’s so important to donate to Mark Kelly, and we don’t blame you.
But if you’ve got a minute, we’d appreciate the chance to explain why that donation really matters. Give us a shot?
Okay, so first off, it’s worth noting that Mark Kelly is one of just a few sitting Senators who have won in states where Republicans outnumber Democrats — and he’s done that not just once, but twice. He knows how to turn out voters and win.
Because of that, Mark’s one of the most in-demand Democrats in the country. He’s traveling nationwide to help elect candidates in tough races. In July, he was in Michigan, this month he’ll be in Nevada, and he did a multi-day swing through North Carolina over Labor Day Weekend.
Back home in Arizona, there are a number of critical elections next year. All state level offices are up alongside several competitive US House districts. Mark has a big role to play in each of those races.
So, if winning across Arizona, taking back the House, and taking back the Senate is important to you, we’re humbly asking:
[**Can you donate to Mark Kelly today? His average online contribution is about $21, but most people give less. What matters most is the donation itself, because they add up fast when we’re all chipping in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25/.-bETEu&refcode=em250904-2-700k&t=1&akid=6178%2E6688874%2EXEHWC7)

Back home in Arizona, there are a number of critical elections next year. All state level offices are up alongside several competitive US House districts. Mark has a big role to play in each of those races. So, if winning across Arizona, taking back the House, and taking back the Senate is important to you, we’re humbly asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: We can’t let Republicans steal power at voters’ expense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need everyone on board to fight back against the GOP’s authoritarian power grab
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114621912/567616710/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxNWMzNDEzLWNlODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kv0YItmzeZGUamheddcRKEv6y9YUbFHFLNNT7T_olzY=&emci=81d29636-bc89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=815c3413-ce89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Now that Greg Abbott has signed Texas’s racially discriminatory gerrymandered map into law, we need to talk about the responsive effort it has triggered in California as Democrats fight back. The California legislature just passed legislation — the Election Rigging Response Act — that will allow the people to push back against Trump’s attempt to rig the midterms. Unlike in Texas, California will present the maps to voters in a November special election. It’s pretty simple: Voters will cast their ballots and decide whether or not lawmakers can redraw California’s congressional maps temporarily to combat the power grab happening in Texas. If voters approve this map, it will protect the rights of communities of color and keep Californian communities of interest together while forcefully defending against the existential threat to democracy posed by Donald Trump’s actions. **The reality is, next year’s midterm elections will be some of the most consequential we’ve ever had. We are using every tool at our disposal to defeat the nationwide Republican efforts to dilute voting power — especially for people of color.** [**Can you rush a donation to help defeat these anti-democracy attacks nationwide and protect the will of the American people?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114621914/567616714/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NextInCA_email_20250904-NDRC-Tier1-NextInCA_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250904-NDRC-Tier1-NextInCA_&utm_campaign=NextInCA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxNWMzNDEzLWNlODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kv0YItmzeZGUamheddcRKEv6y9YUbFHFLNNT7T_olzY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We need everyone on board to fight back against the GOP’s authoritarian power grab | Peter, Now that Greg Abbott has signed Texas’s racially discriminatory gerrymandered map into law, we need to talk about the responsive effort it has triggered in California as Democrats fight back. The California legislature just passed legislation — the Election Rigging Response Act — that will allow the people to push back against Trump’s attempt to rig the midterms. Unlike in Texas, California will present the maps to voters in a November special election. It’s pretty simple: Voters will cast their ballots and decide whether or not lawmakers can redraw California’s congressional maps temporarily to combat the power grab happening in Texas. If voters approve this map, it will protect the rights of communities of color and keep Californian communities of interest together while forcefully defending against the existential threat to democracy posed by Donald Trump’s actions. The reality is, next year’s midterm elections will be some of the most consequential we’ve ever had. We are using every tool at our disposal to defeat the nationwide Republican efforts to dilute voting power — especially for people of color. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Peter,

When Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) officials publicly warn about the dangerous policies of Robert F. Kennedy Jr., **you listen.** And Kim is making sure everyone pays attention to the latest news.

**FIRST:** RFK Jr. fired the CDC’s new director, Dr. Susan Monarez, because she wouldn’t fall in line with his outlandish conspiracy theories and pseudo-science.

**THEN: **Nine former CDC directors, some with experience dating back to the Carter administration, have spoken out. They've warned that Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s policies could endanger the health of all Americans.

**NOW:** Leaders like Kim are once again speaking out, begging the administration to once again put science at the forefront of all medical decisions.

Our health isn’t political. But RFK Jr. is using his leadership to cast doubt on proven science and medical advancement that our country has spent decades developing.

As a doctor, Kim understands just how dangerous his rhetoric is. Science and facts don’t bend to personal “views”—and when lives are on the line, **there’s no room for conspiracy-driven opinions.**

When Kim got her white coat, she took an oath to protect every life she encountered. Medical professionals like Kim follow the science, rely on rigorous trials and tests, and let their knowledge guide decisions that save lives. RFK Jr., on the other hand, _is doing the opposite._

[**We need to put a check on RFK Jr. and the administration that empowered him. name: tiny but deadly
subject: this lil pamphlet could ensure decades of MAGA rule
body:
Democrats are asleep at the wheel in a life or death November 2025 election and nowhere is this better exemplified than with the little pamphlet they are saturating Pennsylvania with
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hETQo3uvdrfb0gVGk6TgLLoxC4SL4tTOtX4B4vdHqhK7BCsbUxGiDIuIFeNQ5tBYE1wHz9L4MgbggeuxBR9qStcO-Z9FZf9lPErLal-bikjSl_WKM6MDCD82CmjwOWygiOPXDw8EQdVEYCpzaV5fFAT53aO-jPTStWZDZaD1uCvcQk12VzWh4mJ0oirajCuE9XiV39laiS8UQiU_GI7iIjOg_rCGF1S1mcbAuS5shSA=&c=5hhsfT_X8EKzOO4sHhKYfu4wEUqO6k-xvDHWs4PPr9lNN5-FuaZ6Yg==&ch=VzgY3SZg1zkxCG4Escw-7KOo9NJM0TSOpha8GUXIee0x1qokuxIolQ==)
---
| Peter,
Democrats are asleep at the wheel in a life or death November 2025 election and there are massive consequences if we lose.
That election is the 2025 PA Supreme Court Election, where Pennsylvanians will vote on whether or not to remove the three Democratic supreme court justices that make up the court's Dem majority.
A win for MAGA here means they can destroy any chance of a Democrat ever winning Pennsylvania. 19 electoral college votes - gone for good. And with the keystone of the Democratic blue wall strategy removed, they can lock in MAGA rule for the next decade and beyond.
The GOP is laser focused on winning this race while Democrats are nowhere to be found. Nowhere is this better exemplified than with the little pamphlet they are presently saturating Pennsylvania with:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hETQo3uvdrfb0gVGk6TgLLoxC4SL4tTOtX4B4vdHqhK7BCsbUxGiDIuIFeNQ5tBYE1wHz9L4MgbggeuxBR9qStcO-Z9FZf9lPErLal-bikjSl_WKM6MDCD82CmjwOWygiOPXDw8EQdVEYCpzaV5fFAT53aO-jPTStWZDZaD1uCvcQk12VzWh4mJ0oirajCuE9XiV39laiS8UQiU_GI7iItI6jN72YI1VDKlpy36HNVE=&c=5hhsfT_X8EKzOO4sHhKYfu4wEUqO6k-xvDHWs4PPr9lNN5-FuaZ6Yg==&ch=VzgY3SZg1zkxCG4Escw-7KOo9NJM0TSOpha8GUXIee0x1qokuxIolQ==)
---
| The pamphlet that Early Vote Action, the MAGA PAC spearheading the GOP effort to flip the PA supreme court, is blanketing Pennsylvania with. Early Vote Action is funded by Elon Musk and human trafficker/"masculine" influencer Tristan Tate.
---
| | | | In PA you can't go anywhere without seeing these flyers: at state fairs MAGA canvassers are handing them out, volunteers are hanging them on peoples door knobs, they are showing up in mailboxes, they are under your windshield wiper, we've even seen them littering the ground in deep blue Philadelphia.
A comparable Democratic effort does not exist. No Dem presence throughout the whole summer at state fairs, nothing sent in the mail, no canvassing efforts. Ask any Democrat you know in PA if they know there is an election this November and they will tell you they had no idea.
We are sleepwalking into a catastrophe.
Defend our Courts is sprinting to reach parity with and eventually surpass MAGA's get out the vote efforts but we are running out of time - two months remain until our November election day and we are outnumbered and outgunned.
[Can we count on you to donate $50, $25, or even $5 to help us rapidly catch up and salvage this race before we permanently cede Pennsylvania to Trump and the MAGA movement?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hETQo3uvdrfb0gVGk6TgLLoxC4SL4tTOtX4B4vdHqhK7BCsbUxGiDIuIFeNQ5tBYc4TIKcU4T3KDg6PnnXJGCJExBIOCZe-_cgL8bHE51S7TNOQ2CtTel2Ld07LyUdR4E8_dOkwjsVQD798jel9tC53J1-9vLZcQCl198bLsIe6X-fcFEG_TF1U9AYks0wzdBaENylQ7aXlL72ypd46g97oVBmTRuWEaBQnx3Y9VyRStIyxuVaDKQA==&c=5hhsfT_X8EKzOO4sHhKYfu4wEUqO6k-xvDHWs4PPr9lNN5-FuaZ6Yg==&ch=VzgY3SZg1zkxCG4Escw-7KOo9NJM0TSOpha8GUXIee0x1qokuxIolQ==)

Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: CA redistricting update →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends — a quick update for you on the California redistricting situation.
The California state legislature successfully passed the Election Rigging Response Act last month, paving the way for a statewide ballot measure to temporarily require new congressional maps in California until the next census and redraw in 2032. The measure, Proposition 50, will be on your ballot on November 4th (which means ballots will be arriving in our mailboxes in just over a month!).
A yes vote means adopting the measure — putting five more congressional seats in play for Democrats here in California to offset the unprecedented, mid-decade redistricting that Trump demanded from Republican governors across the country.
While I have believed for a long time that every state should have their maps drawn by independent redistricting commissions, the reality is that if we play by those rules while Republicans aren’t...well, to put it bluntly, we’re screwing ourselves over. And we’ll likely lose our democracy in the process.
If we have a real shot at flipping the House next year (and we definitely do!) we can’t squander it just because we feel like the GOP playbook is icky. It is — but it’s what we’ve got.
The stakes are too high for us to do anything other than fight fire with fire. Americans *literally* can’t afford another two years of a Republican trifecta in Washington!
I recently published an op-ed in the San Diego Union-Tribune detailing my thoughts, which you can read here. [https://www.sandiegouniontribune.com/2025/08/20/opinion-i-support-redistricting-because-we-must-fight-fire-with-fire/]
If you’re with me on this, I’m asking for your help. I’m going to be doing everything I can to support Prop 50 and the Democrats who will need help fighting for these additional seats. Will you pitch in whatever you can to support my efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
I really appreciate anything you can give — my team and I are already working on all our plans to help out wherever we can, and your partnership makes a big difference in what we can do!
Thanks so much. More soon!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Showing up everywhere and leaving no one behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m running for governor because I love our state. And I believe that we need to do everything in our power to protect it.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4227%2E400544%2EuMqRhM)
_**14,000 miles.**_
That’s the distance I’ve traveled across New Mexico since launching our campaign a few short months ago to speak with voters face-to-face about what matters to them.
I never planned on becoming a politician, and I don’t do this work to be popular with billionaires. **I’m running for governor because I love our state. And I believe that we need to do everything in our power to protect it.**
That’s why I’m committed to showing up everywhere and leaving no one behind.
But the truth is that organizing in the **fifth-largest** state in the country takes time and immense resources. And while we’ve been listening and building our coalition, Trump and his MAGA allies have set their eyes on New Mexico. **They’re banking on billionaire megadonors to drown out our voices.**
We’re building this campaign on grassroots support, and I promise to keep it that way. **But to keep up with their wealth, we have to prove the strength of our movement.**
**[If you’re able, will you chip in your first donation of $14 — one dollar for every thousand miles I’ve traveled — to help us take on Trump, continue to organize, and prove our campaign has what it takes to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250904_1_miles?amount=14&refcode=em20250904-4227&refcode2=4227_400544_uMqRhM&akid=4227%2E400544%2EuMqRhM)**
**[Donate $14 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250904_1_miles?amount=14&refcode=em20250904-4227&refcode2=4227_400544_uMqRhM&akid=4227%2E400544%2EuMqRhM)**
Thank you,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250904-1&t=2&refcode2=4227_400544_uMqRhM&akid=4227%2E400544%2EuMqRhM)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4227%2E400544%2EuMqRhM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4227%2E400544%2EuMqRhM)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

But the truth is that organizing in the fifth-largest state in the country takes time and immense resources. And while we’ve been listening and building our coalition, Trump and his MAGA allies have set their eyes on New Mexico. They’re banking on billionaire megadonors to drown out our voices. We’re building this campaign on grassroots support, and I promise to keep it that way. But to keep up with their wealth, we have to prove the strength of our movement. Thank you, Deb

I want to take a minute to write about public service. Becca started her career as a middle school civics teacher, and my first law job was in my local county attorney’s office. We both believe in giving back to the communities that have given us so much. When she was a teacher, I saw firsthand the dedication, sacrifice, and passion that Becca poured into serving Vermonters. She still brings that fire — and fun — to her work today. **But I won’t lie to you — public office takes a toll right now, not just on Becca, but on all of us.** It’s easy to get hooked by the outrage generators. But we have to stay strong and steady. It really is an all-hands-on-deck moment in America. Each of us must do what we can, and for Becca, that means telling the truth even when it's uncomfortable, and holding leaders accountable when they shortchange working folks. **Becca and I have been together for more than 21 years, and I’ve never seen her back away from a hard conversation.
