name: EMILYs List
subject: We warned you about this.
body:
RFK Jr. is following through on his threats — and abortion rights are on the line. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114622514/567618537/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE907_20250904_RFKBadKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056944&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQxMzJjMi1kMDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xykRaWXM95zBexF_fwYTPNWyj2CQAyxo_qHTMKEgBVY=) Peter,

Back in February, we told you exactly what RFK Jr. and Donald Trump's administration had planned: to target medication abortion and push us closer to a national abortion ban.

Today, RFK Jr. confirmed our fears. During a U.S. Senate hearing, he falsely claimed the data on mifepristone was "twisted" — a dangerous signal that he's preparing to restrict or even revoke access to this safe, widely used medication. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114622515/567618538/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE907_20250904_RFKBadKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056944&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQxMzJjMi1kMDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xykRaWXM95zBexF_fwYTPNWyj2CQAyxo_qHTMKEgBVY=) [_**This is why we have to act decisively. The only way to protect abortion rights is to elect Democratic pro-choice women at every level of government — women who will fight back against Trump and RFK Jr.'s extremist agenda.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114622516/567618539/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE907_20250904_RFKBadKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056944&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQxMzJjMi1kMDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xykRaWXM95zBexF_fwYTPNWyj2CQAyxo_qHTMKEgBVY=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114622517/567618540/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE907_20250904_RFKBadKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056944&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQxMzJjMi1kMDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xykRaWXM95zBexF_fwYTPNWyj2CQAyxo_qHTMKEgBVY=)
---
We knew this was coming. Now, we need to respond with everything we've got.

— the EMILYs List team

_\--------------Original Message----------------
Sent: February 19, 2025
From: EMILYs List _

Peter,

The GOP wants a national abortion ban, plain and simple. And with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. now confirmed as head of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, they've taken a massive step toward making that a reality.

[**Under this corrupt and chaotic presidential administration, EMILYs List women will be the frontline defense for abortion access across the country. Donate today to keep this critical work going:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114622518/567618541/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE907_20250904_RFKBadKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056944&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQxMzJjMi1kMDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xykRaWXM95zBexF_fwYTPNWyj2CQAyxo_qHTMKEgBVY=)
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114622519/567618542/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE907_20250904_RFKBadKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056944&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQxMzJjMi1kMDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xykRaWXM95zBexF_fwYTPNWyj2CQAyxo_qHTMKEgBVY=)
---
In his new position, RFK Jr. has direct control over the FDA and, more dangerously, the future of mifepristone, a safe and effective abortion medication that has been used for decades. Donald Trump has already given him marching orders to look into it — and during his confirmation hearing, RFK Jr. suggested he might revoke FDA approval of the drug.

We know exactly what that means: this is just the next step of the GOP's relentless push to strip away reproductive rights, state by state, ruling by ruling, until abortion access is gone entirely.

RFK Jr. admitted that he'll follow Trump's lead on abortion policy, stating "Whatever he does, I will implement those policies." That's a chilling promise — and a direct threat to millions of Americans' fundamental freedoms.

Because here's the truth: The vast majority of Americans are pro-choice. Now, the only thing standing between us and a national abortion ban is a strong firewall of Democratic pro-choice women in office: **Democratic** attorneys general who can file suit against illegal executive orders, **Democratic** members of Congress who can hold figures like Trump and RFK Jr. accountable, **Democratic** governors who can take them to court, and **Democratic pro-choice women** at every level of government who can fight for reproductive rights everywhere.

[**Donate now to help EMILYs List women fight back against RFK Jr. & the Trump administration's extremist anti-choice agenda:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114622520/567618543/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE907_20250904_RFKBadKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056944&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQxMzJjMi1kMDg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xykRaWXM95zBexF_fwYTPNWyj2CQAyxo_qHTMKEgBVY=)

clean_body: RFK Jr. is following through on his threats — and abortion rights are on the line. | = Peter, Back in February, we told you exactly what RFK Jr. and Donald Trump's administration had planned: to target medication abortion and push us closer to a national abortion ban. Today, RFK Jr. confirmed our fears. During a U.S. Senate hearing, he falsely claimed the data on mifepristone was "twisted" — a dangerous signal that he's preparing to restrict or even revoke access to this safe, widely used medication. = = | = We knew this was coming. Now, we need to respond with everything we've got. — the EMILYs List team \--------------Original Message---------------- Sent: February 19, 2025 From: EMILYs List Peter, The GOP wants a national abortion ban, plain and simple. And with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. now confirmed as head of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, they've taken a massive step toward making that a reality. = = In his new position, RFK Jr. has direct control over the FDA and, more dangerously, the future of mifepristone, a safe and effective abortion medication that has been used for decades. Donald Trump has already given him marching orders to look into it — and during his confirmation hearing, RFK Jr. suggested he might revoke FDA approval of the drug. We know exactly what that means: this is just the next step of the GOP's relentless push to strip away reproductive rights, state by state, ruling by ruling, until abortion access is gone entirely. RFK Jr. admitted that he'll follow Trump's lead on abortion policy, stating "Whatever he does, I will implement those policies." That's a chilling promise — and a direct threat to millions of Americans' fundamental freedoms. Because here's the truth: The vast majority of Americans are pro-choice. Now, the only thing standing between us and a national abortion ban is a strong firewall of Democratic pro-choice women in office: Democratic attorneys general who can file suit against illegal executive orders, Democratic members of Congress who can hold figures like Trump and RFK Jr. accountable, Democratic governors who can take them to court, and Democratic pro-choice women at every level of government who can fight for reproductive rights everywhere. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Food shouldn’t feel like a luxury
body:
The cost of food is pushing families to the edge

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=cdc6441e55&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,**Everywhere I go, people tell me the same thing: the price of groceries is out of control.** Parents are putting items back at the checkout line. Young people are skipping meals. Seniors are forced to choose between food and medicine. Families are sacrificing just to afford essentials.**I know what it feels like to work hard, play by the rules, and still struggle with paying the bills and making ends meet.** That’s why I’m in this race. To bring the issue of affordability and economic empowerment to the top of the conversation and call out the consequences of corporate greed on our families and communities.**We deserve a leader in Congress who demands action when economic inequality divides us.** Groceries, rent, and medicine should not be out of reach for anyone in Los Angeles, or anywhere in this country.[**If you share this vision, will you chip in $15, $35, or whatever feels right today?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=5baeeb4cbe&e=5a6ee82cdb) Your support keeps this campaign going and strengthens our fight for a city and a country where the basics are affordable for everyone.
**In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=f8ad2c1dc0&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

body:
Peter,

The Missouri State Legislature has officially been called back for a special session by Governor Mike Kehoe. Not to make life better for our communities, **but to take up Donald Trump’s call to rig election maps in favor of Republicans.**

This mid-decade gerrymander is designed to lock Missouri into permanent minority rule, split apart our communities, weaken our voices, and push Black and brown Missourians out of fair representation in Congress.

_And as if that wasn’t enough,_ **Republicans are also trying to rewrite our constitution to make it nearly impossible for voters to pass ballot initiatives, an outright attack on the process Missourians have used to raise the minimum wage, defend reproductive freedom, and expand paid sick leave.**

Republicans are about one thing right now — rigging the system against Missouri voters to appease Trump, silence Kansas City, silence St. Louis, and silence you.

[**If we’re going to stop this power grab, we need to build Democratic power to fight back. If you can, please chip in $5, or whatever works for you, to help Wesley stand up to extreme Republicans who are determined to gut our democracy and take us Dear Reader,
Trump has ordered NASA to put a nuclear reactor on the moon by 2030...
And of course, liberals are laughing.
Just like they laughed at **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/78eb34c6-cc85-46b6-af80-ea7d4c00d1c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Of all the "conspiracy" theories surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/78eb34c6-cc85-46b6-af80-ea7d4c00d1c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **may be the most shocking. But it's far from a "conspiracy"... no, it's very real.
And **[lost NASA in-flight recordings](https://substack.com/redirect/78eb34c6-cc85-46b6-af80-ea7d4c00d1c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** are now proving it. # Mysterious deaths of right-wing candidates in Germany raise a lot of questions
Six candidates for Germany's populist right AfD party **[have died in recent weeks](https://substack.com/redirect/1845210f-d0f5-4331-84bc-d1b0b7f321f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** before local elections in North Rhine-Westphalia, forcing new ballots to be printed and some postal voters to recast their votes, though police say they have found no evidence of foul play.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1845210f-d0f5-4331-84bc-d1b0b7f321f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Natural Causes Reported:** Police investigations found no evidence of foul play, with most deaths attributed to pre-existing health conditions and natural causes, though the cluster of deaths within 13 days prompted administrative disruptions and many to start asking questions.
* **Conspiracy Theories:** The deaths sparked social media speculation and conspiracy theories, with AfD co-leader Alice Weidel amplifying claims that the number of deaths was "statistically almost impossible," despite police stating the deaths were from natural causes or undisclosed family reasons.
* **Electoral Context:** The September 14th local elections in North Rhine-Westphalia are seen as the first major test since the new federal government took power, with the AfD hoping to improve on their 5.4% showing in 2022 state elections and potentially match their 16.8% federal election performance.
* **International Support:** The AfD has gained backing from prominent U.S. figures including Elon Musk, who recently claimed "Either Germany votes AfD, or it is the end of Germany," while Germany's domestic spy agency has classified the party as a right-wing extremist organization, though this designation is currently under legal appeal.

name: JB Pritzker
subject: This Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Thank you for standing up.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250904_2_pritzker?refcode=em20250904-2198&amount=5&refcode2=2198_582294_E8Ctny&akid=2198%2E582294%2EE8Ctny)
JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:
[**If you can, please make a $5 donation right now to help Chris Pappas win in New Hampshire and put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250904_2_pritzker?refcode=em20250904-2198&amount=5&refcode2=2198_582294_E8Ctny&akid=2198%2E582294%2EE8Ctny)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250904_2_pritzker?amount=5&refcode=em20250904-2198&refcode2=2198_582294_E8Ctny&akid=2198%2E582294%2EE8Ctny)**
Thank you for standing up,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250904-2?t=1&refcode2=2198_582294_E8Ctny&akid=2198%2E582294%2EE8Ctny)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2198%2E582294%2EE8Ctny)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2198%2E582294%2EE8Ctny)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2198%2E582294%2EE8Ctny)

The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in: Thank you for standing up, JB Pritzker Governor of Illinois New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: We can’t be naive

body:
Democracy is not a given. |
---
American exceptionalism can be a comforting idea, Peter. But my parents fled an authoritarian regime, and my mom always made it clear to me and my brother growing up, _“Don’t be naive, it can happen here.” _ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114623551/567622013/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDVmMDM0MC1kMzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifQVwW2Ul4ZWw2JLucv3b5x5VIKdvlGifk8LwgDsZtA=) My parents passed along an important lesson to me: **democracy is not a given. ** It's an idea that has to be defended generation after generation from authoritarian leaders like Donald Trump, who will trade our ideals for power. **[That’s why I’ll never stop fighting for a democracy that works for everyone. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Chevron and the Koch family are spending big to defeat our climate champions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Hundreds of thousands in attack ads, and they’re only getting started.

|
---
Do you want to know how scared the fossil fuel industry is of our JanePAC-endorsed climate champions? Just look at what’s happening in Washington State: **A super PAC funded by Chevron and the Koch family, among other big business interests, has spent $330,000 to unseat State Senators Victoria Hunt (LD-5) and Deb Krishnadasan (LD-26).** That’s not a typo. $330,000 of dirty money has already been spent on mailers, texts, and digital attack ads designed to spread lies and replace these climate champions with oily politicians in November. And with just two months until voters cast their ballots, you can bet Big Oil is going to spend even more. **It’s up to us and our entire movement to rally behind climate champions when they need us the most. So this is where I ask for your help:[Can you please split a donation between Victoria Hunt and Deb Krishnadasan today? Every dollar you give through this link goes directly to their campaigns and helps them fight back against this fossil fuel spending spree with grassroots donations.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114623916/567623161/-1575571125?refcode=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiYjMzNmE3LWQ0ODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NNK5xENc3PaXaQQAou_MXholf0EcLMdlV15Mo6N57G8=)** So why are fossil fuel giants so desperate to defeat these two women? Because they know Victoria and Deb can't be bought by Big Oil. **Victoria has an excellent climate record throughout her public service.** 👉 She’s championed bills to protect public lands, invest in renewable energy, and create a public notification system for sewage spills. As an Issaquah City Councilor, she led the passage of the city’s Climate Action Plan, which laid out a pathway to decarbonization. **Deb Krishnadasan has been fearless in the State Senate.** 👉 She led the way on legislation to hold corporate polluters accountable and expand research on PFAS, also known as "forever chemicals." She's even working to advance ferry electrification and supports a just transition to 100% clean energy. It's easy to see why Big Oil is so eager to replace these climate champions with politicians who'll do their bidding. That just means we need to work twice as hard to hand the fossil fuel industry a major defeat. **[I wouldn’t be asking again if it wasn’t absolutely necessary: Will you split a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can today between Victoria Hunt and Deb Krishnadasan? Your support will directly help their campaigns counter Big Oil’s attacks and mobilize voters ahead of Election Day in just two short months.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114623917/567623162/-1575571125?refcode=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiYjMzNmE3LWQ0ODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NNK5xENc3PaXaQQAou_MXholf0EcLMdlV15Mo6N57G8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**SPLIT $10**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114623918/567623163/-1575571125?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiYjMzNmE3LWQ0ODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NNK5xENc3PaXaQQAou_MXholf0EcLMdlV15Mo6N57G8=) | [**SPLIT $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114623919/567623164/-1575571125?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.2bb336a7-d489-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiYjMzNmE3LWQ0ODktZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NNK5xENc3PaXaQQAou_MXholf0EcLMdlV15Mo6N57G8=)

clean_body: Hundreds of thousands in attack ads, and they’re only getting started. | Do you want to know how scared the fossil fuel industry is of our JanePAC-endorsed climate champions? Just look at what’s happening in Washington State: A super PAC funded by Chevron and the Koch family, among other big business interests, has spent $330,000 to unseat State Senators Victoria Hunt (LD-5) and Deb Krishnadasan (LD-26). That’s not a typo. $330,000 of dirty money has already been spent on mailers, texts, and digital attack ads designed to spread lies and replace these climate champions with oily politicians in November. And with just two months until voters cast their ballots, you can bet Big Oil is going to spend even more. It’s up to us and our entire movement to rally behind climate champions when they need us the most. So this is where I ask for your help:= So why are fossil fuel giants so desperate to defeat these two women? Because they know Victoria and Deb can't be bought by Big Oil. Victoria has an excellent climate record throughout her public service. 👉 She’s championed bills to protect public lands, invest in renewable energy, and create a public notification system for sewage spills. As an Issaquah City Councilor, she led the passage of the city’s Climate Action Plan, which laid out a pathway to decarbonization. Deb Krishnadasan has been fearless in the State Senate. 👉 She led the way on legislation to hold corporate polluters accountable and expand research on PFAS, also known as "forever chemicals." She's even working to advance ferry electrification and supports a just transition to 100% clean energy. It's easy to see why Big Oil is so eager to replace these climate champions with politicians who'll do their bidding. That just means we need to work twice as hard to hand the fossil fuel industry a major defeat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's show Chevron, Koch Industries, and every corporate polluter that their dirty money can't match the strength of our people-powered movement. In solidarity, xx Jane = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Team,

**Democrats face all kinds of structural disadvantages in Arizona, but we're fighting back.**

Across our state, Democratic candidates are racing to collect the thousands of signatures they need to qualify for the ballot. From school board races to Congress, every Democrat running needs signatures from voters like you to even get their name in front of Arizona families. | [ADD MY SIGNATURE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114624014/567623524/224193491?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM3MjlhNTktZDU4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8X-1z1scEea1z7Q9t4584H9yc1qJjEvUHBdxhRg2dhQ=&emci=fcd7481a-d289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bc729a59-d589-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9307116)
---
**Here's what's at stake: If we don't hit these signature requirements, voters won't have Democratic choices on their ballots.**

That means MAGA Republicans could run unopposed in races where Democrats should be competing. It means fewer voices fighting for working families, reproductive rights, and Arizona's future.

**We can't let that happen.**

Right now, Democratic candidates across Arizona are counting on grassroots supporters to help them meet the signature thresholds. Your signature helps ensure that come Election Day, Arizona voters have real choices — not just the candidates that corporate interests and extremist groups want them to see.

[**Will you add your signature to help Democrats get on the ballot?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114624015/567623525/224193491?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM3MjlhNTktZDU4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8X-1z1scEea1z7Q9t4584H9yc1qJjEvUHBdxhRg2dhQ=&emci=fcd7481a-d289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bc729a59-d589-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9307116)
[ADD MY SIGNATURE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114624016/567623526/224193491?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM3MjlhNTktZDU4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8X-1z1scEea1z7Q9t4584H9yc1qJjEvUHBdxhRg2dhQ=&emci=fcd7481a-d289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=bc729a59-d589-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9307116)

These are requirements that have kept deadly diseases like polio and measles from spreading through our communities for decades. Our Surgeon General called these life-saving protections _slavery_. name: Rob Bonta
subject: Sign my petition against Trump’s unlawful National Guard deployments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
We all must stand up, speak out, and hold this lawless administration accountable.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250904&t=1&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)
Donald Trump is illegally seeking to use the military to police our people and our cities.
**It’s unnecessary, undemocratic, and most importantly, unlawful.**[**Sign my petition against Trump’s unlawful National Guard deployments.**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250904-pet/?t=2&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)
When troops arrived in California in early June, we knew it was unlikely to be the last of Trump’s military occupation of American cities. We were right: now, there are thousands of National Guard servicemembers patrolling the streets of Washington, D.C. for civilian law enforcement.
As a federal judge just affirmed in our lawsuit against Trump for the unlawful deployment of federalized National Guard troops for civilian law enforcement in California — the military cannot act as the President’s personal police force.
Now Brian Schwab — the Attorney General of Washington, D.C. — is suing Trump, too, and I’m proud to stand with him and D.C. in this fight.
**The military cannot be used for civilian law enforcement on American soil. Period, full stop.**
Bottom line: this dangerous moment requires all of us to stand up, speak out, and hold the President accountable to the law, the Constitution, and the democratic values he swore to uphold.
**Join me in speaking out and standing with the people of D.C.**[**Add your name to my petition today to condemn Trump’s illegal deployment of the National Guard for civilian law enforcement and his military occupation of our cities.**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250904-pet/?t=3&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250904-pet/?t=4&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)**
I will never stop fighting against a President hell-bent on co-opting the U.S. military for his own personal stunts — and violating the law and trampling on our rights in the process.
-Rob
[](https://act.robbonta.com/go/1073?t=5&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em250904&t=6&refcode2=1936_1088799_DesMQJ&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1936%2E1088799%2EDesMQJ)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Act now: We won’t be silenced by this censure attempt against me in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, I’ll continue reminding my colleagues that Palestinians deserve to live. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW20_4pi2KirqJwX9ycfNeJO--XUnnG1EXr6StMgKVzXY4FBpUABPBqg6ksqReeJq4PeCmFohn721LUwjJDuRd0Hlw_05t6v92dU7ppvATS7iw-4DBiTe3uPhwYr6S197cSHGYi5xsy0jWvrLa_GSfj5RhyxHV1snW1Hv61tj5ZRfcoovQSCveXO5wvqv0Qsh1EsI2B-mEWO-UGlmIePeDkm9DZqHwqq45PE3GiUmSM5ZXsyShLOEVQSp3e0VpJccBBx_NgQLyC_dsOg-xw-YwvQ/4jm/wVSec48hSNKAF57QyvGdcQ/h0/h001.w7xX1Zr0cZjMEz3dSyJSADx6HmRnx9VJJPIEU8qlrBM)
---
Friend, **A war-mongering Republican Congressmember is trying to bully me into silence by introducing a new measure to censure me for speaking up against the genocide of the Palestinian people.** I’m being targeted for my speech at this weekend’s People’s Conference for Palestine in my home city of Detroit—where I called out the majority of my colleagues in Congress who keep voting for genocide while ignoring the overwhelming majority of Americans who are demanding an arms embargo. They can censure me, but they can’t censure everyone who’s working toward Palestinian liberation. During August’s congressional recess, people across the country came to town halls to demand their representatives stop funding and arming genocide. **Our movement is growing, and we won’t let war-mongers silence us or stop our efforts to save lives.** The more they try to suppress us, the more we need to get louder and more courageous. **[Will you chip in $5, $15, or more to show that we won’t be silenced and we aren’t going anywhere?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlljozhXPZ7F5j9NspQrC0rqiAGrfeRnEIxaRSWKIN-6jmU77xkN_vkvdTKLdWs4sCcjMAM-0ieSL6HlQTCPlnqH-olAa6J7MC6KjkNYhsdDH2Rk7J4QsbviXhaaaHe7p1ItWmfGAR4GUi8KeQGsFbgKe3O6hPXbn1tIiykLI9kV_gicAlPR-PAEeXJ2--PFE69zPb8IkHpPXl84Qce18EI5QMJ4wIM69Bon7Nic5viXY2AeJGMWZVE6rwLakKjKtj5h3ISBlgukFnj6js563PZHvFtgYv1kHAlhLLmo8KLX-K4b2dIVRpZxb5P74wmPaga2nv46W2894nNC7PehTQlECBhf4urudCZ7QW-uG8VnSgG4o3E-WCp4dlAgQHlH-smLRugJB61Ilc3rlrWw04CIs0oNot2UTJo-kQBq-8JxMTgl_VVZGQv0UuoWDF8Sc/4jm/wVSec48hSNKAF57QyvGdcQ/h1/h001.utJXa1qPKp2dWk3YSCqRqBOkbM6gwwcRjcOQD8dUHO4)** | [PUSH BACK AGAINST CENSURE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlljozhXPZ7F5j9NspQrC0rqiAGrfeRnEIxaRSWKIN-xMucp_TEtQy_biuyfR4QG6Xx7CIZzHhqzMJIpfq6qjOJ07hR-4nN_sNdTTZTakUgja2E6L0_YcL1OdjvxCa9BruQZRbQOE9_CbludwzawBxhKDIdUmDxq-uDh7FozIHwl7ceB0Kd1DVGRyb8McxTVPT5HpyaO_Lykdc9htU51MI3PRNuOGXcqAQPEJjrqdGNorvxJnVdl560yI34OAMN2lREiLjaHseJ7qa70Ko0EE3DaoEJTW0d6PkOCuddwy1uifeVRM3OfYSosXlqeIU1gLcjOVmV18XL3eMDgyGjK_nIqg7pelz5_kh6ZxEEJ4Puuu6FGDwjdU1Gcam7P8d-JBcCJTky8GUEDH-ksRLZgkIAcFNqPzLMTYlPDf7cq2oaWvG7RkeSAQ_gjH5-QeQ4J4/4jm/wVSec48hSNKAF57QyvGdcQ/h2/h001.fjh7vYDEuePhtmv0hDgUROJ9mokKgu-gKrA8jQi4L4A)

**At the People’s Conference for Palestine last weekend, I welcomed people to the city that raised me and spoke about how the U.S. government doesn’t value human life, in our country or abroad.**
I explained that as a daughter of Detroit, it’s no surprise to me that our government—which is complicit in war crimes including enabling forced starvation and supplying bombs that are dropped on Gaza’s hospitals and schools—is also defunding Americans’ food assistance and healthcare while turning its military forces on people in U.S. cities.
Detroit, the biggest majority-Black city in the country, has shown me how to fight for civil rights and justice. My neighbors have experienced U.S. troops on our streets, and they’ve risen up and birthed movements. Detroit’s community mothers have taught me that our political institutions won’t save us or free our people: _We_ will do that. Social change comes from organizing in our communities and pushing these institutions to do what is right.
**Our movement is working** : More Democrats in Congress are swearing off AIPAC funding, and more Democrats are supporting policies to restrict U.S. military aid to Israel’s government.1
But most elected leaders are still deeply out of touch with their constituents. For example, last week the Democratic National Committee voted down a resolution for an arms embargo—even though a poll came out beforehand showing that**75 percent of Democratic voters and 60 percent of all U.S. voters oppose sending more military aid to Israel.** 1****
This recent Quinnipiac University poll also found that 77 percent of Democrats and half of all U.S. voters say Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza. **I will keep pushing our government to stand with the American people and stop the Israeli government’s genocide of Palestinians.**
**I will continue defending human rights at home and abroad, including our constitutional right to protest against genocide.** Recently, I went to the University of Michigan to join student activists and workers who are being punished by the public university for their pro-Palestine advocacy. Dissent is critical in a democracy—and academic freedom is part of it.
**[Can you push back against attempts to silence me and our movement, and stand up for our right to dissent, by donating to my campaign today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlljozhXPZ7F5j9NspQrC0rqiAGrfeRnEIxaRSWKIN-yr8SP707kNkob7nN33NXKQ1cf4T2ccQZXBuiYUhzESBzzf8yp5GMaW45NM3ESR5O43pYOKZNojz6bqmNHcYuB2H7BXCS4u4NMOLF3Tr3GHoY98MfZ8FxEAwOMpgtofzE8xJ_ke5LBYsUKuGu4KaoGtq5iXeRJUT9FZBePbP7sGsvZ3IXhfAwVIGnyw6jB9LhMo7IRoIxwrgttARQO751bOK7-TpwB2jZ78KW8-CjD_zNyiv2OX-OaI84pzFrdAM23Om0XVP9mZTftACtwVVo8a8YMZ0O0q1zMabpqpXgJc1YUijYfael7O4AQHUT4zw0GrWx6j7xOfvgN0-FhOP1mdNDG6SyOfSyuU_7DPuLWWvqo6yb9Ev82NuHPZihaciNoLQlYJVVIfa8WBHNFYg-0Q/4jm/wVSec48hSNKAF57QyvGdcQ/h4/h001.UCenf5oIQfnPeAY3Sw1PgOkgNPQ2nUTHgdWRvwzpbDU)**

clean_body: As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, I’ll continue reminding my colleagues that Palestinians deserve to live. | | | Friend, A war-mongering Republican Congressmember is trying to bully me into silence by introducing a new measure to censure me for speaking up against the genocide of the Palestinian people. I’m being targeted for my speech at this weekend’s People’s Conference for Palestine in my home city of Detroit—where I called out the majority of my colleagues in Congress who keep voting for genocide while ignoring the overwhelming majority of Americans who are demanding an arms embargo. They can censure me, but they can’t censure everyone who’s working toward Palestinian liberation. During August’s congressional recess, people across the country came to town halls to demand their representatives stop funding and arming genocide. Our movement is growing, and we won’t let war-mongers silence us or stop our efforts to save lives. The more they try to suppress us, the more we need to get louder and more courageous. | At the People’s Conference for Palestine last weekend, I welcomed people to the city that raised me and spoke about how the U.S. government doesn’t value human life, in our country or abroad. I explained that as a daughter of Detroit, it’s no surprise to me that our government—which is complicit in war crimes including enabling forced starvation and supplying bombs that are dropped on Gaza’s hospitals and schools—is also defunding Americans’ food assistance and healthcare while turning its military forces on people in U.S. cities. Detroit, the biggest majority-Black city in the country, has shown me how to fight for civil rights and justice. My neighbors have experienced U.S. troops on our streets, and they’ve risen up and birthed movements. Detroit’s community mothers have taught me that our political institutions won’t save us or free our people: We will do that. Social change comes from organizing in our communities and pushing these institutions to do what is right. Our movement is working : More Democrats in Congress are swearing off AIPAC funding, and more Democrats are supporting policies to restrict U.S. military aid to Israel’s government.1 But most elected leaders are still deeply out of touch with their constituents. For example, last week the Democratic National Committee voted down a resolution for an arms embargo—even though a poll came out beforehand showing that75 percent of Democratic voters and 60 percent of all U.S. voters oppose sending more military aid to Israel. 1** This recent Quinnipiac University poll also found that 77 percent of Democrats and half of all U.S. voters say Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza. I will keep pushing our government to stand with the American people and stop the Israeli government’s genocide of Palestinians. I will continue defending human rights at home and abroad, including our constitutional right to protest against genocide. Recently, I went to the University of Michigan to join student activists and workers who are being punished by the public university for their pro-Palestine advocacy. Dissent is critical in a democracy—and academic freedom is part of it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Together we will keep fighting for our rights and for the safety and dignity of all people. With you in the fight, Rashida 1 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10290%2E434096%2E7WjI7O)
| | |
---
Hey Derek,
We need to check in about what's happening at the Department of Health and Human Services:
**LAST WEEK:** Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. fired the newly confirmed CDC director. Her offense? Refusing to cave and sign off on sweeping new vaccine restrictions.
**YESTERDAY:** Over 1,000 current and former HHS employees sent a blistering letter calling for RFK Jr.'s resignation. Their message? Between funding cuts and dangerous anti-vaccine theories, his leadership is putting lives at risk.

**SO TODAY:** RFK Jr. was grilled by the Senate Finance Committee because he's been pushing HHS into turmoil and terrorizing public health.
John Fetterman voted **NO** on RFK Jr.'s confirmation way back in February. He stands with the scientists and public health officials at HHS who are trying to protect American families – while RFK Jr. plays politics with their work.
**So we need to know where you stand in the midst of all of this. We need at least 5,000 responses before our poll closes at midnight, so please respond now:**
**Do you approve of RFK Jr.?**
| | | [YES](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51630?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk234-su-fl&t=2&akid=10290%2E434096%2E7WjI7O)

---
Thanks for your response.
– Team Fetterman 💛

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: AT STAKE: MASSIVE cuts to EPA, National Parks and more — respond now to TRIPLE your impact.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4OTYwNTES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMwMDA2MjI1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE: Renew your LCV membership for just $5 before September 30 to protect our air, water, and the agencies that protect our environment and health >> https://links.messages.lcv. Peter — Congress just returned from recess, and at Donald Trump’s
urging, Republicans are moving quickly to push through MASSIVE cuts to the
programs and agencies that keep our air breathable and water safe to drink and
protect us from toxic pollution. Congress has a narrow window to come to an agreement to avoid a government
shutdown, which would defund programs that keep us healthy and safe. Here are
just some of the proposals that put us at risk: Slashing the National Park Service budget by nearly 40%, which would be the largest ever cut to national parks in our history and would lead to less clean, less safe parks, and degrade the natural and cultural resources parks are intended to protect.
Deep cuts to the EPA, including completely eliminating environmental justice programs — abandoning the neighborhoods already bearing the brunt of climate change and hobbling the agency’s ability to hold polluters accountable.
Reduced funding to help states upgrade their water infrastructure, leaving communities around the country with crumbling systems and unsafe, undrinkable water. This moment is so high-stakes for the future of our environment, health, and
communities that we’ve set an urgent goal to raise $50,000 by September 30 — the same deadline Congress has to vote on the budget — and every gift will be TRIPLED. Please, renew your membership for only $5 to fight these reckless cuts to programs that protect our air, water, communities, and health >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQy_ TRIPLE MATCH NOW ACTIVE:

Now through September 30, your renewed membership will be TRIPLED to power our work to defend our air, water, public lands, communities, and health from the Trump administration’s proposed cuts >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_ With your support, we’ll be on Capitol Hill every day, advocating to stop the
worst case scenarios from coming to pass. But our team is only one part of this
resistance, and we can’t do it alone. Peter, we need your support to give this fight everything we’ve got. To keep the pressure up as the September 30 budget deadline looms large, we need
to raise $50,000 before the end of this month. If everyone reading this right now pitched in just $5, we could hit that goal in
just minutes. Join us by renewing your membership while every $5 gift=$15 to help our movement meet the seriousness of this moment and protect our water, air, communities, and future, while your impact is TRIPLED >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XBdgdrxM- RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. With gratitude, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12896051&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDA2MjI1NQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDA2MjI1NQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12896051&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDA2MjI1NQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDA2MjI1NQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

Trump ordered the military to take over D.C. in the name of "stopping crime", despite crime being at a **30-YEAR LOW** (!!!)

This unconstitutional act is just one more step on Trump's authoritarian road.
[ **This hostile takeover could have been stopped if D.C. was a state... but if we’re going to convince Congress to act, we need to know what Democrats like you think about D.C. Statehood.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/67772?t=3&akid=23358%2E4449941%2EpSg7Ky) [ **DO YOU SUPPORT MAKING WASHINGTON, D.C. THE 51ST STATE?**

1️⃣ Over 700,000 Americans live in Washington, D.C., more than in Vermont or Wyoming. But they have ZERO representation in the Senate?!

2️⃣ A staggering 86% of D.C. residents have already voted in favor of becoming the 51st state – a clear mandate for statehood and equal representation.

3️⃣ If DC becomes a state, we’d likely gain two strong Democratic Senate votes![**That would give us a real shot at flipping the Senate and stopping Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda in its tracks.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/67772?t=7&akid=23358%2E4449941%2EpSg7Ky)

That’s why Donald Trump is COMMANDING his MAGA Republican cronies to fight against D.C. Statehood!

[ **Democrats across the country are on board with making D.C. a state, but we need to know what YOU think, Friend. Let us know below!
**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/67772?t=8&akid=23358%2E4449941%2EpSg7Ky)
[ **DO YOU SUPPORT MAKING WASHINGTON, D.C. THE 51ST STATE?**

But they have ZERO representation in the Senate?! 2️⃣ A staggering 86% of D.C. residents have already voted in favor of becoming the 51st state – a clear mandate for statehood and equal representation. 3️⃣ If DC becomes a state, we’d likely gain two strong Democratic Senate votes That’s why Donald Trump is COMMANDING his MAGA Republican cronies to fight against D.C. Statehood! | | | Looking forward to seeing your response, Fight for Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114625132/567626877/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM5YjkyZDEtZDg4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c4l5RNTu-SZPSDvgglI7y7zITUYzpDEqk87dDMe9lxM=) Hey there, with Congress in recess for August, I headed home to meet with Oregonians and discuss the issues that matter most to our communities. This was an incredible opportunity to hear what’s on your minds and understand how I can better represent you in DC. **[I'll tell you more about what I was up to in Oregon, but if you’re ready to help defend this must-hold seat and keep me fighting for working families, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to my re-election campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114625133/567626878/-629675555?refcode=email_090425_recess&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM5YjkyZDEtZDg4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c4l5RNTu-SZPSDvgglI7y7zITUYzpDEqk87dDMe9lxM=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114625134/567626879/-629675555?refcode=email_090425_recess&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM5YjkyZDEtZDg4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c4l5RNTu-SZPSDvgglI7y7zITUYzpDEqk87dDMe9lxM=)
---
This month, I attended Happy Valley National Night Out, and met with local law enforcement officers and firefighters to thank them for their work and discuss how I can best support them in Congress.
I also toured the Redmond Air Center, which plays a key role in fighting wildfires across Central Oregon. It was an honor to meet with the brave forest service representatives and learn more about how they monitor and suppress fires in our state.
Then, I toured the new Redmond Public Safety Facility that just opened in Central Oregon. I met with law enforcement officers and learned about how the new center will help decrease response times and improve coordination.
And I had the opportunity to meet with Redmond firefighters to tour the Redmond Fire and Rescue headquarters and hear about their work to keep our communities safe this season.
On top of all that, I continue hosting my “Give ‘Em Hell” town hall tour to hear directly from Oregonians — because I’m determined to give our community a voice in Congress.
**[Now, I’m back in DC ready to hit the ground running to fight for folks across Oregon. I’m ready to get back to work to bring down costs, protect healthcare, and build a better future for our state. If that’s a mission you believe in, then I’m personally asking for your support today to help me keep up this work in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114625135/567626880/-629675555?refcode=email_090425_recess&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM5YjkyZDEtZDg4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c4l5RNTu-SZPSDvgglI7y7zITUYzpDEqk87dDMe9lxM=)**
| [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114625136/567626881/-629675555?refcode=email_090425_recess&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM5YjkyZDEtZDg4OS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c4l5RNTu-SZPSDvgglI7y7zITUYzpDEqk87dDMe9lxM=)

subject: There’s hell to pay
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
There’s a word for people who could stop all of this and choose not to. A word for people who have the constitutionally mandated power and responsibility to stop an out of control president.
#
Trump federalized the California National Guard, deployed them against American citizens, and thought he’d get away with it.
A federal court just shut him down.
Trump federalized the DC National Guard, deployed them against American citizens, and invited Republican governors to send their own Guard Troops.
He’s getting challenged in court again — and he’s going to lose.
And Trump just launched an illegal, extrajudicial military strike with absolutely no authority. He personally chose to execute 11 people without permission from the only governing body that can sanction war — Congress.
The Department of Defense is not scrambling to justify this use of force because there is no justification. It was a blatantly illegal strike. And at the end of the day, this one’s going to get defeated in court, too.
But there’s a word for people who could stop all of this and choose not to. A word for people who have the constitutionally mandated power and responsibility to stop an out of control president.
That word isn’t coward, or fraud, or traitor. It’s Republican.
And it is on each of us to do everything we can to defeat the Republicans enabling this lawless president to shred our Constitution and everything we hold dear. There’s hell to pay.
VoteVets is up to the task. If you haven’t given up, please:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114625655/567629115/1341216162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Loomer4_250904_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYThmODQ4NC1kYTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DAJUNQX-hrqT_guldAv4symTv1XYQiFrhazoWElD47M=) Derek –

* Robert F. Kennedy Jr. – the guy in charge of our nation’s health – testified in front of my colleagues and me today. It’s clear he’s putting American lives at risk by ignoring the experts and promoting junk science. **I joined my Democratic colleagues to call on RFK Jr. to resign immediately.**
* After promising transparency, Donald Trump is doubling down on his refusal to release the Epstein files and calling it a “Democrat hoax.” **What is Donald Trump trying to hide?**

Seriously, Derek, this is embarrassing. Our country is better than this.

We’ve got to take back the Senate for Democrats. We’ve got to defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms. And we’ve got to _finally_ put some guardrails on this President and the other incompetent wackjobs calling the shots.

Seriously, Derek, this is embarrassing. Our country is better than this. We’ve got to take back the Senate for Democrats. We’ve got to defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms. And we’ve got to finally put some guardrails on this President and the other incompetent wackjobs calling the shots. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** The fight continues, Mark ******=****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: I’m a minivan-driving Midwest mom working with President Trump to deliver results.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ashley Hinson Victory Committee
body:
I’m running for Senate because DC could use more Pro-Trump, Conservative Moms.

Friend, I’ll get straight to the point:
I’m a pro-Trump, conservative minivan-driving mom from the Midwest running for Senate in the biggest race in the entire country. [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b6XT/?__vbtrk=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)I was born and raised in Iowa. Now, I’m raising my two boys in the state that has given me so much. I got into this fight for them, for their future.
A few years ago, their school tried to allow kids to secretly change their gender identity at school WITHOUT telling the parents. This is one of the moments that changed me and fueled my fight against the radical Left and their woke agenda.
We fought back against this nonsense, and we won. But the fight isn’t over.
In Congress, I’m fighting alongside President Trump to restore common sense and deliver real results for families.
* We’ve cut taxes.
* We’ve delivered relief for small businesses and family farms.
* We’ve put an end to waste, fraud, and abuse from federal spending.
* We’ve closed the Southern Border, we’re sending criminal aliens back to where they came from, and we’re making it crystal clear that nothing is more important than keeping Americans safe.

That’s why I’m running for Senate to stand with President Trump and get the job done.

Democrats want to elect a Senator who will blindly obey their far-Left agenda, even if it means harming our kids.

This isn’t going to happen under my watch. I apologize for being so blunt, but if we can’t get the resources to fight back against the Democrats, we will start out at a serious disadvantage.

Democrats are bankrolling a blue wave to crush conservatives like me across the map. They want to destroy President Trump’s Senate Majority to stonewall his agenda. The ONLY way to fight back is to ensure we have the resources to win this seat.

**[Chip in to elect a no-nonsense conservative Mom to stand with President Trump against the radical left.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b6XT/?__vbtrk=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** [KEEP A CONSERVATIVE MOM IN THE FIGHT
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b6XT/?__vbtrk=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[RUSH AID TO ASHLEY HINSON
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b6XT/?__vbtrk=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[HELP REACH ASHLEY’S CRITICAL GOAL
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b6XT/?__vbtrk=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)I hope I can count on your support today—this is more than just defending another Republican Senate Seat—our conservative values are on the chopping block if we don’t start preparing for the Democrats’ onslaught of lies.
Talk soon,
-Ashley Hinson [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b6XT/?__vbtrk=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2NjY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Derek,
The Trump administration’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” is putting millions of Americans’ Social Security benefits at risk.
According to a whistleblower, a former senior DOGE official copied the Social Security numbers, names, and birthdays of over 300 million Americans to a private server that’s lacking proper security.
**This reckless mismanagement of sensitive data could potentially put the entire Social Security system at risk.**
This is unacceptable. Chris Deluzio believes that we should be protecting and expanding the Social Security benefits that Americans earned, and count on.

clean_body: | NPR: “Whistleblower says Trump officials copied millions of Social Security numbers” Sign the petition: | | Derek, The Trump administration’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” is putting millions of Americans’ Social Security benefits at risk. According to a whistleblower, a former senior DOGE official copied the Social Security numbers, names, and birthdays of over 300 million Americans to a private server that’s lacking proper security. This reckless mismanagement of sensitive data could potentially put the entire Social Security system at risk. This is unacceptable. Chris Deluzio believes that we should be protecting and expanding the Social Security benefits that Americans earned, and count on. Chris is committed to fighting these threats to Social Security in every way he can, and he needs you standing with him. | Thanks for signing, Deluzio HQ | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Michigan Governor’s race is a toss-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
Hi there,
It’s only September, but these last nine months have felt like a thousand. From chaotic tariff policies wreaking havoc on our economy to the misuse of our federal troops for performative politics in our largest cities to redistricting wars to [the president taking cues from Vladimir Putin](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2074?t=2&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2) on how to run our American democracy, it is a lot.

But one thing this year that has given me hope is the growing reality that governors are our guardrails. From Pritzker, to Moore, to Newsom, they are quickly becoming the first and last line of defense against the corrupt wannabe dictator in the White House.
And the **race to be Michigan’s next Governor** will determine where our battleground state stands in that fight. **Will Michigan be led by a governor who stands up to the chaos and the cruelty of the Trump administration, or one who bends the knee?** You know where I stand, but here’s the thing. Right now, even though I am leading in the polls and momentum is on our side, **this race is a true toss-up**. Check out this take from _Inside Elections:_
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
**There is no doubt about it: the 2026 election for Michigan’s next governor is going to be close. We’ve got a long road ahead of us and a lot of work to do to ensure our victory.****That’s where you come in. **
**[I’m counting on your support, especially because — unlike my opponents — I haven’t taken a cent from corporate PACs. Any amount you can chip in — even just $1 — will go toward sharing our message and fighting for a Michigan where everyone can thrive.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)**
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/585?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ZUaTEC&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
---
There’s a lot at stake in 2026. I’m running to ensure we stand our ground in Michigan, defend our values, secure our democracy, and protect our economy.
Winning this race is going to be tough. I’m running against well-funded opponents who are lagging in the polls but pulling out all the stops with wealthy, deep-pocketed special interests to get ahead.
**We need to show everyone that our campaign is ready for whatever they throw at us. Because the stakes are high. And we’re here to win.**
**[So please, let’s show them what we’ve got and that we’re ready to win this toss-up race. Pitch in to our campaign today →](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/581?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ncJ1B1&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q32025._u867d&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q32025.vCRznT&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q32025.koEtbW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q32025.z9_9cy&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=677%2E181023%2Erngts2)
---
This race is a marathon, and I’m grateful you are in this fight with me.
Let’s go.
Jocelyn

clean_body: was really hoping it wouldn't come to this, Peter... I hate to tell you this, but I got word that we fell short of our CRUCIAL Fundraising Deadline Goal last night. This is a crushing blow. But I'm not about to quit on our movement, Peter. I've launched an internal extended deadline for the next ten minutes to give us one more shot at reaching this key Goal! Now, you have a choice. You can: Give up on our fight to keep Virginia red. The country will think conservatives aren't committed to building a better tomorrow for our nation and here in Virginia. completely counting on you! I know we can finally reach this Goal and close the MASSIVE fundraising gap between me and my Leftist opponent. don't ignore this request - I'm begging you. I can't thank you enough for your support, Peter. I can't wait to see your donation process. God bless,Winsome | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Dear Friend,
Thank you to everyone who joined me at my birthday celebration last month - it meant so much to be surrounded by friends and supporters who share my vision for California’s future.
Special thanks to Oakland Mayor Barbara Lee, State Controller Malia Cohen, and Supervisor John Gioia for their kind remarks.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5333766536566A446B533151642F747053727757314651496B414E51396E47373436487650324D656542712B433243506562384270445330643343624E4D4751/editor_images/6C70667E-08BC-430E-B298-E541770EB514.JPG]
If you weren’t able to make it to the party but would still like to donate, click here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Our campaign's momentum is rapidly growing. Our next two events are in Berkeley and Walnut Creek - I hope you’ll attend, join the conversation, and support the campaign.
Berkeley Brunch Event
Sunday, September 7, 2025
11:00am - 1:00pm
RSVP online by clicking here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamtonysept2025]
Walnut Creek Event
Saturday, September 27, 2025
3:00pm - 4:30pm
RSVP online by clicking here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tonysept27]
Together, we can assure that every child and family in California has the opportunity to thrive. I hope to see you soon!
Sincerely,
Tony Thurmond

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=61c7416a7fa144388d3a7c2355223b3b&_e=vEbMHSCKRNTGt9RTWtGOOki2_ZlIoJjNLoWh-C8ljNIFb_hZzV_hRB0xryby3U7dbesOxVLt6QZ7jvCaTK34gyQlwLOnGjz0VzT-uw1erK5L4XAff2T3qR97tYsnCE7RRRFh2FAIzaYubhgZmcQRqpcjzkA8qBh4kWr3Yt_nU2gHkLGHlXJi9xr308LHPVqYEt5LNlQQZmeG8hoOJzHqlPK3SPki4aMO8kDCazfV9SWIvH3QRcxb23o5XL8gq_67NLEFVsOm05pF3qCyS1y_5P1KPJHhnkpHwQefTYwHJTMcHKKNzc1iUJVtNF8BgRMWo4ij-NsEH-jrKmcLkRnq9YlGoipjITGq3RCaUAx4axqdRqDajXtSh9O_9wW4hPVzxmHkU7PmmefpYx1nNqYlJZImp-n-WHePZgPNWhaho6u8Z363I6SjsNegGp0oBaEK7v-XU8vhcFx2g9cvp_KI1cqlZVhg-4PiBzYmgeom9kegVMLVqZ51Vb4yfRzz5C8Enwwqfe4YXK8etHyLwnk7uRcP38sr9SUl7JCIyiv4cqlQg-6JsFnBnQleFyNdMqm7XVFyEjugcdK5ux54S8aSJz1Cjfh39st-ZuIFTsXhHft-5qbS1kPL1kcBxKUQ1_iMDfcVBwTuVC3mEY8-ogHGUQ%3D%3D)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

body:
We’re checking our grassroots records to ensure they’re up to date — and we have a quick question for you:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114626677/567632301/1435897075?refcode=email_090425_vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjU4OTk4Yi1kZTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v1So6efPXCT58eYlnVwKyw_uNR7CnzkidlxCuSe3fYE=&emci=e3abf09a-c989-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2658998b-de89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Friend, this grassroots team has grown exponentially since John flipped Colorado’s Senate seat from red to blue back in 2020. **So with the midterms on the horizon, we’re checking our grassroots records to ensure they’re up to date — and we have a quick question for you:** | **Did you cast a ballot in the 2024 Election?** | | [Record Your Response →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114626678/567632302/1429244301?refcode=email_090425_vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjU4OTk4Yi1kZTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v1So6efPXCT58eYlnVwKyw_uNR7CnzkidlxCuSe3fYE=&emci=e3abf09a-c989-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2658998b-de89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)

Listen, not only does Colorado’s Senate seat have a habit of flipping back and forth between Democrats and Republicans, but Washington Republicans have been watching this seat for years — and they’re gearing up to inject MILLIONS into Colorado to flip this seat back to a Trump-loyalist and cement their hold on the Senate.
**Republicans know that if they can take down John and flip Colorado red, Democrats will have _zero path_ to retaking the Senate majority in 2026.**
That’s why it’s so important our campaign has accurate data on how many of our supporters voted in the past election as we gear up for 2026. **Because on Election Day, it all comes down to turning out the voters we need to keep Colorado blue — and help Democrats take back the Senate majority.**
**[So please, can you help ensure our campaign has the most accurate data possible by filling out our quick, one-question poll today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114626679/567632303/1429244301?refcode=email_090425_vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjU4OTk4Yi1kZTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v1So6efPXCT58eYlnVwKyw_uNR7CnzkidlxCuSe3fYE=&emci=e3abf09a-c989-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2658998b-de89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)**
| [Respond Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114626680/567632304/1429244301?refcode=email_090425_vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjU4OTk4Yi1kZTg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v1So6efPXCT58eYlnVwKyw_uNR7CnzkidlxCuSe3fYE=&emci=e3abf09a-c989-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2658998b-de89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)

name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m livid, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-warner25.BOz6iY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=8960%2E5257348%2E-ZIWt8 ]Mark Warner

I’ll be honest,
Derek: I’m
livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly.

The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe
conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11
denialism – and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence
professionals.

If you’re as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the
Senate for Democrats – please join me and Adam Schiff with a contribution
to our campaigns:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-warner25.eXcXGw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1004&akid=8960%2E5257348%2E-ZIWt8 ]DONATE

Hear me out,
Derek:

Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence
Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these
are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to
our intelligence community. And they have never been questioned or
politicized... until now.

Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the
unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me.
And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit.

I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is. This
administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob
with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism,
anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white
supremacists.

Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my
constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the
security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist
attention-seekers.

But for goodness sake – I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the
silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes. It doesn’t
matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration
acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than
stand up for what is right.

I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats
and flip the balance of power in Congress.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-warner25.eXcXGw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1005&akid=8960%2E5257348%2E-ZIWt8 ]Join me and Adam Schiff with an emergency donation today to help us
fight back, defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms, and flip the
Senate. Your donation will be split between my reelection campaign and
Adam Schiff.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Senators Mark Warner and Adam Schiff will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=abs-em-warner25.s4KlCU&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8960%2E5257348%2E-ZIWt8 ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=abs-em-warner25.Zk5sRq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8960%2E5257348%2E-ZIWt8 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

The fight continues,

Mark Warner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=abs-em-warner25.-dW4pf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250904_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8960%2E5257348%2E-ZIWt8 ]DONATE MONTHLY
