name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250904-1?refcode=em20250904-2314&amount=5&refcode2=2314_21716__-ZFPb&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)
It's Mikie Sherrill — Congresswoman Sarah McBride said I could reach out to you about something important.
I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision:
**_I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for._ **
I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, [**I hope you’ll split a few dollars between my team and Sarah McBride to help close our budget gap and fund this new ad buy →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250904-1?refcode=em20250904-2314&refcode2=2314_21716__-ZFPb&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)
Here’s why we made this choice:
Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me.
But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support.
**And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.**
This is how we do it. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor.
**[To be candid with you, I made this choice because I believe that our grassroots team will come through the way you always have and help us power this campaign to victory. To close our budget gap and fund this big ad buy, we’ve set a goal of 100 online donations before midnight tonight. If you could step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Sarah McBride I would be incredibly grateful.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250904-1?refcode=em20250904-2314&refcode2=2314_21716__-ZFPb&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250904-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250904-2314&refcode2=2314_21716__-ZFPb&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)**
Thank you so much for your support. It means the world.
-Mikie
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250904-1&t=1&refcode2=2314_21716__-ZFPb&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2314%2E21716%2E_-ZFPb)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

* **[00:27:45]** A sobering look at why the traditional political process won't save us -- and how outside pressure is the only force that can disrupt this corrupt, crumbling system.

--Mike

name: Powered by People
subject: A political witch hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
In about the last two weeks, Powered by People has already racked up more than $300,000 in legal fees to fight Ken Paxton in court.
This corrupt, impeached, twice-indicted Attorney General is attempting to bankrupt the most successful voter registration program in Texas. He is weaponizing the political system to persecute his political enemies.
**Ken Paxton is trying to shut down Powered by People and put Beto in jail.** This isn’t justice—it’s a political witch hunt designed to silence us and crush democracy in Texas.
But here’s the truth: we will not back down. We’ve faced tough odds before, and every time, people like you stood up and carried this people-powered movement through.
Now, we need you again. To keep fighting Paxton in court and protect our record-breaking voter registration and mobilization work, we have to immediately raise $300,000 to cover these massive legal bills.
[**Can Beto count on you to chip in today to help us fight back against Ken Paxton’s abuse of power and continue our essential on-the-ground organizing?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67030?t=2&akid=240343%2E444211%2E4Azxu0)
**[DONATE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67030?t=3&akid=240343%2E444211%2E4Azxu0)**
Thank you so much for your support in this critical moment,
Team Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/Powered-by-People-52bbdfbf-f23e-4c6f-a608-84d883119212?refcode=em20250904-240343-footer)**

That it was safe. That it was rare. That it was compassionate. But today, more than 60 percent of abortions happen through a pill. Taken in silence. Usually at home. Often without a doctor. Often without the woman truly understanding what she is doing. The damage is staggering. To the baby. To the mother. To the culture. And most people are staying quiet. But one organization is not. That is why I am standing with PreBorn!

And we still have the ability to act. If you want to fight back against a culture of death, this is how you do it. In a real and practical way. Support PreBorn!

Tucker Carlson

name: INDems Update
subject: Dividing our Communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This week, we got our first look at a new map that Republicans are considering passing to cheat Hoosier voters and gerrymander away the voices of thousands in our state. It’s a shameful proposal that splits communities across the state. This map would divide Indianapolis into three pieces, putting the Indianapolis Motor Speedway in the same district as Vincennes, Geist in the same district as the Cincinnati suburbs and downtown Indianapolis in the same district as Brown County State Park. It connects Gary with parts of Kokomo and splits Allen, St. Joseph, and Vigo, and other counties in half. **[We can’t let a map that cracks our communities for political gain become law. We need all hands on deck – can you contribute a recurring $10 monthly donation today to fund the fight through this critical moment for our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114627338/567634646/-1275564556?amount=10&recurring=1&refcode=250904divide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg4NDMyOS1lMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clacxin4izEAbEpvCX5r5XR9fLjomjP_UigjTX7rjKU=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114627339/567634647/427987909?refcode=250904divide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg4NDMyOS1lMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clacxin4izEAbEpvCX5r5XR9fLjomjP_UigjTX7rjKU=) This map is an extreme example of politicians picking their voters, not the other way around. It’s designed to give Indiana Republicans the results they want, and it’s being pushed by Beltway politicians who don’t live in or care for Indiana. Hoosiers are opposed to this cheating. Let’s talk about the issues that they’re running from. Too many families are struggling to afford their electricity bills, healthcare, childcare, and more. That’s where the focus of our lawmakers should be. **[Stand with the thousands of Hoosiers who oppose this blatant power grab by making a donation to Indiana Democrats today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114627340/567634648/-1275564556?refcode=250904divide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg4NDMyOS1lMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clacxin4izEAbEpvCX5r5XR9fLjomjP_UigjTX7rjKU=)** Thanks,
INDems

clean_body: | Peter, This week, we got our first look at a new map that Republicans are considering passing to cheat Hoosier voters and gerrymander away the voices of thousands in our state. It’s a shameful proposal that splits communities across the state. This map would divide Indianapolis into three pieces, putting the Indianapolis Motor Speedway in the same district as Vincennes, Geist in the same district as the Cincinnati suburbs and downtown Indianapolis in the same district as Brown County State Park. It connects Gary with parts of Kokomo and splits Allen, St. Joseph, and Vigo, and other counties in half. = = This map is an extreme example of politicians picking their voters, not the other way around. It’s designed to give Indiana Republicans the results they want, and it’s being pushed by Beltway politicians who don’t live in or care for Indiana. Hoosiers are opposed to this cheating. Let’s talk about the issues that they’re running from. Too many families are struggling to afford their electricity bills, healthcare, childcare, and more. That’s where the focus of our lawmakers should be. = Thanks, INDems [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
This race is potentially about to get much more difficult. | | | Peter, The Trump administration is desperately hoping to clear the field in the NYC mayoral race in order to stop Zohran Mamdani. According to a report in _The New York Times,_ **Trump advisers are trying to persuade Eric Adams and Curtis Sliwa to drop out of the race by offering them positions in the administration — all to prop up Andrew Cuomo's flagging campaign.** 1 This race is potentially about to get much more difficult. Billionaire donations are pouring in. They’re planning to cover the city with ads and mailers over the next few weeks, spreading misinformation about Zohran. **And now they’re taking it to a whole new level by having Trump try and put his thumb on the scale.** [**We need to ramp up our efforts immediately in order to be ready for whatever is coming our way in this race. Please rush a donation of any amount today and help the Working Families Party fuel our voter contact programs to elect Zohran Mamdani in November.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T966anOFnxLCk2AXJI73uxGd80Qfp5tc1NFdvV1dn66ZpSRM1MqqZrKdsZW0i-OhHHm1PT0NbteupC64mJCc6LNDkESHVC0h4LJNrIF7dpG1fASkSZ0-qSC-aTx4FarM3DgfUXKP7_S6FbVm1wk1k3NoG-GMreTVFicsRjwiupx6zMHtYMAGPoU-BtoTcuPgPZ_AopabWpNoF-LLUvhNHJ4mWX8yuxwVa7HD1U5BpAb2Xknc9yy7qKm_H0SitQnQOmLmKDF0x382weHUEQVlS1QHcNSzHnjaQxX365STDRwGjTpLaqGuHkLAU8SC3rAvYTVA-YEuQrcdRe1DfyPYKzyqOuNd-XFZGU9g4MvO8U5Rt0Ex7iSrSeio0WZabK6rnqOTU61c6XAsxezo5sNm8NXA/4jm/wUd8QxpGSeOS52YDhj1cDw/h0/h001.wa4EhxTFrZEtJFpN99CPBEn1COKeLem6nSdGxEiRcU0) **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T966anOFnxLCk2AXJI73uxGd80Qfp5tc1NFdvV1dn66ZrjomAeBPvEqqxoDGqfJHFTz5rbsl_E5y6OgRWELFj3Os752RmDA6rZYQmNTRGjNH_Zn4AwQVTzNclHkN9tty8tzdtHjt38tsg7Kj3fcEaOFzjAvEFIE_iOKXo12-WV1ky03pyu9Gvqm8VLjljuPCA3jInlcI4xztUkRGf_LAA2BkxVtF5s2Lz1xPsaa8pLOAHh6Q1qUErtY0NyzbpVTslT2Xs56W5_JzEr_l8ahsASy0RBzwp1QeLiEsKBl6MfA1DfzYtkfJ2O5IA4GUw1THrQ7vTY8nkNU3T39zgWuzXXldxUZY3ssRkdFMGVZAMJgpr7ejJq06Q6paAMfwQ89rkvlKQ3S-xfshPE8p9c3yWFcGGKnbo1WRQz8nKYv770b2E/4jm/wUd8QxpGSeOS52YDhj1cDw/h1/h001.6W9XBjG5rNNa1xPjTPDZtUVYo2fk-2VZ-uTeTZNjMZw)** Here’s the bottom line: **Trump, Cuomo, and Adams are birds of a feather.** That’s why they have the same donors, power-brokers, and advisers behind them. **They wouldn't be doing all of this if they weren't terrified by Zohran's momentum.** But they also wouldn't go through all this effort if they didn't think it had a real chance of paying off. Yes, our movement is strong. And we already showed what we’re capable of in June's primary by defeating Cuomo’s big-money machine. **But over the next few weeks, we’ll be up against the full weight of the billionaire class, MAGA crooks — and now Trump himself.** Attack ads are going to flood the city. clean_body: This race is potentially about to get much more difficult. | | | Peter, The Trump administration is desperately hoping to clear the field in the NYC mayoral race in order to stop Zohran Mamdani. According to a report in The New York Times, Trump advisers are trying to persuade Eric Adams and Curtis Sliwa to drop out of the race by offering them positions in the administration — all to prop up Andrew Cuomo's flagging campaign. 1 This race is potentially about to get much more difficult. Billionaire donations are pouring in. They’re planning to cover the city with ads and mailers over the next few weeks, spreading misinformation about Zohran. And now they’re taking it to a whole new level by having Trump try and put his thumb on the scale. Here’s the bottom line: Trump, Cuomo, and Adams are birds of a feather. That’s why they have the same donors, power-brokers, and advisers behind them. They wouldn't be doing all of this if they weren't terrified by Zohran's momentum. But they also wouldn't go through all this effort if they didn't think it had a real chance of paying off. Yes, our movement is strong. And we already showed what we’re capable of in June's primary by defeating Cuomo’s big-money machine. But over the next few weeks, we’ll be up against the full weight of the billionaire class, MAGA crooks — and now Trump himself. Attack ads are going to flood the city. And Fox News will dedicate even more time to spreading lies about Zohran. Underestimating this threat is exactly what they want us to do. We need to redouble our efforts instead. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , New York Times, September 6, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: My friend, Scott Colom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
He’s ready to fight for you.
| | |
---
Friend, I’ve got some good news to share -
My friend, Scott Colom, just announced he’s running for Senate in Mississippi! I am glad to see a leader like Scott step up at a time when Mississippi families need him most. I’m doing everything I can to make sure he kicks off his campaign with a show of force, but I need your help to see it through. [**Will you chip in $5 or more, split between my campaign and Scott’s, right now to help boost his campaign and spread his message to every Mississippi voter? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114627786/567636165/527198081?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5604-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTllY2ZkZi1lMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRfobfN9nhpIgGzT6IzTIOfVuxQiMXNp1OxYdiiIpuc=)
| | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114627788/567636167/527198081?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5604-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTllY2ZkZi1lMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRfobfN9nhpIgGzT6IzTIOfVuxQiMXNp1OxYdiiIpuc=)
---
I’ve seen firsthand the ‘leadership’ that his opponent brings, and let me tell you, friend, prioritizing the wants of big donors over the needs of working families is not leadership at all. It’s neglect.
Scott has spent his life serving his neighbors and working with people from all walks of life to keep his community safe, because he knows that when it comes to bettering the lives of Mississippians, working together, no matter your party or your opinion, is crucial to building a thriving community.
He’s taken on cold cases, worked hard to keep Mississippi safe from violent criminals, and held corrupt officials accountable.
Now he’s ready to bring that same fight to the Senate to lower costs, protect our hospitals, and bring good jobs to the state.
If there’s one thing I know about Scott, it’s that he shows up, and he doesn’t back down from tough fights. But he’s up against a well-funded opposition that's ready to bury his campaign, so he needs your immediate support today.
[**With so much on the line in Mississippi, will you split $5 or anything you can spare between my campaign and Scott’s to help build the kind of people-centered movement Mississippians deserve? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114627791/567636169/527198081?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5604-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTllY2ZkZi1lMjg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRfobfN9nhpIgGzT6IzTIOfVuxQiMXNp1OxYdiiIpuc=)

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Heckled, shouted down, shut out…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, Recently I sat down with Rochester area officials for what was supposed to be a constructive conversation about how we can work together for the people of southern Minnesota. But the radical Left had other plans. Protesters stormed the room, shouted, heckled, and disrupted the meeting until it was forced to shut down. Their goal was simple: silence your voice in Washington. This is the new normal for Democrats and their activist allies. They don’t want debate, they don’t want discussion, they don’t want accountability. They want control. And if they can’t win on ideas, they’ll try to drown us out with mob tactics. Now more than ever, I need you standing with me. I ran for Congress to fight for secure borders, for our farmers and small businesses, and for the values that make Minnesota strong. Every dollar you give sends a message that southern Minnesota’s voice will not be bullied, shouted down, or silenced. Chip in today to help me keep fighting back against the Left’s radical mob:

Brad Finstad

**ICYMI:** JD Vance came to Georgia last month to prop up Donald Trump’s devastating budget law — and Georgians made it clear: **we’re not falling for it.** Impacted Georgians are **slamming** the GOP Senate field — Buddy Carter, Mike Collins, and Derek Dooley — for supporting Trump’s budget bill that **guts critical programs like Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security.** **ONE:** Their support of Trump’s terrible bill has destructive consequences for Georgians. A rural hospital in Claxton is **considering cutting services** — and seniors are worried about **losing the benefits** they worked their entire lives to earn. **TWO:** While Georgians are sounding the alarm, JD Vance flew in to try and **spin the truth**. But no amount of political theater can hide what this law actually does — or the fact that every single Georgia Republican running for Senate backed it. **THREE:** We’re organizing to expose the truth and hold every single one of these MAGA extremists accountable — **but we need to be ready for the fight ahead.** [So Peter, will you chip in $10 right now to help the Democratic Party of Georgia hold the GOP accountable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114628424/567638028/-1560775800?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_090325_VANCE_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzllYjliYi1lMzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cv7cmdu7dcOTz7CrAGMtPCtG93H5TMA5wVPKpWwSQek=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: We made a very difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
It's done. We decided to do it.

We made a very difficult decision earlier this week, and as someone who cares deeply about passing the Election Rigging Response Act, you should know about it.
Earlier this week, we went up on the air with our first television ads of the campaign. We do not currently have the money to stay up until ballots drop in a month, but we couldn't wait. Our opponents' ads are already on the air, one man with a history of giving to extremist causes has contributed $20 million to beat us, and more Republican donors are showing up as well.
So we couldn't wait or we'd risk falling behind.
And the bet we made was that people like you who understand the importance of passing the Election Rigging Response Act will chip-in to help us close the budget gap we created with this decision.
Now that we are on the air and you see what your donation goes toward, I am asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my ballot measure committee to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act? If we can reach the voters we need to reach, we will win. But we need the resources to get it done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250904&refcode2=2516_4767699_Nh86H7&akid=2516%2E4767699%2ENh86H7)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em250904&refcode2=2516_4767699_Nh86H7&akid=2516%2E4767699%2ENh86H7)**

****
Like I said, this is a tough call. But you've shown how committed you are to getting this passed. That means a lot to me.
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2516%2E4767699%2ENh86H7).
Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: HMP, California Teachers Association, Newsom for California – Governor 2022.

[**With your help, I can continue giving back to my community. Can you chip in to my campaign for State Treasurer today?**](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/rlXOTMwZV51HDyFbh4VBiGH2VQ58hbcLtieIF6lcHlBvzW2ZQCQ7bD7BzLjlCJeNKDklaQFLFse3wJChodRzSghkTiBksc8uHxH7WssQ0RmDXzt-hpkvhx4xB3BtDgXjD0kaVmUtsa8YBiX1KMqxjlqBaEaTvXyiAiTqFTwg40q6LCS-sF0F34ONdovLUXaO5vyWdRwU43Fdj8l52zH5CDIJZ5ls4NJG7TN5pJ7ebUBXuN55iaDQHiG44thJp6tjjRRFtpqvUT-qcFv_wCLO6OpZI_6ewR9K0z2WwgFQHeHBAQLSo2hkyhcH9UCu-v9yQwxyA1jgqH8dULmuChIJB4j3dNtWiuuaXRFJcL10madti6H0vzpGWemRB8uB4TrlWgkIZukzynvndAqWlKULr7QvzmvTSL5-u9IiBWzhp7Yp9V6GWUHS5h5TP63doFHEHrD2sw4AGtgGhlMtU3lNmSWOlLYmmuF7XZHFMTvcOkbqTF3DghKjF40GpaNnT7qzG2G9AVUZAyJOCeOn1LB1ZReSdur60p2JgyiaU0CTXeItBdACO1RoRTWN__58tbSzbxx8QOrRd96vflYzPYouybTp0dl8ToPf0YPgFzhexcfpHLQqgG83wjBtTPHo5T8n97e9t2wOND-hpZGJ8hRSwHPTM3iOpoQGyLXnbtIq3s0I9BjCWHYmZMmMRCPp0p0hV4SDI1_YGHZrKIUh-TW6G-mahohDtW8AyoTMmPr9ddZXAjFuo_UwIr9wTzTZeE5GwmNSBkvgkDkIWp-7H5Fob77IRWcCg6mlTFcS8shQ4muep4iDLMt8mywqFP8ZNxcHvF8KofXlKvigIPCc1vYBheH9cuucBUZs_xJKEG8IN6_8RnIBiG9ENLHWmKVEhE-WRy-hEOoLVDMZlIZu7HuwEN226lTl_A5E5mq6Z6BtDxX3LF0DDh4rw-c4/aTVbS2ToqAKOgyTrX8sxi0yHM6TmJmDa/12) I learned the value of service at such a young age. At sixteen, I began volunteering as a firefighter at my local fire department. I was so passionate about this service, that I drove to all of the fire departments I could to get all the relevant certifications. I took every class that I could and gained 200 hours of classroom experience to become a firefighter. And you know what? I got it done. My time as a firefighter was so influential and taught me the importance of public service. clean_body: I have spent my life committed to supporting my community. With your help, I can continue giving back to my community. Can you chip in to my campaign for State Treasurer today? | | | Hi Peter, I have spent my life committed to supporting my community. I learned the value of service at such a young age. At sixteen, I began volunteering as a firefighter at my local fire department. I was so passionate about this service, that I drove to all of the fire departments I could to get all the relevant certifications. I took every class that I could and gained 200 hours of classroom experience to become a firefighter. And you know what? I got it done. My time as a firefighter was so influential and taught me the importance of public service. Serving in the Colorado State Legislature has been one of the greatest honors of my life. It’s allowed me to lead on key issues as Chair of the Joint Technology Committee and Chair of the Legislative LGBTQ+ Caucus, while also contributing on committees focused on fiscal policy, budgeting, environment, and energy. What’s stayed with me the most, though, are the conversations I’ve had with Coloradans in every corner of our state. Hearing their stories, sharing in their hopes and frustrations, and learning about the issues they care about has been deeply grounding. The moments when someone tells me I’ve been the representation they needed to see – those are the reasons I keep showing up to do the work. Too often we see self-serving leaders who run for office for all the wrong reasons. I’m running because public service is in my bones, and my experience has prepared me to serve Colorado as State Treasurer. Let’s win this together. Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

Hi, it’s Jay Jones – Democrat running for Attorney General in Virginia.
We’re officially two months out from Election Day! Time has flown by, but I can confidently say that I’m as determined to win this race as I was the day that I launched our campaign.
Throughout these next two months, your support for our campaign matters double – and I’ll tell you why. But if that’s all you need to hear, and you know how important it is that we win this race, can I count on you to chip in $25 or more right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Look, you and I both agree that we need to end MAGA’s extreme grip on the Attorney General’s office. Jason Miyares is a firm believer in abortion bans, has done nothing to take on predatory corporations that jack up prices, and works in lockstep with Donald Trump.
We can’t trust Miyares to fight for everyday Virginians, so we need to do everything we can in these final two months to defeat him on November 4th. This includes...
☎️ Powering our organizing program to reach voters across the Commonwealth through door or phone.
📺 Keeping our television ads up on the air so we’re ready to fight back against the lies coming from Miyares’ team.
🪧 Ordering double the amount of yard signs to cover every street corner of the Commonwealth and show that the momentum is on our side.
We have a lot of work ahead of us to cross these off our list, but I’m confident that these final two months of the campaign will give us the runway we need to get it done. But not without your help.
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment, and I hope I can count on you to step up. Will you give $25 or more right now and help us win our race in exactly two months? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=25]

clean_body: It may not sound like much, but with two months until Election Day, we are running out of time to fund investments that really matter. = We'll come right out and say it: Your contribution of $25 today to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor would make all the difference. See, we rely on grassroots supporters giving what they can, when they can to compete. It may not sound like much, but with two months until Election Day, we are running out of time to fund investments that really matter. Your $25 will allow us to counter right-wing disinformation. Your $25 will allow us to promote Abigail's plans to make our lives more affordable, strengthen our schools, and protect our freedoms. Your $25 will allow us to reach undecided voters all across the Commonwealth. = = = = = = = We're grateful to have you on our team, The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Angela Gonzales-Torres
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

My name is Angela Gonzales-Torres. Like other families being terrorized by
ICE in cities across America right now, when I was 15 one of my family’s
worst nightmares came true – my father was deported and overnight my mom
was left to raise me and my 3 sisters alone. Growing up, I lived in
Section 8 housing, a one-bedroom apartment where I shared the bedroom with
my 3 sisters, and even out of cars and shelters at times.

Today, living with that fear is increasingly the reality for many young
people in Los Angeles under Donald Trump’s regime and hateful policies. We
live with a broken economy and immigration system – one that places the
preferences and interests of wealthy elites and xenophobes over the needs
of working people in this country. And establishment politicians like my
opponent have just sat back and watched as it happened.

Over the years, Rep. Jimmy Gomez thought he could accept millions in
corporate PAC checks, and from lobbies like AIPAC — who align more with
Trump and the GOP than the values he says he supports — and that our
community wouldn’t notice.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-2-at?refcode=em20250904-36989&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36989_1203867_85eDgO&akid=36989%2E1203867%2E85eDgO ]He was wrong. I am Angela Gonzales-Torres, and I’m running to replace
Rep. Jimmy Gomez in California’s 34th district. Our campaign has set in
place a BIG goal for day one – an incredibly ambitious one – to put Gomez
on notice. Will you become one of our founding donors?

I’ll be honest – our goal for today is huge, and we’re not sure we’ll get
there. But I’ve seen the power of working people coming together my whole
life – after my father's deportation when my teachers, neighbors and
others stepped in to uplift me, my sisters, and my mom. When I led the
Historic Highland Park Neighborhood Council where our community came
together to address housing displacement and public safety. And now as an
education advocate supporting formerly incarcerated students at Pasadena
Community College. People are ready to upend the status quo and bring in a
new generation of leadership.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-2-at?refcode=em20250904-36989&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36989_1203867_85eDgO&akid=36989%2E1203867%2E85eDgO ]So today, we are putting our faith in community: community that is the
backbone of my whole life, and the lifeblood of this campaign. We’re going
to work hard, organize, and replace Rep. Jimmy Gomez. But we need your
help to keep it up. Will you be one of our founding donors with a
$5 contribution today?

I’m running against my incumbent Rep. Jimmy Gomez because he has left our
community behind:

* Despite promising to stop taking corporate PAC money, he has continued
to collect big checks from corporate PACs through his leadership PAC.
* He has voted to greenlight Donald Trump’s crypto corruption, allowing
Trump and his family to continue to make billions of dollars off his
Presidency.
* He is also one of the largest recipients of Israel lobby money from
AIPAC. Even as Israel commits genocide against the Palestinian people,
Gomez continues to vote to send billions of dollars of weapons
overseas while working people in Los Angeles struggle to make ends
meet.

For too long, our community has heard empty talk from corporate
politicians like Jimmy Gomez, without action to back it up. I am proud to
have the support of Justice Democrats and to join their slate of
working-class champions. From AOC, Rashida Tlaib, and the rest of the
Squad in 2018 to Summer Lee and Greg Casar in 2022, they have shown that
you can do politics differently and win. That means not taking a dime of
corporate PAC or lobbyist money and ruthlessly fighting for the working
class day in and day out.

Now, I’m not going to lie to you. I know it’s going to take a lot to be
taken seriously in this race. As a young Chicana woman going up against an
establishment politician backed by AIPAC, I know that we have a long road
ahead of us.

Pulling this off is going to take a lot of sweat, a whole lot of heart,
and an incredible movement. But people across the district and country are
tired of a system that puts profits above our interests, they’re tired of
their leaders capitulating to Trump and the big corporations, and they’re
tired of representatives who refuse to listen to our communities.

It’s time to get to work.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250904-2-at?refcode=em20250904-36989&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=10&refcode2=36989_1203867_85eDgO&akid=36989%2E1203867%2E85eDgO ]Will you join Justice Democrats and support our campaign with a day one
donation of $10 today?

In solidarity,
Angela

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250904-36989-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36989_1203867_85eDgO&akid=36989%2E1203867%2E85eDgO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36989%2E1203867%2E85eDgO

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Blackmail the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump's tariff policy is collapsing under legal scrutiny. Lower courts have ruled it illegal, and economists say it will cost working families thousands of dollars a year, raise prices, and kill jobs.
So what is Trump doing? He's running to the Supreme Court, demanding that his allies on the bench save him and warning that if they don't, it will "destroy the United States of America."
Trump is trying to bully the courts into rubber-stamping his agenda, no matter how weak or unconstitutional it is.
Peter, Trump's allies can seize control of state courts, like the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, where three seats are on the ballot this year. If they succeed, he'll have even more power to bend the law to his will.
That's why GOTV PAC is all-in on Pennsylvania, just like we did in Wisconsin earlier this year when we defeated Elon Musk's chosen candidate. We're organizing voter turnout so the courts remain independent and a real check on Trump's power, not a tool for him to exploit.
Will you donate today to GOTV PAC to help us defend Pennsylvania's courts and ensure they stay strong enough to stand up to Trump? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09032025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09032025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.

clean_body: [] Peter , Donald Trump's tariff policy is collapsing under legal scrutiny. Lower courts have ruled it illegal, and economists say it will cost working families thousands of dollars a year, raise prices, and kill jobs. So what is Trump doing? He's running to the Supreme Court, demanding that his allies on the bench save him and warning that if they don't, it will "destroy the United States of America." Trump is trying to bully the courts into rubber-stamping his agenda, no matter how weak or unconstitutional it is. Peter, Trump's allies can seize control of state courts, like the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, where three seats are on the ballot this year. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Vaccines save lives. That’s just the truth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
They don’t care if Americans die in pursuit of their agenda. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114628732/567639125/823540626?refcode=ea.314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRlZmYxMC1lNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jwS-4OUS_o9UVRGzJ-MINeN3n56BUk4HHG7lcOnEz8=&emci=d228fb9e-b589-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
**No doubt sparked by the anti-vaccine drumbeat from Washington, D.C., Ron DeSantis and the extreme Republican leaders of Florida are condemning their state to a public health disaster.** With this right-wing anti-vaccine hysteria, I fear that Florida won’t be the last state to fall for this. By trying to make their state the first to end _all_ vaccine requirements, including those for children in public schools, Florida leaders will be ushering back diseases like polio, measles and rubella that previous generations feared. We know diseases like this don’t stay within age groups or state lines. Infected kids can bring these diseases home to parents and grandparents, while sooner or later ending up in communities all across the United States. Peter, vaccines save lives. What would people who lived and suffered before the miracle of vaccines say about a future generation that rejected them? I suspect they’d be as horrified as I am. Elected leaders are supposed to _protect_ the people — that includes protecting public health. These actions in Florida are dangerous, wrong and fundamentally opposed to that principle. They are putting conspiracy theory politics that they believe will get them votes ahead of the very children and families they are sworn to protect. **I support vaccines, ensuring schoolchildren are vaccinated and evidence-based public health initiatives. I always will.** **[Please, add your name to join me and condemn the attacks on vaccines both in Washington and in Florida.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114628733/567639126/344119165?refcode=ea.314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRlZmYxMC1lNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jwS-4OUS_o9UVRGzJ-MINeN3n56BUk4HHG7lcOnEz8=&emci=d228fb9e-b589-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)** Thank you for standing with me, Roy Cooper [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114628734/567639127/344119165?refcode=ea.314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTRlZmYxMC1lNzg5LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jwS-4OUS_o9UVRGzJ-MINeN3n56BUk4HHG7lcOnEz8=&emci=d228fb9e-b589-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=314eff10-e789-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)

clean_body: They don’t care if Americans die in pursuit of their agenda. | No doubt sparked by the anti-vaccine drumbeat from Washington, D.C., Ron DeSantis and the extreme Republican leaders of Florida are condemning their state to a public health disaster. With this right-wing anti-vaccine hysteria, I fear that Florida won’t be the last state to fall for this. By trying to make their state the first to end all vaccine requirements, including those for children in public schools, Florida leaders will be ushering back diseases like polio, measles and rubella that previous generations feared. We know diseases like this don’t stay within age groups or state lines. Infected kids can bring these diseases home to parents and grandparents, while sooner or later ending up in communities all across the United States. Peter, vaccines save lives. What would people who lived and suffered before the miracle of vaccines say about a future generation that rejected them? I suspect they’d be as horrified as I am. Elected leaders are supposed to protect the people — that includes protecting public health. These actions in Florida are dangerous, wrong and fundamentally opposed to that principle. They are putting conspiracy theory politics that they believe will get them votes ahead of the very children and families they are sworn to protect. I support vaccines, ensuring schoolchildren are vaccinated and evidence-based public health initiatives. I always will. Thank you for standing with me, Roy Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: AOC's newest bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We have somehow conditioned ourselves to believe that it is normal for members of Congress — who swore an oath to the people — to day-trade individual stocks and make millions with the sensitive information that they are entrusted with to serve.
How can anyone possibly make an objective vote on health care, energy, or war when their _personal_ money is tied up in pharmaceutical companies, oil companies, or defense companies' stocks? **You can't**.
Moreover, millionaires in Congress are a dime a dozen. **We must do everything we can to level the playing field when people run for elected office**.
So yesterday, Alexandria joined a bipartisan coalition to introduce the **Restore Trust in Congress Act** — because we deserve better from our leaders that abuse their position in Congress to make huge profits from the stock market.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250904.FAnqug&refcode=em20250904-9685-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9685%2E2526796%2ERRDcV6)
[Alexandria knows that we must restore the American people’s faith in our institutions, and that starts by demanding better from members of both parties. Will you make a $5 contribution today to power her fight in Congress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250904.FAnqug&refcode=em20250904-9685-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9685%2E2526796%2ERRDcV6)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250904.FAnqug&refcode=em20250904-9685-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9685%2E2526796%2ERRDcV6)**
Whether or not you can contribute today, thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I called on RFK Jr. to resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
RFK Jr. is disqualified, dangerous, and should not have the power to make critical health care decisions.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2629%2E4032634%2EOjluic)
---
When Americans raised concerns about RFK Jr.'s anti-vaccine views, he said he was "not gonna take away vaccines from anybody." His record tells a very different story. He fired every single member of a vaccine advisory panel at the CDC — replacing them with his own political picks. He fired the director of the CDC after she refused to sign off on his changes to the childhood vaccine schedule. And under his leadership, the CDC has censored analysis on the importance of vaccines, canceled research on vaccine hesitancy, and pulled $500 million in funding for vaccine development. **At a congressional hearing today, I pressed Secretary Kennedy on how he lied about preserving Americans’ access to vaccines. I pointed out that about a month ago, anybody could walk into a pharmacy and receive a COVID vaccine and now, because of him, that’s no longer the case today.** **Even then, he still said “I’m not taking them away.”** **I called on him to resign.** Before he was even nominated to this position, RFK Jr. spent his whole career peddling baseless conspiracy theories all under the guise of “protecting children.” (On his watch, the United States experienced the largest measles outbreak in modern history this summer. Children died.) He has said in the past that there is “no vaccine” that is safe and effective. Oh, and he has made money off of his all-out war on vaccines. Even as he rolls back vaccine access and dangerous diseases resurface today — RFK Jr.’s family could continue to profit thanks to his serious conflicts of interest in litigation against vaccines. Over a million Americans died from COVID-19. The vaccine has saved countless lives. Ask any scientist or doctor and they’ll tell you: Vaccines are one of the most effective tools we have to prevent the spread of infectious disease, especially for the most vulnerable among us, like children. The stakes here couldn’t be higher. RFK Jr. is disqualified, dangerous, and should not have the power to make critical health care decisions for millions of Americans. That’s why I won’t ever let up on this, and I’ll keep fighting to protect the health of all Americans. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
